name: Katie Porter
subject: Grassroots fundraising is down by 50%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
If this trend continues, we could see the influence of corporate PACs and big check donors increase, as campaigns who rely on grassroots donors (like ours) struggle to compete against the millions wealthy donors and PAC checks can provide.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)
Derek,
New from Politico: Across the board, grassroots fundraising is down nearly 50% compared to the first half of 2021.
_“..a sudden shortfall in grassroots giving would signal a tectonic shift in politics. The flow of this cash has made political stars of outsiders.”_
Derek, if this trend continues, we could see the influence of corporate PACs and big check donors increase, as **campaigns who rely on grassroots donors (like ours) struggle to compete against the millions wealthy donors and PAC checks can provide.**
Here’s the truth, Derek. I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs, but **my opponents have spent decades in Washington collecting and saving their checks.** I was only able to compete against nearly ten million dollars in super PAC spending last year to defend our House seat because of small dollar donations.
I’m so proud of the grassroots team we’ve built. People like me, a single mom and relative newcomer, wouldn’t be in office without you.
**Look, I know some fundraising emails can be annoying at best and spam at worst.** I’ve intentionally built our email program to be different: sharing with you what I’m doing in California and in Congress, explaining why we rely on your support, and yes, even sending along my favorite recipes.
I believe you are an important part of our team, and we don’t take your support for granted.
But we can’t win this race without boosting our grassroots fundraising numbers. Without that support we won’t have the resources we need to run ads, hire organizers, and prepare volunteers. **[So if you can, consider stepping up and making a donation today. Your gift will make a huge difference at this pivotal moment for grassroots funded campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230723-1?refcode=EMAJ23_1_FUN_20230723_V1_F&refcode2=26990_3422442_VFbyGp&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230723-1?refcode=EMAJ23_1_FUN_20230723_V1_F&refcode2=26990_3422442_VFbyGp&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)**
Thanks so much,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ23_1_FUN_20230723_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26990_3422442_VFbyGp&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=26990%2E3422442%2EVFbyGp)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP U.S. Senator this cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Former GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth even said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life”
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35259?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY)
**[With your help, we really can flip this seat! Chip in to help 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat Lucas Kunce replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate >>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35259?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY)**
* * *
Peter — **Josh Hawley is the GOP’s most vulnerable U.S. Senator in 2024.** Here’s everything you need to know:
**FIRST —** In 2018, Josh Hawley’s mentor — 3-term GOP Senator Jack Danforth — recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate and cleared the field of Republican challengers in his primary.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Hawley’s entire support base is collapsing. A recent poll showed his approval rating underwater in Missouri, and his former mentor + several of his GOP mega-donors have refused to back his 2024 re-election campaign.
**Republicans and Democrats agree: Missourians deserve better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing them in the U.S. Senate.**
**[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35259?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY)**
That’s where you come in, Peter. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we’re going to win this thing, we have to start strong.
**So we’re asking:[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can put our message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for betraying the American people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35259?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35260?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35259?refcode=em20230723-3434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3434%2E614464%2EtfPaZY)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: We’re making transit in Northern Virginia cleaner, safer, and more accessible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I was recently able to make an incredible announcement

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943543/418087802/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230722LC_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmNlZWQ4YS1iNzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJqWAmRq6almDZzC12Ql04b3CR_PlkDD2vfXK8CDCVw=)
---
Friend, traffic and transportation are major concerns across Northern Virginia.

We’re a fast-growing region, and it’s essential that we find ways to accommodate the many residents who need to commute by vehicle — while at the same time balancing environmental responsibility and the need for equal access to public transit.

So I was thrilled to be able to announce recently that Loudoun County (which falls entirely in the 10th District) is getting nearly $14 million to upgrade its buses to be low- or no-emission.

I’m proud that Northern Virginia can help demonstrate effective ways to modernize public transit that are safer and cleaner. And I’ve never been more optimistic that the historic infrastructure bill I helped pass in 2021 (through which these funds to Loudoun County came) can continue to revitalize our communities for the better.

I sit on the Transportation, Housing, and Urban Development Subcommittee of the House Appropriations Committee, and I’ve made it my priority to continually advocate for more affordable, accessible, and environmentally-conscious transportation. **I know that more areas of my district will soon see the benefits of our recent infrastructure investments.**

I reject the notion that we have to choose between making transit fast and efficient and ensuring that our communities have safe and breathable air. What we’re seeing in Loudoun County shows that progress on _both_ fronts is achievable when we make the right policy choices.

So let’s keep up the work!

– Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943544/418087803/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230722LC_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmNlZWQ4YS1iNzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJqWAmRq6almDZzC12Ql04b3CR_PlkDD2vfXK8CDCVw=)****
---

Sterling, VA 20165

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943558/418092195/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFkMjZmNC1iODI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq7-nXOazpI-qvr2DVddmmz6xAEaKLypbAWNN5235ms=&emci=604a5cea-b829-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=811d26f4-b829-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=252045)

Hi, I’m Rosnelly, Martin’s Finance Director — I wanted to take a few minutes to introduce myself! Fundraising can be a pretty fast-paced job (I would know after working in this field for a decade!) But an expression that keeps me grounded is _hay mas tiempo que vida_ — roughly, “We can always find the time; just breathe and take a moment.” That’s an important mindset here in New Mexico and on Martin’s campaign, where we work hard to advance our shared values — but always make time to enjoy each other’s company, amazing food, and time outdoors. It’s in these quieter moments that I rest and recharge, and feel especially motivated to get back to work to help build a brighter future for New Mexico and our country. But we can’t build that future without setting goals and creating a strong strategy to work toward those goals. That’s why I love this job so much. I have the opportunity to help build the campaign infrastructure to re-elect Martin, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot. A key strategy to accomplishing these goals? **Bringing in grassroots donations from folks like you.** **[Will you help us create a winning campaign by pitching in toward our end-of-month goal? Your support will ensure we have the resources to reach voters, launch ads, and more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943559/418092196/-90626349?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFkMjZmNC1iODI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq7-nXOazpI-qvr2DVddmmz6xAEaKLypbAWNN5235ms=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943560/418092197/-90626349?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTFkMjZmNC1iODI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq7-nXOazpI-qvr2DVddmmz6xAEaKLypbAWNN5235ms=)

Hi Peter, It’s Abby O’Keefe, the Organizing Director for Brandon Presley’s campaign, checking in! I wanted to reach out and keep you up to date on the work our historic field program has done so far. Our innovative field program has connected with thousands of voters in every Mississippi congressional district at their door. We’ve made calls to voters in all 82 counties in the state. And we’ve had countless folks come out and volunteer with us. But, this has only been possible because of support from our donors. [Peter, our field program’s future comes down to supporters like you. Click here to chip in $25 so we can power the strongest organizing program possible before our last public filing deadline of the primary on July 29th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943640/418097368/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhmZjk5YmItYmEyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEevnuPZw1ummjFJ1PRg1ryIPhBFjD1bJD1OEN1Hco8=) Here are some of our organizers getting ready to knock on doors, make calls, and connect with Mississippians across the state! 👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943641/418097376/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhmZjk5YmItYmEyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEevnuPZw1ummjFJ1PRg1ryIPhBFjD1bJD1OEN1Hco8=) | **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943642/418097383/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhmZjk5YmItYmEyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEevnuPZw1ummjFJ1PRg1ryIPhBFjD1bJD1OEN1Hco8=)**

We know what needs to get done to win this year. In 2019, Mississippi’s Democratic candidate only lost by 45,028 votes. We KNOW that we can make up the difference this year if we continue to organize within local communities here in Mississippi that are usually pushed aside during statewide races.
Our team is heavily invested in this historic, never-been-done-before organizing program because we are connecting with hundreds of thousands of infrequent voters across all 82 counties who can make up that difference and deliver the election for us.
[But first, we need to raise $40,000 before our public filing deadline in less than a week. Will you pitch in to keep our impressive organizing program running?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943643/418097391/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.48ff99bb-ba29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhmZjk5YmItYmEyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEevnuPZw1ummjFJ1PRg1ryIPhBFjD1bJD1OEN1Hco8=)
Thanks for your support!

clean_body: We need your support to keep up our field team’s momentum. | = Hi Peter, It’s Abby O’Keefe, the Organizing Director for Brandon Presley’s campaign, checking in! I wanted to reach out and keep you up to date on the work our historic field program has done so far. Our innovative field program has connected with thousands of voters in every Mississippi congressional district at their door. We’ve made calls to voters in all 82 counties in the state. And we’ve had countless folks come out and volunteer with us. But, this has only been possible because of support from our donors. = Here are some of our organizers getting ready to knock on doors, make calls, and connect with Mississippians across the state! 👇 = | = We know what needs to get done to win this year. In 2019, Mississippi’s Democratic candidate only lost by 45,028 votes. We KNOW that we can make up the difference this year if we continue to organize within local communities here in Mississippi that are usually pushed aside during statewide races. Our team is heavily invested in this historic, never-been-done-before organizing program because we are connecting with hundreds of thousands of infrequent voters across all 82 counties who can make up that difference and deliver the election for us. = Thanks for your support! Abby O’Keefe Organizing Director, Brandon Presley for Governor | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: DeSoto Crime Lab
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/desoto-crime-lab-12612992?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| As your chief prosecutor, my primary responsibility will be getting results in the courtroom on behalf of victims, their families, our partners in law enforcement, and the good law abiding citizens of Mississippi. All of these groups deserve justice in a timely manner, but Mississippi’s State Crime Lab has reached a critical level of backlogs, delaying justice and the prosecution of criminals. This hurts DeSoto County.
Much like I-55, the growing pains of DeSoto County must be met with solutions that improve our quality of life and attractiveness of DeSoto County.
That is why I will make a DeSoto County Crime Lab a priority in my Save DeSoto initiative on day one.
My office and I will work with local, state and national leaders to acquire the funding and legislative approval needed to give DeSoto County (one of Mississippi’s only growing counties) its own crime lab and examiners.
When it comes to putting perpetrators behind bars and giving victims justice, time is of the essence.
Our county provides a substantial amount of revenue for the state and I believe it is time we have a return on our investment when it comes to this issue (much like Interstate 55).
This is the type of forward thinking a prosperous and growing county of our size deserves. The DA may not be a legislator, but it is their job to represent the people wherever advocacy is needed. With your vote and support, I have a plan to make this a reality during my first term in office.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=31e8dcbed6&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=6c3b3dec3c&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=bc9ec42260&e=3c5d31b5ad)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Help us end censorship today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
RFK, Jr. is one of the most censored figures in recent times.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=1)
---
Peter, This week, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. testified at a Congressional hearing on censorship and the weaponization of the federal government. Incredibly, in a brazen attempt to censor the hearing, committee member Debbie Wasserman-Schultz moved to make it an executive session so that the American public would not be able to see it. The irony of censoring a hearing on censorship was not lost on the American public. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-nyc-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=2) Mr. Kennedy is one of the most censored figures of recent times, ever since the 2000s when he stood up for children’s health by speaking out about toxic chemicals in vaccines for children. Rather than seriously investigate these concerns, the government and pharma lobbyists fought to smear and silence him. As the pandemic unfolded, Mr. Kennedy’s questioning of lockdowns, mandatory vaccines, and the origins of COVID-19 was met with hostility by the government and industry yet again. As the recent _Missouri v. Biden_ case has revealed, the Biden administration directed tech companies to censor Mr. Kennedy just 2 days after the inauguration. That case resulted in the district court judge issuing a preliminary injunction against government collusion with social media platforms to censor free speech. Later a higher court stayed the injunction. The case will likely go to the Supreme Court. Clearly, as the committee Democrats' vicious attacks on Mr. Kennedy show, we have a long way to go. **Peter If you’re concerned about the growing collusion to suppress free speech in the U.S.,[please chip in today to help uphold the First Amendment.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-nyc-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=3) No other candidate has taken such a strong stand for the Constitution.** We’re not waiting for the election to elevate free speech in the public mind. On Thursday, Aug. 17, Team Kennedy is putting on a [Roundtable on Censorship](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=4) bringing together leading experts and journalists like Glenn Greenwald, Michael Shellenberger, Sharyl Attkisson; Jenin Younes, and former New Jersey Assemblyman Jamel Holley. Each has been a steadfast defender of the First Amendment. You can bet that this panel won’t be censored! **Please**[**RSVP here**](https://www.kennedy24.com/censorship_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=5) and share this invitation with your friends and family. [**Contribute today if you believe in free speech — please chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can to make sure we can pass down this fundamental democratic right to future generations**.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-nyc-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=6) At Team Kennedy, we’re grateful for your support and continued efforts to support Mr. Kennedy’s campaign. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-nyc-video?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=7 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-nyc-video?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=congress_tries_to_censor_rfk3&n=7)

| Folks, last month Gov. Newsom proposed a historic amendment to the Constitution in an effort to combat the gun violence plaguing the nation. [_**The amendment will permanently enshrine the four broadly supported gun safety principles into the U.S. Constitution:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943944/418112064/-701001122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWVkN2EzMC1jZTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GB-TEECRs_kCkvYJMqwR3fpUdgXpvzl0RKJ5sYbRKKY=&emci=f189a0e9-f627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=19ed7a30-ce29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=560478) **→** Raising the federal minimum age to purchase a gun from 18 to 21; **→** Mandating universal background checks to prevent dangerous individuals from purchasing a gun; **→** Creating a mandatory waiting period for all gun purchases; **→** And banning the sale of assault weapons. [**Gun proponents like the NRA have called Gov. Newsom’s plan “unhinged” - but there’s nothing more unhinged than the needless death our country faces every day thanks to the weapons of war on our streets. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66943945/418112065/-701001122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWVkN2EzMC1jZTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GB-TEECRs_kCkvYJMqwR3fpUdgXpvzl0RKJ5sYbRKKY=&emci=f189a0e9-f627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=19ed7a30-ce29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=560478) **_We want to know what top Democrats like you think, so we’re launching an urgent poll. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Ten Truths, No Lies
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWehbv_DRN

Vivek 2024

Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on
truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of
these facts.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWehbv_DRN

Fellow American,

TRUTH. There's only one. Not
yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic
political climate where spin is all the Administrative state
knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to
say them:

God is real.
There are two
genders.
Human flourishing
requires fossil fuels.
Reverse racism is
racism.
An open border is no
border.
Parents determine the
education of their children.
The nuclear family is
the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
Capitalism lifts
people up from poverty.
There are three
branches of the U.S. government, not four.
The U.S. Constitution
is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

CHIP IN
IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH

America was founded on these
truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths,
our standing as a nation would mean nothing.

If you agree with these 10
TRUTHS, I need you on my team.

This is about more than a
campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Will you
join me today by chipping in $1 or more?

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

STAND WITH THE TRUTH

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading

clean_body: Vivek 2024 Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts. Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, I need you on my team. This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more? Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy STAND WITH THE TRUTH GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. Elon Musk said that he plans to rebrand Twitter by replacing its blue bird logo with an X, at least temporarily — and that it might happen as early as today.

| | |
# MONday, JULY 24, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the 199th anniversary of the first presidential opinion poll, published on July 24, 1824. This first straw poll correctly predicted Andrew Jackson beating John Quincy Adams, and polls have been with us ever since.

In today's edition, we're discussing the biggest box office weekend of the year, a new poll that shows Donald Trump beating Joe Biden, and the happy shock of a baby's first taste of ice cream.

Think we could improve something? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! |
---
## Musk Plans to Rename Twitter as "X"
Elon Musk said that he plans to [rebrand Twitter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAUheGnwQ4HrixIQZHGbtOmdFi5KgnKDtxdx7fPmDr1ab7zf93Hu48p7sun39DRnEc_UXzjKAwHxaEboQluRgTsGnRSWyGtsVo1q9N9L3EOKLVVkxTi1oebCAqknL2R8GiiAwGdMKCkEPbWt0pKb431odMAYAxTAkOkXNrvHHdacU5nfmNpp7w1ya1Ez8q6DwYDg-E4jrbgi7DUa2cwEE7rnlNeTgYDprzz7VV_ePVn5XREIix8Wv2-IE95ydyHiC_uU-KPWELll45fRzsGQ1NceB4xpVj1BVs2H9MfhP7v8hsAAP__vQpjXw) by replacing its blue bird logo with an X, at least temporarily -- and that it might happen as early as today.

The [Twitter rebranding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1y6yAQRp9G6vDAgvgpKG7jzrdNqVnByt4ECQ8idvL2GadO-c1XnDPn7TJfkAvv1_-4UexrnTF1ftAsnQAjQM8w5rgSAemRorJBquCCNeMtqmRhsrCoCa0Py4SAxiyWfFKAUvqRI0jQ0oFRUobJn4xSGFzArC0AODcYSZl7baf3ynu_0Vq-64PaKdVtLPHW-_0Y9L8BzgOc8b7T83hdr9E6p0IDnKnUXWyfx4foT-6dmij1WsWXWLhlkSfvJp9y1qs3RpHLkHzWmDy4BYMcW8z3J5fCh33pXDfk8ovvf9f4CQAA__85QV58) is an effort to stem the loss of ad revenue by changing the service's image, but it was met with immediate criticism by users on social media.

Musk has long sought to create an "everything app" named X, and Twitter's parent company is Musk's X Corp. The domain X.com will redirect to Twitter once the name is changed.
## Congress Seeking the Truth on UFOs
Congress will hear testimony this week from three former military and intelligence officials who claim the government is hiding the truth about [alien visits and artifacts.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnsTcsuBBTBoYu3tK1o0Xwxb4thghIUN--SuduRzrLp__zul4dRUr7hzvRtpBX5xs9ceWagWIgVxg3GxAB5YhWzIYLo82sxsOq2Stxc054yVEFaW6bUrMM0isZtIGRLHCQXIMSnJvL26SEcEYbt8kZALQeFMeNWi7TV6bUDgzxJz-xTD6fY7RHa_c6yPcBlgGW3vuUbj5hr69_gOWeIzXydYDF57QXrK955EdF5vN5UmuI7MhxYwe6Qmlnj5Ar64jfrPjkzEVyMxa73TvFSHV-ifbTUfwTtP-D_AYAAP__jipinA)

Similarly, the Senate has adopted an amendment to the defense bill requiring the federal government to collect and disclose [all UFO-related records ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8NbETwoMYMDF28pWtH68U8YloMkSGx-u8rd-54Op3u0_d5na-Ycir3D9zI91hnXHp60SytACNAz8CDj0RAmpNXg5PKWTcYvvrRjdaAAiIdNI6owbmbGgLFBW8QkScPErS0YJSU7m28GKXQWYdBDwBgLTOSQup1v3zVVPpKMf_UF-2XpW48-7X3R2P6ncHEYOorrSnns2MwrXWjQkdjMDUq2InBZJSSzhoR92frO3YKIuOx4TftTQTasASBpR1nrEU8Yz3nfPfhcaScUxtOovuG6e-F9_-F_AYAAP__Yn9iGg)for a special board to review.

For some legislators, the issue is national security: If it's not aliens, why can't the military figure out what these UFOs are? For others, it's more in the spirit of the TV series "X-Files," which famously proclaimed: "The truth is out there."
## 'Barbenheimer' Weekend Explodes at Box Office
"Barbie" and "Oppenheimer" soared to [box office records ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn8NbET22dh48NAlW7p2RIe5C1cZjIiVtP--okuXju_7lqf3cRtvKFm2-zuuFCuXEVOVJ43Kd2A7MCO0c2QiINNS1C4oHXxwtl0iOR2QMSHqYAzOA9KEvbUB2UzKp1YiKDDKg9VKhX64WK0x-ICzcQDgfWMVzVLLcfksstWFOH-XJx2XVNY2x6XW_dGYtwauDVxx3-j1OK8TjiopUwPXCY9JqCv7TttCstLRndMflK-uMEuizjBDnxQaTOyn3g2DcwmYjfKz0mpojzjvL8lZHu50u68o-del_p_mJwAA___C52Sy)this weekend, beating already-high expectations. "Barbie" took in $155 million, the year's biggest opening, and "Oppenheimer" hit $80 million.

It's the first time ever that two movies opened this big on one weekend, and the [biggest opening weekend ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu5CAURb_G7hjBA4MpKLZxN9tuaWF4jN8GGwujmczfR04XKeXRla6Ozr_7fPeUaX_89Ru6lsrsQ6MnztwwUAzkDH10CRFQ9uiEtlxYY7XqV4c2eS-1WUIEb20YjJbjEA1XaIIax54ccJDcgBKc22G8KSG8NdZHqQHAmE5xjNRKvf0vtLcVU36XJ9ZbKFuf3dracXbyTwdTB9PTV8L2vrYOpuu5gylRvmgpn6ykRAF_AFt8XQhZOQ7cV6QNKysH7rQ_2AvxA_fIztW3hpVVDKXGkwmQgzZGc9HB1FcXjxflTKe-bB-bp_xt136P9RUAAP__Jq5qTQ)ever for a film directed by a woman -- Greta Gerwig was the director for "Barbie."

Not surprisingly, women made up 65% of the "Barbie" audience, while men were 62% of the "Oppenheimer" audience, a film about creating the first atomic bomb.

clean_body: Elon Musk said that he plans to rebrand Twitter by replacing its blue bird logo with an X, at least temporarily — and that it might happen as early as today. | | | | | | MONday, JULY 24, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 199th anniversary of the first presidential opinion poll, published on July 24, 1824. This first straw poll correctly predicted Andrew Jackson beating John Quincy Adams, and polls have been with us ever since. In today's edition, we're discussing the biggest box office weekend of the year, a new poll that shows Donald Trump beating Joe Biden, and the happy shock of a baby's first taste of ice cream. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Musk Plans to Rename Twitter as "X" Elon Musk said that he plans to by replacing its blue bird logo with an X, at least temporarily -- and that it might happen as early as today. The is an effort to stem the loss of ad revenue by changing the service's image, but it was met with immediate criticism by users on social media. Musk has long sought to create an "everything app" named X, and Twitter's parent company is Musk's X Corp. The domain X.com will redirect to Twitter once the name is changed. Congress Seeking the Truth on UFOs Congress will hear testimony this week from three former military and intelligence officials who claim the government is hiding the truth about Similarly, the Senate has adopted an amendment to the defense bill requiring the federal government to collect and disclose a special board to review. For some legislators, the issue is national security: If it's not aliens, why can't the military figure out what these UFOs are? For others, it's more in the spirit of the TV series "X-Files," which famously proclaimed: "The truth is out there." 'Barbenheimer' Weekend Explodes at Box Office "Barbie" and "Oppenheimer" soared to weekend, beating already-high expectations. "Barbie" took in $155 million, the year's biggest opening, and "Oppenheimer" hit $80 million. It's the first time ever that two movies opened this big on one weekend, and the for a film directed by a woman -- Greta Gerwig was the director for "Barbie." Not surprisingly, women made up 65% of the "Barbie" audience, while men were 62% of the "Oppenheimer" audience, a film about creating the first atomic bomb. subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop toxic pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1892171?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Wild bees are DYING OUT while Bayer-Monsanto profits from bee-killing pesticides!** Bayer-Monsanto has _**lied to you**_ and the rest of the public about the dangers of the pesticides it sells. It’s _**MANIPULATED**_ science and _**DODGED**_ regulations designed to keep you, me, and pollinators safe – all so it can continue to rake in the cash at our expense. The neonic pesticides Bayer-Monsanto sells can **kill bees on contact ,** and they’ve made U.S. agriculture nearly **48x more toxic** to bees! They are linked to health impacts in people, too, including _**hormone disruption and birth defects of the heart and brain.**_ Bayer-Monsanto knows its pesticides are dangerous. But instead of switching to safe alternatives, it’s decided to hide the truth and continue profiting off dying bees and sick people. [**Friend, demand accountability from Bayer-Monsanto and STOP bee-killing pesticides before our urgent deadline of 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1892172?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1892173?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We are in the midst of a _**POLLINATOR CRISIS!**_ Wild bees are dying at a DISTURBING rate. Several species of beloved bumblebees have **lost as much as 90% of their population** over the last few decades. Bayer-Monsanto deserves part of that blame.
Instead of using its resources to bring attention to the pollinator crisis or to find sustainable alternatives to its toxic pesticides, Bayer-Monsanto is **spending BIG on disinformation campaigns to deny and distract** from its role.
**The good news: environmentalists like you and me aren’t fooled by big corporations.** That’s why I know I can count on you to take action today. [**Send your message to Bayer-Monsanto: stop selling bee-killing pesticides!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1892174?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1892175?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director for Science,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Wild bees are DYING OUT while Bayer-Monsanto profits from bee-killing pesticides! Bayer-Monsanto has lied to you and the rest of the public about the dangers of the pesticides it sells. It’s MANIPULATED science and DODGED regulations designed to keep you, me, and pollinators safe – all so it can continue to rake in the cash at our expense. The neonic pesticides Bayer-Monsanto sells can kill bees on contact , and they’ve made U.S. agriculture nearly 48x more toxic to bees! They are linked to health impacts in people, too, including hormone disruption and birth defects of the heart and brain. Bayer-Monsanto knows its pesticides are dangerous. But instead of switching to safe alternatives, it’s decided to hide the truth and continue profiting off dying bees and sick people. == | == We are in the midst of a POLLINATOR CRISIS! Wild bees are dying at a DISTURBING rate. Several species of beloved bumblebees have lost as much as 90% of their population over the last few decades. Bayer-Monsanto deserves part of that blame. Instead of using its resources to bring attention to the pollinator crisis or to find sustainable alternatives to its toxic pesticides, Bayer-Monsanto is spending BIG on disinformation campaigns to deny and distract from its role. The good news: environmentalists like you and me aren’t fooled by big corporations. That’s why I know I can count on you to take action today. == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy Director for Science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Sign Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand Florida Republicans remove these lies from the new school curriculum
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Florida Republicans: "Slaves did not 'benefit' from slavery, so take that out of the new curriculum NOW!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8182a807-ba73-47df-9b60-6cedbcd59f83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta065eb6f-6f96-42cf-9cd1-9feccd3f3aa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Ron DeSantis and Florida Republicans are taking "being horrible" to a whole new level, by pushing a new curriculum in Florida schools that promotes the ways in which slaves [benefitted](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8635da2-6420-4991-971a-8147a4ba7d22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from slavery. Defending the curriculum, DeSantis said, "They're probably going to show that some of the folks that eventually parlayed, you know, being a blacksmith into doing things later in life." (Ignoring the fact that slavery was for life). Slavery was horrible, and the people enslaved by it were not just taking an adult-ed course at the local high school. And Florida Republicans need to stop denying history, and get rid of the new curriculum NOW. [**Tell Florida Republicans: "Slaves did not 'benefit' from slavery, so take that out of the new curriculum NOW."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd9e1f5e-ded8-460c-a58d-e83e40806432/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgq88nhvehmb24ichnbv5v6rftrma4g0iubstq1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i62ob2c3h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: You'll want to see the latest numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Juhe3Fc%2b1CxNmMVWkRXkkg&sysid=1)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29813%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GC4P8HF1iDsqB3ObtwG8Q&sysid=1)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29814%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oyAEy9%2f8Ms01un2S7DiR0g&sysid=1)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29825%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b9FGQJbea2Yo43YQJ47qkg&sysid=1)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Juhe3Fc%2b1CxNmMVWkRXkkg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT →**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29826%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vEhapR5xsrdURXuIVa9NMg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29827%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nACEZh3g23Pjn1z%2bvzo3Bg&sysid=1)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Your America News

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Three reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for Attorney General
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66947284/418121656/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4MDFjZi0xZDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0fBybPTt-89NFxEyXHPFaTy6EBHODVQoqOisDuNXzU=&emci=36895f28-b624-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=1cb801cf-1d2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10203249) Team,

As PA’s former Auditor General, I ran a complicated state agency, cracked down on the backlog of untested rape kits and the unanswered phone calls to the child abuse hotline, and worked with Governor Wolf to improve our public schools. I took on big corporations, powerful special interests, and leaders of both parties to save taxpayers over $1 billion in waste, fraud, and abuse. I’m proud of my record fighting for you.

I know the challenges facing our next Attorney General, and I believe my background, experience, and record are a perfect fit to take on those fights.

**I take a backseat to no one when it comes to fighting for and getting results for Pennsylvanians.**

That’s why I’m running for Attorney General — and why I’m asking for your support. If you already know you’re with this campaign and ready to contribute (THANK YOU!) here is a link to pitch in: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq3email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66947285/418121660/-412144306?refcode=email_072423_myrecord_t1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4MDFjZi0xZDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0fBybPTt-89NFxEyXHPFaTy6EBHODVQoqOisDuNXzU=)

But if you’re not yet convinced, here are three reasons I’m prepared to be your next Attorney General, and why I’m asking for your support:

**1) I’m the one that cracked down on untested rape kits in Pennsylvania.** In 2016, we exposed a backlog of over 3,000 untested rape kits. We took action and reduced the backlog by 90% during my two terms as Auditor General. We got answers for victims and brought sexual predators to justice.

**2) When my audit uncovered over 50,000 unanswered calls to Pennsylvania’s child abuse hotline, I took action.** Every single one of those calls could have meant life or death for a child. I demanded immediate reforms, and held people accountable to make sure child abuse calls never again go unanswered.

**3) When I uncovered millions of dollars of waste and fraud in our charter school reimbursement system, I stood up to leaders of both parties to demand that money go back into our public schools** — saving taxpayers and getting our students and teachers the resources they need.

Folks, everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, voters tell me they want an Attorney General who is tough, but fair. That’s the kind of Auditor General I was, and it’s exactly the kind of Attorney General I’ll be for you.

So, if I’ve convinced you of my strong record of fighting for Pennsylvanians, then I need your support in this campaign. [**Can you pitch in $3 – or any amount – to help us in this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66947287/418121661/-412144306?refcode=email_072423_myrecord_t1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4MDFjZi0xZDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0fBybPTt-89NFxEyXHPFaTy6EBHODVQoqOisDuNXzU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66947290/418121663/-412144306?refcode=email_072423_myrecord_t1&express_lane=true&amounts=3,15,25,50,100&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4MDFjZi0xZDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0fBybPTt-89NFxEyXHPFaTy6EBHODVQoqOisDuNXzU=)

body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpemn96b5o0iqi8ic2l3p4prtv6nr80mfa0kn1r0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8hmm8k6abqe8ufpksoquov2dimbernhlbjiou3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbdt4j56nn5rfjjbvkvvh2aalced96ja28j2pug_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9pucn2f8gacj2a0hehu3b09gnmqlojjl521ajp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3d3d7a9em013gkk3m2puviikjslasri1ommhed0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zae5499dmqbku7tpoblct9o1ig5i0irb482v1aho_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlcegilpn7jv5svag7iap6vjusgu5lm1nv9f5120_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61o34c5h2bs)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. clean_body: Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling. | BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND Vivek Ramaswamy - 12% Ron DeSantis - 12% Fellow American - people are waking up. People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement. I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today. But this gives me hope for our future. We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. That's what makes America itself. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | ---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Peter, Republicans like to pretend they’re the party of rural America. But what has the GOP _**actually**_ delivered for Americans living in the hills and the heartland? Under Democratic leadership, the government has brought better broadband to your street, replaced the old lead pipes in your town, and stopped your hospitals from shutting their doors. And what have Republicans done? They vote against creating a better life for rural Americans _**every. single. time.**_ But don’t worry – they’ll always show up at the ribbon cutting ceremonies to take the credit. That’s why it’s so important that Democrats continue to invest in rural areas. I’ve experienced socialism, and I won’t let Biden & the radical Dems put America down that path.

My name is Hung Cao.

I’m a Vietnamese Immigrant, and according to Chuck Schumer, I should be a DEMOCRAT.

But NO, I’m a PROUD conservative and I’d NEVER let Schumer tell me how to think.

Allow me to share the deeply personal reason I’m a Republican and NOT a Democrat: Shortly before the fall of Saigon, my family immigrated from communist Vietnam to the US.

I am so proud to now live in the land of the free, and the home of the brave. I served our country as a Special Operations Officer for 25 years, with combat deployments in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

Listen, fellow patriot, I didn’t escape Communist Vietnam and defend Freedom with the Navy just for Chuck Schumer and his Radical Left Democrats to drive us to socialism once again.

**[So won’t you pitch in now to help me FIRE Schumer? I am in desperate need of your help because the latest polls show Democrats WINNING in November:](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d3e8f39cafb64cadaea488e7a9ae3020&_e=pj970_AXxaQiw5LhebB1yVQbVxue0inGTHmj5Q0aIL5Fin2TB1CaUVONgT83Wd6sXOt8imQLjObFgMtdxeriTXiNJEZBnIoznCiXacLXCo6QPb9V8KQ3Wx5w_5BNLdYmOOdClNlYmbp_W0LrIstqipvkdrxSHY50-4GT2qDT3cQAKAmm6yvNWQUYNz87tiskzQyPRl4XAFTnGwBSGKS_rlcXsdLM5x8bjU8pSu3MZaxYVKeji1NPIu1FkekUvpmqEqUQDf8UFglnK51S2KyvmTJiGKz2XLh3m5vc5Q0RzTdX10LIVV1b2Cpnx2lhQQcT6varav1txXDOjE4ZoEjwiCtNjdigSW90xsAXcPCUtGJHB9H051k0hPYafxYM4abeq59FqtW6yZMbE6pjgETCj1tD1J-IXndYp1idJWGWB6Y%3D)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z19ijvmig6ao5mujm6q692a0uogbdg46qcqbn5s0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zseulsg56iej9eesoblpvgjq6gl1f1k7bt9o7chg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0s3psdhtfc2911t2d3e70lpjjsgmeec7odnah88_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfdq4uqv9boaqt9j5bq8g7kutvr9k7b0gv5l2hq8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc3fbkf1552nbhbcomo0cv0sd0qa5i9sj7e6gqog_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaftten991960bbnbd763r484tq91iaidebhm6no_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaiq7a0aqekke3i3npakh1g23rfuv7du9g7v2pd8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9i61p72c9h2bs)

1600 Daily

subject: 🔥 GFI "Call to Action" - an Ohioan in need! 🔥
body:
🔥 GFI "Call to Action" \- an Ohioan in need! 🔥 | | |
---
| |
# HELP!
---
| Greetings!

As you know, the DOJ and FBI are stepping up their persecution of January 6, 2021 (J6) civil protesters, and they are now targeting Trevor Cain, who went to Washington as part of a day bus trip.

Trevor is a young husband and father of 2, and there is a fundraiser for Trevor on Friday, July 28 from 7 to 10 PM in Parma, Ohio (see attached flyer and information below for details). He will need around $30,000 to mount a successful defense!

Please forward this email to your friends & family and ask them to attend if possible! Also, I know many of you are not in the Cleveland area, so if you cannot attend, please consider donating to his defense at:

[https://givesendgo.com/trevorcain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1b373e5509&e=5c740fa3e2)

This isn't just about Trevor; it is about the future of our country, and it is about your personal freedom and liberty because they are going to persecute all who will not comply with tyranny regardless of whether we went to J6.

The more we resist and push back against the Deep State NOW, the more they will know they cannot beat us!

---
| [Visit GFI's Website](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=39f3daa99f&e=5c740fa3e2 "Visit GFI's Website")
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=696a74d07b&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f5f7c5253d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
GFIOhio@proton.me
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=d87c2662fb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=d87c2662fb).

name: NRSC Opposition Research Team (via NRSC HQ)
subject: OUT-OF-TOUCH: Are outside donors bankrolling Jon Tester’s campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We can’t allow the radical Left to buy this battleground Senate race...| | | Peter, After news broke regarding Jon Tester’s **_MASSIVE _**Q2 fundraising haul of over **_$5 MILLION _**– it’s safe to say the Montana Democrat has built up a **_daunting_** war chest at this year’s halfway point. And with only 6,000 of his donors coming from Montana, it can safely be estimated that he has a liberal army of _55,000 donors residing in other states like California and New York._ **We need your help to keep pace with Jon Tester’s radical fundraising machine, Peter. | | The Collective PAC is “the nation’s largest organization dedicated to supporting the next generation of Black elected officials and voters,” and has endorsed hundreds of successful candidates in the last few years. Our team is staying focused on the issues that matter most to Rhode Island families and seniors: preventing gun violence, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and standing up to extreme Republican attacks on women’s reproductive freedoms. There are big fights ahead of us, and I am looking forward to working alongside organizations like The Collective PAC in the future. To get to Congress, I need you to join The Collective PAC in being all in for #TeamGabe. Join The Collective PAC and show your support today. Can you chip in**right now**?

Our team is staying focused on the issues that matter most to Rhode Island families and seniors: preventing gun violence, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and standing up to extreme Republican attacks on women’s reproductive freedoms. There are big fights ahead of us, and I am looking forward to working alongside organizations like The Collective PAC in the future. To get to Congress, I need you to join The Collective PAC in being all in for #TeamGabe. Join The Collective PAC and show your support today.
