name: Josh Hawley
subject: Beijing Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Beijing Biden is putting the Chinese Communist Party before American citizens.
He’s sending his officials to get on “surer footing” with the CCP.
His administration is allowing TikTok to spy on your children and grandchildren.
And he’s letting the CCP buy up our American farmland right in your backyard.
_Enough is enough._
**[I’m leading the fight against Communist China, but I need your help. Stand with me today so we can STOP Beijing Biden from letting the CCP into our front doors!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a6a017e689154ed5803f6a3445bb73c0&_e=8GOe1fREAT1V4o9X5eNWLGRy4LTE79CI2ZHqfD5mM1IqeTV8M20N4Ny3JEcoaELkh8s6fWIlg2NA6TDXhIL7MFQJRTW5_pjuc4WtFYg0CU56kUE3i_vMIt_uhT9lqyxkW6wm0JLNseQCjTJyNrVucqFb7clqpfVFZChLAPXRkLO8txOeYINk_Xsq3r-X5BI2N6zTWh-ROMUAn2eDFZ9ji7pYEsaNeKA-eDbcglrGX14mr8jB_QFUu6A6vYgzM0C771UpYbqv3Y4MtidfcJz3q3AiHHBNMrJCgbo3R3WjJN3Mga6TJipOQ-4oW7_chU6hBTiLJYzIjE6xNE47OLGnaqlsL6XQjUwYcPHCnvAjP8T0zyW2VKVGKRkHJZujKLQE)**
---
[**STOP THE CCP**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a6a017e689154ed5803f6a3445bb73c0&_e=8GOe1fREAT1V4o9X5eNWLGRy4LTE79CI2ZHqfD5mM1IqeTV8M20N4Ny3JEcoaELkh8s6fWIlg2NA6TDXhIL7MFQJRTW5_pjuc4WtFYg0CU56kUE3i_vMIt_uhT9lqyxkW6wm0JLNseQCjTJyNrVucqFb7clqpfVFZChLAPXRkLO8txOeYINk_Xsq3r-X5BI2N6zTWh-ROMUAn2eDFZ9ji7pYEsaNeKA-eDbcglrGX17mR9hVZYDJvXAtA_D17iTbQH1pUBlHptUisldk6ACGaFit6YwNFl2Isz0XZdb5Khh7IVH4he6EBE3GobEGsy1gAQ0qFp_9e0HhBN25WFd2wjq627gYDJTN9-BHeUuVeqe6KU4s8keNikIiFu9qd6u8)
---
This administration’s endless, embarrassing groveling to China is a historic mistake.

We should be standing up for human rights and bringing jobs back to America - not endorsing slave labor and concentration camps.

The Chinese Communist Party is a perpetrator of evil, and it’s time the President starts treating them that way.

**[Joe Biden won’t take on the CCP, but I will. Join me today to STOP Communist China!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a6a017e689154ed5803f6a3445bb73c0&_e=8GOe1fREAT1V4o9X5eNWLGRy4LTE79CI2ZHqfD5mM1IqeTV8M20N4Ny3JEcoaELkh8s6fWIlg2NA6TDXhIL7MFQJRTW5_pjuc4WtFYg0CU56kUE3i_vMIt_uhT9lqyxkW6wm0JLNseQCjTJyNrVucqFb7clqpfVFZChLAPXRkLO8txOeYINk_Xsq3r-X5BI2N6zTWh-ROMUAn2eDFZ9ji7pYEsaNeKA-eDbcglrGX16_epju5icljeXiLWQ3axnkZxhLy_gPr5nDMQZgmI7Gmq3lSHXK3qB81RyQcedbTuZh7m8UPxUxibxYH0GkDspm8yqInwJBWELoM4M4gz7F_Jq-vzncPgvRbJeTSrwP5hDFao7EEGe5Oid9yS-K3Qvv)**

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Who determines America's foreign policy?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._dRqJpQ0w06w)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The ongoing war in Ukraine highlights perennial complications and questions that have faced America since its Founding.

Who determines America’s foreign policy? What are the purposes and limits of American’s actions abroad? And, what responsibility does America have for people in other nations?

How these questions are answered has a major impact not only on the strength and reputation of America abroad, but also on the lives and property of millions of American citizens.

That’s why we’ve produced our newest online course, “**American Foreign Policy** ,” which is set to be released on August 8.**
**
In this nine-lecture course, Michael Anton, lecturer in politics at Hillsdale College and member of the National Security Council under President Trump, examines people and events that have shaped America’s foreign relations.

By taking this course you’ll discover the principles that guided the foreign policy decisions of the Founders and you’ll explore how those principles were followed or ignored throughout American history, including: America’s westward expansion, the Progressive Era, the two World Wars, the Cold War, the Global War on Terrorism, and today.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: **

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/foreign-policy**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

I hope you’ll join us to discover what has motivated America’s foreign policy decisions—both past and present—and to learn how best to direct it.

Kind regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College**
**

---
| |
---

subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $5 or $10 today. PLEASE give me a chance to explain.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
These goals are not arbitrary made up numbers. They are what we need to win.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate. Now, I don't expect you to donate to every email or text we send, but I do hope you'll contribute in response to this one.
Please give me a chance to explain:
One week from today, we close the books on our July fundraising deadline, and right now we're short of our goals for the month.
Now, the sky isn't falling but there are a few important reasons we need to reach these goals and why I'm asking you to contribute $3 today.
$3 because Kyrsten Sinema has a huge cash-on-hand lead against us right now thanks to the huge sums of money given to her by the wealthy and well-connected -- the people she represents in the Senate.
$3 because Kari Lake increasingly talks about running for Senate and could launch at any time. When she does, we'll have to be ready. Because you never know what to expect from people like her and Trump.
$3 because at any moment, the outside spending could start against us. It's started already at this point in previous Arizona campaigns, and getting caught flat-footed could be devastating.
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for Senate in Arizona? It will all add up fast if everyone chips-in what they can today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230724-1-b&t=1&akid=839%2E734936%2E1sKWli)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi team,

I'm Mondaire Jones and I’m running to flip NY-17. In a moment, I’ll
introduce myself more, but first, I have some exciting news to share:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19004?t=1001&akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9 ]I’m running for Congress. If you’re fired up and ready to flip this
district and take back the House majority, make a donation of $20 to
Charles Booker and my campaign today.

Let me introduce myself and share why I’m running to represent the Hudson
Valley in Congress.

Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for
office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like
me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or
anywhere in America.

But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my
own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we
shocked Washington’s political establishment and won.

I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern
history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription
drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the
infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy,
and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion.

But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting
and political machinations pushed me out of Congress.

For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the
extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday
people. And they have rallied behind a twice-impeached, serially indicted
criminal defendant, Donald Trump, who threatens to further undermine our
democracy.

Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820
votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to
hear, but do whatever Kevin McCarthy and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell
him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And
he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House.

That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19004?t=1002&akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9 ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19004?t=1003&akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9 ]We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden
won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats
are simply not taking back the House in 2024. So we’ve set a huge $500,000
online launch goal to get my campaign off the ground. Split a donation
between my campaign and Charles Booker today.

Here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons
I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here
today.

My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom
struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government
assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and
encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went
from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress.

As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies
we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the
American people, including:

* Lowering the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, even those not
on Medicare
* Codifying Roe v. Wade into law and protecting the freedom to have an
abortion
* Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks to
keep our communities safe
* Defending our democracy from the Republican assault on voting and fair
elections
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts

Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines.

We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders
committed to creating real opportunity for all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19004?t=1004&akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9 ]This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley.
With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the
House majority—are you ready? Watch my launch video, then split a donation
between Charles Booker and my campaign by making a donation of $20 or more
today >>

Let's do this,

Mondaire

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230724-3430-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3430_346206_J_sTc9&akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3430%2E346206%2EJ_sTc9

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: A House Divided
body:
I often hear the comment that our government is too divided. The idea is if the democrats and republicans could just get along and agree a little more we would all be better off. But the truth of the matter, and the only way to save our state and our nation is for our politicians to be more divided. That may sound a little odd to most but let me explain.

In 1858, Abe Lincoln made a speech in Springfield, Missouri, when accepting the Republican Party's nomination for the U.S. Senate. He titled his speech, "A House Divided Against Itself Cannot Stand." Lincoln was referring to the division of slavery states verse non-slavery states and predicted a reconning was coming for our nation.
I often hear that comment about our government today. The idea that if the Democrat and Republican politicians could just get along and agree, we would be better off, but the truth of the matter is that the only way to save our state and our nation is for our politicians to be more divided. That may sound a little odd, but let me explain.
When we watch the news and hear all the fighting and bickering between Republican and Democrat politicians, it takes us back to our days as kids. Most of us remember fighting and bickering with our siblings and our mom telling us to get along. We were taught that compromising and not hogging the favored toy was a better way to live our lives. Then, in Sunday school, we learned to treat others with respect and not selfishly demand our way.
When we watch our politicians and we see them acting like spoiled kids fighting and bickering, we naturally hear our mom's voice say, "Stop all that bickering and get along".
But what we don't realize is that all that bickering is an act. Our problem is not that the politicians are divided; our problem is that they all agree too much.
Just a few months ago, Democrats and Republicans in Congress were arguing and bickering about raising the debt ceiling. The Republicans were demanding we reduce our debt and stop spending money US citizens don't have, and the Democrats were demanding we raise the debt ceiling to an unlimited amount.
What happened?
Speaker McCarthy went to the White House and came back with a deal that raised the debt ceiling. So you may be asking,Why? Because raising the debt ceiling gives them unlimited money to spread around their districts to buy their re-election. That money has gone to Republicans and Democrats. So they never really disagreed. They always wanted the same thing: money for their district on which to base their re-election.
I see it every day in the Mississippi legislature, too. The Democrats and Republicans bicker and argue in public, but they all agree on one main idea. That idea is that the government knows best how to solve your problems. The Republicans aren't fighting for the Republican platform that says you know best how to spend your own money and solve your problems; they believe they should spend your money, and you should listen to them about how to solve your problems. The Republicans and Democrats really only disagree on who gets to spend your money.
So once again, the politicians are in agreement.
But the American people seem more divided than ever, and that is also something they agree on. Both Democrats and Republicans know that as long as they keep the American people angry and divided, they get re-elected. The division among the people gives them something to run on and someone to run against.
In the Mississippi legislature, anyone who refuses to compromise on our Republican Party ideology is hated by the other legislators. When one legislator or a group like the [Mississippi Freedom Caucus](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/feb5a120-270a-40e3-83da-fc42c3261dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) refuses to compromise, it exposes those who have sold out a party principle. When members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus refused to support legislation that raises local taxes, we heard mayors complain that we are "unwilling to work with local leadership" or "they can't get along with the city government officials". What they mean is that we refuse to violate the Republican Party principle of lower taxes. Instead of agreeing, we held to our principles.
The only way to solve this problem is to elect people who believe in the Republican Party platform. We must elect men and women who are willing to fight and even sacrifice their political careers to uphold our ideals and policies. If you hear a candidate say he or she will "work better with local government", or "get along with leadership better," know that they are really saying they are willing to compromise on the principles in which they claim to believe. Your mom may have taught you to get along with others, but she never said to give up your principles just to make a friend or to serve yourself.
The primary election is quickly approaching; August 8 is an important day. We must choose men and women who believe in the Republican Party's ideology and are willing to fight for those ideals.
Check out my list of [qualified candidates](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6d8a5ccd-b3c8-4864-b300-029047ba8d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who will fight for our rights and freedoms.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

clean_body: I often hear the comment that our government is too divided. The idea is if the democrats and republicans could just get along and agree a little more we would all be better off. But the truth of the matter, and the only way to save our state and our nation is for our politicians to be more divided. That may sound a little odd to most but let me explain. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Jul 24 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- In 1858, Abe Lincoln made a speech in Springfield, Missouri, when accepting the Republican Party's nomination for the U.S. Senate. He titled his speech, "A House Divided Against Itself Cannot Stand." Lincoln was referring to the division of slavery states verse non-slavery states and predicted a reconning was coming for our nation. I often hear that comment about our government today. The idea that if the Democrat and Republican politicians could just get along and agree, we would be better off, but the truth of the matter is that the only way to save our state and our nation is for our politicians to be more divided. That may sound a little odd, but let me explain. When we watch the news and hear all the fighting and bickering between Republican and Democrat politicians, it takes us back to our days as kids. Most of us remember fighting and bickering with our siblings and our mom telling us to get along. We were taught that compromising and not hogging the favored toy was a better way to live our lives. Then, in Sunday school, we learned to treat others with respect and not selfishly demand our way. When we watch our politicians and we see them acting like spoiled kids fighting and bickering, we naturally hear our mom's voice say, "Stop all that bickering and get along". But what we don't realize is that all that bickering is an act. Our problem is not that the politicians are divided; our problem is that they all agree too much. Just a few months ago, Democrats and Republicans in Congress were arguing and bickering about raising the debt ceiling. The Republicans were demanding we reduce our debt and stop spending money US citizens don't have, and the Democrats were demanding we raise the debt ceiling to an unlimited amount. What happened? Speaker McCarthy went to the White House and came back with a deal that raised the debt ceiling. So you may be asking,Why? Because raising the debt ceiling gives them unlimited money to spread around their districts to buy their re-election. That money has gone to Republicans and Democrats. So they never really disagreed. They always wanted the same thing: money for their district on which to base their re-election. I see it every day in the Mississippi legislature, too. The Democrats and Republicans bicker and argue in public, but they all agree on one main idea. That idea is that the government knows best how to solve your problems. The Republicans aren't fighting for the Republican platform that says you know best how to spend your own money and solve your problems; they believe they should spend your money, and you should listen to them about how to solve your problems. The Republicans and Democrats really only disagree on who gets to spend your money. So once again, the politicians are in agreement. But the American people seem more divided than ever, and that is also something they agree on. Both Democrats and Republicans know that as long as they keep the American people angry and divided, they get re-elected. The division among the people gives them something to run on and someone to run against. In the Mississippi legislature, anyone who refuses to compromise on our Republican Party ideology is hated by the other legislators. When one legislator or a group like the refuses to compromise, it exposes those who have sold out a party principle. When members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus refused to support legislation that raises local taxes, we heard mayors complain that we are "unwilling to work with local leadership" or "they can't get along with the city government officials". What they mean is that we refuse to violate the Republican Party principle of lower taxes. Instead of agreeing, we held to our principles. The only way to solve this problem is to elect people who believe in the Republican Party platform. We must elect men and women who are willing to fight and even sacrifice their political careers to uphold our ideals and policies. If you hear a candidate say he or she will "work better with local government", or "get along with leadership better," know that they are really saying they are willing to compromise on the principles in which they claim to believe. Your mom may have taught you to get along with others, but she never said to give up your principles just to make a friend or to serve yourself. The primary election is quickly approaching; August 8 is an important day. We must choose men and women who believe in the Republican Party's ideology and are willing to fight for those ideals. Check out my list of who will fight for our rights and freedoms. body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt01o8orpv2sff92jndk45q8lp42litnebpl7hu8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9h62pj4cth2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1rg9lni84hogirn5lqied9vhs49ceq6bg6fthmg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9h62pj4cth2bs)

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z77e1eopc3l9e6n52s20c3h8320obfld9nf6bt50_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9h62pj4cth2bs)

name: Mark Robinson
subject: Can I share a quick story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r "Whether
it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62994025:Jsi7YIINN:m:1:3299561967:CAFD197E3C92A087BF3B640F5E415715:r)
---

Mark Robinson

---
|
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tell=20It=20Like=20It=20Is=20PAC?=
subject: ICYMI: Chris Christie Brings A Whole Lotta Jersey To South Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
ICYMI: Chris Christie Brings A Whole Lotta Jersey To South Carolina | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c51365f562af/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559800?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
**In Case You Missed It: Chris Christie Brings A Whole Lotta Jersey To South Carolina****
** _“Here's Something About Christie: His Answers Were Direct, Detailed, Knowledgeable, And Well-Argued. He's One Of The Most Substantial Candidates In The Race.”_

[Washington Examiner](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=2a333b981d&e=d0a9afa930)
Byron York
July 24, 2023
“Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie has said he will focus his presidential campaign on New Hampshire. It's where the Christie team feels he has the best chance to win and shake up the race for the Republican nomination. But on Friday evening, Christie was in a very different place, the Vista district of Columbia, South Carolina, promising to focus on the Palmetto State as much as New Hampshire. ‘We are going to spend as much time here in South Carolina as we spend in New Hampshire, which is a lot,’ Christie told reporters.
“Christie flew into Columbia to hold a town hall meeting. He chose an event space that his staff filled with about 200 chairs, plus room for the media. (There were a lot of cameras.) The room was virtually filled...
“... They said most of the GOP field, like Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL),and South Carolina's own Nikki Haley and Sen. Tim Scott (R-SC), are walking on eggshells, tiptoeing around the Trump issue because they are afraid to confront it head-on. The reason they like Christie is because he confronts it head-on.
“As much as Christie attacks Trump, he complains that his press coverage is one-dimensional, focusing only on his case against Trump when in fact, he talks about a lot of other issues. He's right: Christie's coverage is mostly one-dimensional, and he does indeed talk about other issues. Christie opened the town hall with a long explanation of why he is running for president. The first reason, he said, is ‘We have to get rid of Joe Biden.’ The second reason is to get rid of Trump.
“Christie makes the standard Republican case against Biden. The president promised to govern as a moderate, Christie said. Instead, ‘he came into office, and he ran as far to the left as he could.’ Biden pushed unheard-of levels of federal spending. He created the ‘worst inflation since the 1970s.’ ‘He stripped away our energy independence,’ Christie continued, and oversaw ‘that awful withdrawal from Afghanistan.’ ...
“Christie can spend a lot of time talking about Trump's various offenses. In Columbia, he was thinking of Trump using campaign contributions to pay for personal legal expenses. ‘It is disgraceful, it's beneath the office he asks for, and that and that alone should disqualify him from being our nominee in 2024,’ Christie said, to audience applause. He was also thinking about Trump's New Jersey casinos going bankrupt. And he was thinking about Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner receiving a $2 billion investment from the Saudis for his private equity firm. "The whole damned family's in on the grift," Christie said. ...
“Christie reinforced the message that a number of audience members told me about the power of Trump over the other Republican candidates. He likes his rivals, Christie said. He doesn't have anything bad to say about them. ‘But here's my problem with them, and the reason I got in: They won't tell you the truth about Donald Trump. They won't do it. They're afraid of him.’ The audience applauded Christie telling them what they already thought. ...
“... You can sometimes tell that a crowd really likes a candidate when question time comes, and they don't really ask questions — they just want to tell him that they feel the same way he does. That's what happened on a number of occasions when Christie opened the floor for questions.
“... Here's something about Christie: His answers were direct, detailed, knowledgeable, and well-argued. He's one of the most substantial candidates in the race. The town hall lasted two hours because he took the time to address questions thoroughly. ...
“... Some Christie supporters in New Jersey have brought their support south.
“It's amazing how much Christie identifies with New Jersey, how much of his identity he seems to take from his home state. He constantly tells people he is from New Jersey; it's his all-purpose way of explaining who he is. In Columbia, he mentioned New Jersey dozens of times, not only to cite his record as governor, but just as often in this way: When Christie is about to say something he thinks is tough, or promise to give it back to anyone who argues with him, or just be contentious, he will say, ‘I should remind you, I am from New Jersey.’ That's his way of saying, I'm about to be obnoxious, but don't take it too seriously. ...”
-###-

|

|
---

clean_body: ICYMI: Chris Christie Brings A Whole Lotta Jersey To South Carolina | | | | | | | In Case You Missed It: Chris Christie Brings A Whole Lotta Jersey To South Carolina “Here's Something About Christie: His Answers Were Direct, Detailed, Knowledgeable, And Well-Argued. He's One Of The Most Substantial Candidates In The Race.” Byron York July 24, 2023 “Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie has said he will focus his presidential campaign on New Hampshire. It's where the Christie team feels he has the best chance to win and shake up the race for the Republican nomination. But on Friday evening, Christie was in a very different place, the Vista district of Columbia, South Carolina, promising to focus on the Palmetto State as much as New Hampshire. ‘We are going to spend as much time here in South Carolina as we spend in New Hampshire, which is a lot,’ Christie told reporters. “Christie flew into Columbia to hold a town hall meeting. He chose an event space that his staff filled with about 200 chairs, plus room for the media. (There were a lot of cameras.) The room was virtually filled... “... They said most of the GOP field, like Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL),and South Carolina's own Nikki Haley and Sen. Tim Scott (R-SC), are walking on eggshells, tiptoeing around the Trump issue because they are afraid to confront it head-on. The reason they like Christie is because he confronts it head-on. “As much as Christie attacks Trump, he complains that his press coverage is one-dimensional, focusing only on his case against Trump when in fact, he talks about a lot of other issues. He's right: Christie's coverage is mostly one-dimensional, and he does indeed talk about other issues. Christie opened the town hall with a long explanation of why he is running for president. The first reason, he said, is ‘We have to get rid of Joe Biden.’ The second reason is to get rid of Trump. “Christie makes the standard Republican case against Biden. The president promised to govern as a moderate, Christie said. Instead, ‘he came into office, and he ran as far to the left as he could.’ Biden pushed unheard-of levels of federal spending. He created the ‘worst inflation since the 1970s.’ ‘He stripped away our energy independence,’ Christie continued, and oversaw ‘that awful withdrawal from Afghanistan.’ ... “Christie can spend a lot of time talking about Trump's various offenses. In Columbia, he was thinking of Trump using campaign contributions to pay for personal legal expenses. ‘It is disgraceful, it's beneath the office he asks for, and that and that alone should disqualify him from being our nominee in 2024,’ Christie said, to audience applause. He was also thinking about Trump's New Jersey casinos going bankrupt. And he was thinking about Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner receiving a $2 billion investment from the Saudis for his private equity firm. "The whole damned family's in on the grift," Christie said. ... “Christie reinforced the message that a number of audience members told me about the power of Trump over the other Republican candidates. He likes his rivals, Christie said. He doesn't have anything bad to say about them. ‘But here's my problem with them, and the reason I got in: They won't tell you the truth about Donald Trump. They won't do it. They're afraid of him.’ The audience applauded Christie telling them what they already thought. ... “... You can sometimes tell that a crowd really likes a candidate when question time comes, and they don't really ask questions — they just want to tell him that they feel the same way he does. That's what happened on a number of occasions when Christie opened the floor for questions. “... Here's something about Christie: His answers were direct, detailed, knowledgeable, and well-argued. He's one of the most substantial candidates in the race. The town hall lasted two hours because he took the time to address questions thoroughly. ... “... Some Christie supporters in New Jersey have brought their support south. “It's amazing how much Christie identifies with New Jersey, how much of his identity he seems to take from his home state. He constantly tells people he is from New Jersey; it's his all-purpose way of explaining who he is. In Columbia, he mentioned New Jersey dozens of times, not only to cite his record as governor, but just as often in this way: When Christie is about to say something he thinks is tough, or promise to give it back to anyone who argues with him, or just be contentious, he will say, ‘I should remind you, I am from New Jersey.’ That's his way of saying, I'm about to be obnoxious, but don't take it too seriously. ...” -###- | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC. name: Giffords.org
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Show your support for community violence intervention programs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Safer communities are within our reach
#

Friends -
The _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ provided $250 million in funding for community violence intervention programs, also known as CVI programs. According to 2019 research from the GIFFORDS Law Center, CVI programs have been proven to reduce homicides by as much as 60 percent.
But in order for community violence intervention programs to work, they must be properly implemented.
[**Will you add your name today to say you support community violence intervention programs as a tool to keep our communities safe from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_cvipetition_july23/?source=em230724-1-30&refcode2=6188.3935704.WG_NEz&akid=6188%2E3935704%2EWG_NEz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_cvipetition_july23/?source=em230724-1-30&refcode2=6188.3935704.WG_NEz&akid=6188%2E3935704%2EWG_NEz)**
CVI programs use strategies to reduce violence by delivering comprehensive services to individuals at the highest risk of engaging in or being victimized by interpersonal violence. Through these programs, trained professionals are able to connect with members of communities and provide them with alternative strategies to resolve conflict, instead of resorting to violence.
The _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ provided the largest investment ever made in community violence intervention programs. Now, we must make sure that the funds are being used to create CVI programs in every community across our country that needs them.
[**Safer communities are within our reach. Will you sign on to support the implementation of community violence intervention programs?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_cvipetition_july23/?source=em230724-1-30&refcode2=6188.3935704.WG_NEz&akid=6188%2E3935704%2EWG_NEz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_cvipetition_july23/?source=em230724-1-30&refcode2=6188.3935704.WG_NEz&akid=6188%2E3935704%2EWG_NEz)**
Thank you. Your support is critical in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6188%2E3935704%2EWG_NEz) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: "Secure the Vote" is a Bad Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tXllCWpgBVTrNzCPN8xJqdpgEE1aEWiZj59_U-cXH_iIurx9LZ1lhJCsqC5Yuruw1bDEKB2jQUetMqrltEajNMPpM_faRjlWREGR9dfjHO5jBVAmIo4GkP68v8QFtkgqsHtTTMxzsPGdt7tIcZJPLzTzGaWhsBcca3l_kppdyrQ=&c=uxcXbRfMEZ_8PR6rZiCUh7R5w6eJ9y9M9oVnWT8kbD4GHhkjotmxrA==&ch=vqHjGy7V7jpdUmcxx5tMhw5yU6y5_PSsMLpnRVjTyA7gQaw2voBAHQ==)
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

As Chairwoman and Founder of the National Election Integrity Caucus I will stand with the people to ensure our elections are safe, fair and transparent. As such I cannot in good conscience support the Governor's plan to "secure the vote" nor can I remain silent. This is a BAD idea.

I do not support trusting the federal postal service with my sacred ballot. Nor should you.
Mailed out ballots are easily "misplaced", lost, not counted, etc.
Even Democrat US Senator Tim Kaine agrees with me. We have issues with our mail. Here's the link to a press release from Senator Kaine's office that came out in May of this year- [Kaine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tXllCWpgBVTrNzCPN8xJqdpgEE1aEWiZj59_U-cXH_iIurx9LZ1lhHJ136cdpz1YmlFHm-oe6uT-jWrh0CnAi6RlP_DTPXwE6US-CTUuQqO2qgcgyYUrVUSETu6FapOWtfSuH0D5-JK39AHeOGJFpYLvCPW59Svd3lLs2jHedwKVZkXBOjSvTtRYsJNM5W8hpFQ-bk16g4YOgZlUtOVRDoNms4u7SYjdHjmEW2ZcPP0y2avQm3y5qQ_V271VBbURG7qqLLMpvra7lkJzgqpER_gPr-hKTIFQgyf1b8s4xSkRql9ThfEihyb0SIaKoclBC-6-iDAbcRqUEt73Yas4Op7-fm-udZuniBWpx1J-GpY=&c=uxcXbRfMEZ_8PR6rZiCUh7R5w6eJ9y9M9oVnWT8kbD4GHhkjotmxrA==&ch=vqHjGy7V7jpdUmcxx5tMhw5yU6y5_PSsMLpnRVjTyA7gQaw2voBAHQ==)[ Presses USPS to Address Mail Delivery Problems in Virginia](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tXllCWpgBVTrNzCPN8xJqdpgEE1aEWiZj59_U-cXH_iIurx9LZ1lhHJ136cdpz1YmlFHm-oe6uT-jWrh0CnAi6RlP_DTPXwE6US-CTUuQqO2qgcgyYUrVUSETu6FapOWtfSuH0D5-JK39AHeOGJFpYLvCPW59Svd3lLs2jHedwKVZkXBOjSvTtRYsJNM5W8hpFQ-bk16g4YOgZlUtOVRDoNms4u7SYjdHjmEW2ZcPP0y2avQm3y5qQ_V271VBbURG7qqLLMpvra7lkJzgqpER_gPr-hKTIFQgyf1b8s4xSkRql9ThfEihyb0SIaKoclBC-6-iDAbcRqUEt73Yas4Op7-fm-udZuniBWpx1J-GpY=&c=uxcXbRfMEZ_8PR6rZiCUh7R5w6eJ9y9M9oVnWT8kbD4GHhkjotmxrA==&ch=vqHjGy7V7jpdUmcxx5tMhw5yU6y5_PSsMLpnRVjTyA7gQaw2voBAHQ==).

Here's another example, from right here in Chesterfield County, as to why I won't be trusting the federal postal service with my sacred vote this November;
"A guilty verdict for the man accused of dumping mail in a Bon Air creek in April. Monday a federal judge convicted 20-year-old Timothy Myrick of obstruction of mail. We also learned this isn't the first time the part-time postal worker failed to deliver." Full story here- [Bon Air mail carrier found guilty of obstruction of mail](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tXllCWpgBVTrNzCPN8xJqdpgEE1aEWiZj59_U-cXH_iIurx9LZ1lhHJ136cdpz1YoTmydhupc00w3ClljISnJvbx3-rIupprQ9jV0fKRZU492B1LiotVSgc4kzjc4s2-81KwXtWp1XZMUkMQZ5mu5mzIIaF0sV8pu9cxD4BjODNTQ0GoeMfzHJ4BdzmTKu5BrakGeq-X5iNHoZAHtEZfrbuv6_PWaSODQrDGyqJvsfn51jhkXaJAjl94i7ro5agTju-TapEGfHlndOaqjmsKun1eoKSx6D12pLMOCh_9EgWhxtHjCH84vrHSMnvS9oUZbNwZERbpoJ-TjmmLW98QOg==&c=uxcXbRfMEZ_8PR6rZiCUh7R5w6eJ9y9M9oVnWT8kbD4GHhkjotmxrA==&ch=vqHjGy7V7jpdUmcxx5tMhw5yU6y5_PSsMLpnRVjTyA7gQaw2voBAHQ==).

Permanent absentee lists are unverifiable year to year. Fairfax County was flooded with bogus absentee ballot applications, full story here- [Fairfax County Flooded With Erroneous Absentee Ballot Applications](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tXllCWpgBVTrNzCPN8xJqdpgEE1aEWiZj59_U-cXH_iIurx9LZ1lhHJ136cdpz1YVSKhH9Xgmvr5TLHAem8xOQku1w5H5I4lzSnbl4KRKl5-IaWxyWiNl3zpVSE3dNsRUhaoYGnY0C7b36PzjES6cgOUxXmgnd8FvT3iKJcGG0JwWf00Sg_2G9wxo6g7RUG6U9mQszoQa1pxBzJnrsZpE1eDsrMBI6TD5gh9v5jcvNCrtQ29OkPWdY6MX6FNifxJC06xDsT8dgfB9qdRmQcr2Fa6FrW1Y0cT_PpitT-o-6GyZmup5Niwi-SX8LB7XYNHxYJXlnDgDm0DN7MzASE-RQ4ecvGWXYbpj98J4NM3mn7MtB02nWf7TQ==&c=uxcXbRfMEZ_8PR6rZiCUh7R5w6eJ9y9M9oVnWT8kbD4GHhkjotmxrA==&ch=vqHjGy7V7jpdUmcxx5tMhw5yU6y5_PSsMLpnRVjTyA7gQaw2voBAHQ==).

The Governor just wants to get more people to vote early. I get it, but it could bite both ways.

I continue to support a bill I introduced called the Voter Confidence Restoration Act which would require a photo ID to vote, eliminate absentee ballot boxes that have zero chain of custody and eliminate the permanent absentee voter list. They don't even allow this practice in 3rd world countries because of the increased risk of fraud. Mailing in a ballot is trusting the federal postal service with your sacred ballot.

Voting in advance only emboldens the globalists who want to install candidates, instead of electing them.

We the People support in-person voting and requiring a photo ID to do so.
Republicans should stop this defeatist attitude of "if you can't beat them join them" and fight to protect our sacred elections. The Democrats took the safeguards off of our Virginia elections back in 2020 and Republicans should remain committed to restoring those guardrails. Period.

What's next? Voting by phone?

The absurdity needs to end now.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

body:
But the Democrats are already plotting to stop our movement...
| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7860087738b946dda119bd579da36231&_e=uzyaKeWanB__ypdVdHkvEzGxz8IWROKgzq6412T1D6hcEO4T6MV6zrxX1-UxaqFb2r1JhAaghMq4w12vOrzzLveqsxMwZixtbB3izAo11RRH5dMLgsArZvsxGcqLCWi1Hil3LAjJdlvSxNGg58IopomkIWS4_K_-MH2GHEGuaebDZ5GFSP6TAv6QPnKzv3avNRzMmURF1yPWv5sIhmu_hl4qPm2X_KBqioj6xoEVd94GVDEBSkQUM4Qd_xmKH5QJodXTRqEWUlEVCdT6sLZL7tR_atgANy93-rRQhiG7n0FFlvo-SCHfYHil3d4S2CbpR6eNGrtHLJK4MI2JrnOoswKRtxFPFx_aMWAY8YMRd-rwhbmln3svmrj3yL9AIx80f-ToYFByW3fLIzM-2UeyKsw51DGn9NXYpR3TkUzVyUppsBv4PDPwoPUgNIhL2qz3mRC5V-GhMS1Z0ZPvNsXWRHIbNSV3jZlmqpJrtyBWlWs%3D)
---
Friend,
---
With the 2024 election right around the corner, now is the time to take _**ACTION**_ and restore public confidence in America’s elections.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7860087738b946dda119bd579da36231&_e=uzyaKeWanB__ypdVdHkvEzGxz8IWROKgzq6412T1D6hcEO4T6MV6zrxX1-UxaqFb2r1JhAaghMq4w12vOrzzLveqsxMwZixtbB3izAo11RRH5dMLgsArZvsxGcqLCWi1Hil3LAjJdlvSxNGg58IopomkIWS4_K_-MH2GHEGuaebDZ5GFSP6TAv6QPnKzv3avNRzMmURF1yPWv5sIhmu_hl4qPm2X_KBqioj6xoEVd94GVDEBSkQUM4Qd_xmKH5QJodXTRqEWUlEVCdT6sLZL7tR_atgANy93-rRQhiG7n0FFlvo-SCHfYHil3d4S2CbppdLYOGDZU8rvYX13uGYX-YnDtaXInvLXbNMIvu7GNxTgieHcyjn17psrB4C-ea4uN571ClPljJLIz-hRFf22MytAeZxMdV49NIy5HkjqeIgLv-cGtu1Vbae0uVUQ630YHwY5AIK0QI9X8ghjBXNtxFEbZMKnK61kXRz5XV7uI-A%3D)
---
_Source: Fox News_
---
**Americans know better than most that talk is cheap. Here is what our election integrity initiative is looking to accomplish:**
---
* **Require Voter ID **
* **Stop noncitizens from voting in American elections**
* **Remove deceased voters from voter rolls **
* **Expand resources for overseas military members to vote**

---
These are common sense principles that the vast majority of Americans can get behind. They would strengthen election integrity by making it _**easier to vote, but hard to cheat.**_
---
**With that being said, the Democrats are already unifying in OPPOSITION to our initiative.**
---
**But my Republican colleagues and I are not backing down, even though the Left is already coming for us.**
---
_We need your support to advance voter integrity and push through the Left’s opposition._
---
**[Please consider making a donation and support our fight for common-sense election reform in the United States.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7860087738b946dda119bd579da36231&_e=uzyaKeWanB__ypdVdHkvEzGxz8IWROKgzq6412T1D6hcEO4T6MV6zrxX1-UxaqFb2r1JhAaghMq4w12vOrzzLveqsxMwZixtbB3izAo11RRH5dMLgsArZvsxGcqLCWi1Hil3LAjJdlvSxNGg58IopomkIWS4_K_-MH2GHEGuaebDZ5GFSP6TAv6QPnKzv3avNRzMmURF1yPWv5sIhmu_hl4qPm2X_KBqioj6xoEVd94GVDEBSkQUM4Qd_xmKH5QJodXTRqEWUlEVCdT6sLZL7tR_atgANy93-rRQhiG7n0FFlvo-SCHfYHil3d4S2Cbps-_o1kMixsb7fxDYtrb3drj9HZ00fcm3NQEEQAjtFmpYuuxm4Dz81upyzHXO0wvNCoBhA72t6QVcJaVv7GDPQw0sMUZBoHi8kxDoH6XfBIb0OVPkr15Dhy5oTXUKzj64BOy1Z5iKfkrohVJVvpuhTweDZuCBET7paAPW1c2wfyc%3D)**
---

clean_body: But the Democrats are already plotting to stop our movement... | Friend, With the 2024 election right around the corner, now is the time to take ACTION and restore public confidence in America’s elections. Source: Fox News Americans know better than most that talk is cheap. Here is what our election integrity initiative is looking to accomplish: Require Voter ID Stop noncitizens from voting in American elections Remove deceased voters from voter rolls Expand resources for overseas military members to vote These are common sense principles that the vast majority of Americans can get behind. They would strengthen election integrity by making it easier to vote, but hard to cheat. With that being said, the Democrats are already unifying in OPPOSITION to our initiative. But my Republican colleagues and I are not backing down, even though the Left is already coming for us. We need your support to advance voter integrity and push through the Left’s opposition. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Zak Malamed
subject: My work to defeat MAGA extremists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to tell you about the organization I started, The Next 50, and the work we did to defeat extreme MAGA candidates across the country.
#
I want to tell you about the organization I started, The Next 50, and the work we did to defeat extreme MAGA candidates across the country.
[**But if you do not have time to read and you already know you want to support the next generation of Democratic leaders in Congress, will you pitch in to support my campaign against George Santos?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230724?refcode=em20230724&amount=5&refcode2=338_8507__vlRcO&akid=338%2E8507%2E_vlRcO)
**Back in 2019, the future of our democracy looked pretty uncertain**. Donald Trump and his allies were in power all over the country, and I knew that if we were going to defeat them, we needed to build a pipeline of next-generation leaders we could support well into the future – just as Republicans have done for the last 50 years.
That is why I started The Next 50, an organization that worked to identify the next generation of Democratic leaders, invest in their campaigns, and start winning back power wherever we could.
At The Next 50, we made it our mission to take on MAGA extremists wherever we saw the opportunity. **And we won big** : In 2020, Democrats took back the Senate, flipped state legislatures across the country, and elected Joe Biden as president. At The Next 50, we invested in some of the most consequential races and won 80 percent of them.
**But then, last year, MAGA extremism hit home in a way I never expected**. When George Santos won in NY-03, it felt like a cruel joke – I had just spent so much time and effort defeating all these extreme Republicans across the country, and now the community I grew up in was represented by one.
It was obvious I had to do something. **So, I jumped into the race** – and I have not looked back.
I am proud of The Next 50’s work to cultivate the next generation of Democratic leadership and I am proud of the campaign we are building to defeat George Santos today. **But the truth is I cannot do any of it alone****.**
[**We know Republicans are going to spend big to defend this seat, so I am counting on your support to build a campaign that will have the resources to stop them and flip NY-03 back to blue. Will you pitch in any amount you can today to help us do it?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230724?refcode=em20230724&amount=5&refcode2=338_8507__vlRcO&akid=338%2E8507%2E_vlRcO)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230724?amount=5&refcode=em20230724&refcode2=338_8507__vlRcO&akid=338%2E8507%2E_vlRcO)**
Thank you,
Zak Malamed
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=338%2E8507%2E_vlRcO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=338%2E8507%2E_vlRcO)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Team Andrei
subject: The GOP just posted HUGE fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Here’s how we fight back →

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66961512/418177836/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE4MmIyM2MtMzcyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u9Q6a7iMOARbU6SO7i123zwSsjCHoXYHAt4kiFt9Wrc=) Team – here is what you need to know:

**First,** the National Republican Congressional Committee, the main GOP group dedicated to keeping the speaker’s gavel in Kevin McCarthy’s hands, just announced a record-breaking fundraising haul: **$51 million so far this year.**

body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF0RzGRLTNdlVRSgfie7iFnYOqKDE1AhzdVdFsNbbxZqx3qtK5Xvn7z0Bd9R5-_nNiFxInNOipn2Fs6iXYWsdDgDAV1yJ8_kFdaqXMy_rXARxqEBg2Ru0GlZAGqWbag5kjPZqpMJOEpiEJDQIHT1EVWZg%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF0BrJ1g3S8UDOkftvDSF1G6EFHJNNr1HUED-ForLGnfSd0qAz-SKidpP7yihj7Lo11hCaVC2tY6Gt50boCIzhraN2fdy3bd9d1bPmVIu2hvxfvL5JW0U_Qqy_vsseOACf64tl_PpBapjq5oZ_w_yZpww%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF0PmYu2aP0pXinhHLAwzuJgYJ-fLFXi3-wYl9eDQX0k4BZkAS96EjKZVvdi8BXe812QrwEMp-mlBTkdm3cm4uULAmXBBwXFFlDaWFnSDeL3Ne7npVuMHT7qbwudli2L19UcciaRuNSTCzLxVng5p589Q%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF07w7kKjPoXRTf1wJynuYbSrdTSyn5GSvO19u2LkoibqutvkoZ_15n4lQFf8ngjypQt0X4bfw79Z-gdRP8S8-uXR5M-AskEMY1QJjJSxynT0w6zdS2RqLPnWPc3oKXIzqgnOFT8gHa-J-wAZkZYVswUw%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF05ouxZd4AlQfLtRHjcytCgXFivlQ-FseskmDNNwZoU1ITa8HIPWcf0kdUmP58c4PdIN3XcHn_SnLkZM1EQI-bTqL8up65Qbf99uGTFevIDbRmIrPcCudMYrv1TOiiwWtoJi-9Fhn0jGljSrXFen2DZA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF0M__6FkequNclFdD9040fBsyY29t-TBUM_2NNPKk6q6IkuCfL98bP8-lEuqU4mDHf7d0LbLa00G0MZymmeUw42nS8XFynfBSzQ33HP7YooM1_cDk16MmLw1oKEi9V7jowWuAbnQTCzHsViPnSFoQPAA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89db7e3fd1ea43fd97f1a2126004c6e5&_e=7JeLcSrFdS4qDiNtIVWYDDeTsp6iUJXn8t55c9THaWN4fzdFkwA3VUS4mfESBxN_xcyBEAF-7im88QUNQw2eL9Xq6T7D-uaSZWmazWtZYDwegsTQhoifPZaE8-itbTBStL_jYt-4TkdzO8BS7jmVJN3jNr5-DGKCPX3rE5HBLnKybZaEsKZZNHKnImJQH0nICBXghfeLcB5ogygP-7huLbpcbhbD7VyNEPmMVHvRPlZ8mKQxBdyQRf9vLVNFlBF04JARCUYxeBULbFxHhtLT-xgxGsUK6NHoL-TAhhxwjw6m5XNk4MjfRfhtOTrQIyNUC92YW6KFDtBpdQx20MusxuQY95_dG7JYW8sUTVb4p0Jc3Q2UywhMClxT8UYtl-QiqnM2JCFOBfENh5qhlQyTYw%3D%3D)

---

---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Happy Pioneer Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today is one of my family’s favorite holidays. It is also an opportunity to commemorate pioneers–new and old–who are trailblazing new paths. | | | | |
---
# Happy Pioneer Day!
|
---
Team Becky,
Happy Pioneer Day! Today is one of my family’s favorite holidays. It’s an opportunity to remember the bravery and sacrifice of pioneers who came to Utah in search of the promise of religious freedom.
It is also an opportunity to commemorate pioneers–new and old–who are trailblazing new paths for our state and our country.
As I hear your stories on the campaign trail, I’m amazed by the pioneers I meet every day. From St. George to Bountiful, in every corner of this district, I’m deeply inspired by the thoughtfulness and ingenuity I encounter.
However you celebrate, I hope that today gives you the opportunity to reflect on the pioneers in your life. And, as always, enjoy the fireworks!
Becky

|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f49a288df2&e=6484bb6dd5)

| | | Hi Friend, it’s Troy. There’s a lot of hot air here in Washington, D.C., so I wanted to make sure you knew I don’t just _‘talk about it’_ , I’m like you ... I DO SOMETHING ABOUT IT! The Washington Woke and their buddies are going broke, and I’m happy to have been leading the charge. I’ve included a couple snippets of how your support has emboldened our shared fight against woke-socialist sympathizers across the country:
---
|
---
_– “Rep. Troy E. Nehls Demands Answers from Target and Remove All LGBT Merchandise for Children”_
---

**_– “EXCLUSIVE —_** _Republican members of Congress are pressing_** _President Joe Biden's State Department_** _for answers after the Washington Examiner revealed the agency handed taxpayer dollars to a Colombian LGBT nonprofit group that_** _engages in prostitution advocacy ... _** _**Rep. Troy Nehls (R-TX)**__ and three GOP members are demanding Secretary of State Antony Blinken provide clarity on whether **public funds were used to ‘ further prostitution’** and are concerned the grant "will contribute to the spread of sexual exploitation" we already know the problems on our southern border thanks to the democrats open door policy..._
---

**GOVERNMENT-FUNDED PROSTITUTION!** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/ea00ea0bfa1d0e88/3bf94b8195eb02bec3d6b838967d376c/35193)

body:

# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=377%2E791427%2EzMbodv)

👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters -
Please don't click away or scroll past this — not yet. Yes, we're reaching out to ask you to make a contribution. But please give us a chance to explain why.

As you probably already know, Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the same way a lot of her colleagues in Congress do.
No shady super PACs. No maxout checks from corporate lobbyists. The only way we're sending Ilhan back to Congress is together — that means lots and lots of people chipping in what they can.

Our average contribution so far this year is $18.95. In fact, over 99% of donations to our campaign this cycle have been under $50.
These numbers are a testament to the grassroots strength of our campaign. We're extremely proud of them — and we hope you are too.

Meanwhile...our opponents can't say the same thing. In this campaign, we're going to be going toe-to-toe with the far right and potentially _millions_ of dollars in outside dark money.

**Building a grassroots organization that can fight back and win the way we do takes lots and lots of contributions from lots and lots of people...and that's why we have to ask:**
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3, $10, or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan today? We wouldn't ask if your financial support weren't so important to our campaign's success.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230724-1-t2&t=2&akid=377%2E791427%2EzMbodv)**

subject: FW: FEAR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...

As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...
| | Friend,
---
After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about...
**_... FEAR. _**
The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for _LIFE_ for your beliefs.
The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.
And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target.
Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts.
But the truth is, they _do_ bother me - _not because I 'm worried about my own fate, **but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. **_
Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers.
And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
_But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... _
**... No, _OUR_ MAGA Movement is more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots who REFUSE to even flinch in the face of tyranny! **

# [Ron DeSantis and his PAC Appear to Have Purchased an Iowa Endorsement, But Will Bribery Be Enough To Resurrect His Campaign?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=135399519&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1Mzk5NTE5LCJpYXQiOjE2OTAyMTUwNzEsImV4cCI6MTY5MjgwNzA3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85txHws3sQuIByFUbYMGnUHtsXjq9Sxnl38DpQs5A9k)
### Did Ron DeSantis bribe an anti-Trump, Iowa conservative figure for his support in the 2024 GOP primary?
| | [Laura Loomer](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e34fe980-d9c9-4261-a552-586a119e2539?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jul 24
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e34fe980-d9c9-4261-a552-586a119e2539?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=135399519&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1Mzk5NTE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5MDIxNTA3MSwiZXhwIjoxNjkyODA3MDcxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTEyMzc0MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rQtweWMNimSl-szyl-DynWphy3PK2wpwQm-vTR9hA3g&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=135399519&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1Mzk5NTE5LCJpYXQiOjE2OTAyMTUwNzEsImV4cCI6MTY5MjgwNzA3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85txHws3sQuIByFUbYMGnUHtsXjq9Sxnl38DpQs5A9k&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.._2GWCOTx0LUKsggEsjTvhkatB3UFIRjndeSjoMFYos4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=135399519&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1Mzk5NTE5LCJpYXQiOjE2OTAyMTUwNzEsImV4cCI6MTY5MjgwNzA3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85txHws3sQuIByFUbYMGnUHtsXjq9Sxnl38DpQs5A9k)
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/03eda695-732b-4a14-9014-95cce3ce8894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary. Your subscription for a nominal fee supports my journalistic efforts, and the expenses associated with my investigations. If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..u-vGiQeXP613QLzXTRedp3ZvHrCOhcRwV6nviIX-rIw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=135399519)
Despite trailing in every poll reported by Five Thirty Eight, failing Presidential candidate Ron DeSantis appears to not be giving up on trying to win Iowa. He recently received the endorsement of Bob Vander Plaats, President and CEO of The Family Leader, a socially conservative organization in Iowa. Vander Plaats has a history of working against Donald Trump, having [endorsed Ted Cruz](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a2b3bdf8-5f3e-4861-9f45-401e457f021e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for President in 2015. In 2020, Vander Plaats, who has unsuccessfully run for Governor of Iowa three times (2002, 2006, 2010) [invited Democrat candidates](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ba6a72c6-69f9-4ca6-9c36-873694cd8291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speak in front of his organization, but not Donald Trump.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/768e6dc0-8a68-4d73-8142-2c0f0b965794?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/89302968-ba3b-4a85-97f1-7ca4505a9b10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In a [July 14th interview with CBS News](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8f2eb315-09b6-4eaa-85bb-f2ccc465af75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Vander Plaats claimed that Ron DeSantis was the "clear alternative" to President Trump. Interestingly enough, Vander Plaats remarks were made just days after his organization, The Family Leader received a substantial donation from Never Back Down, a national Super PAC created for the purpose of getting Ron DeSantis elected as President. Federal Election Commission reports show a donation in the amount of $50,000 was completed on 7/3/2023.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/eb132497-00e6-41c9-b91f-7a8d84e8eabf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Vander Plaats told CBS news that "if Trump wins Iowa, that's it" but "if he gets beat here, then I think whoever beats him here, it's 'game on' [for] the nomination." It appears that Vander Plaats is willing to do whatever is within his means to make sure that Donald Trump doesn't win Iowa.
Unlike Governor Kim Reynolds, who said she will remain neutral in the primary, Vander Plaats told CBS that he plans to endorse a candidate in December, ahead of the mid-January Iowa caucuses, and he indicated that Trump was unlikely to receive his support.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..u-vGiQeXP613QLzXTRedp3ZvHrCOhcRwV6nviIX-rIw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=135399519)
"My fear is too much of American has made up their mind on the former president. They want a new generational leader," Vander Plaats said. "For me, I do believe it is probably time that we turn the page."
In addition to the five figure exchange of funds for Vander Plaats support, which increasingly looks like a financial bribe, Never Back Down [continues to invest big](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/719a1095-d6c4-4e09-94c6-9e5913b0493c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Iowa on other fronts. According to multiple reports, the Super PAC recently completed a 7 figure ad buy across Iowa to attack Donald Trump. However, their ad was not as well received as they had hoped it would be. One of their ads features a fake Trump's voice that was [generated by Artificial Intelligence](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/63514380-6e63-4e51-a5d5-12d138c42e1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (AI). It uses a robotic Trump voice to read from Trump's previous Truth Social Posts. The ad focuses on a [Truth Social Post ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bc46b101-0b6f-41a9-9ebb-11a79dfe2762?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in which President Trump criticizes Governor Reynolds for being "Neutral" in the primary.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8ba390b1-220c-4017-bf47-f64a21ccf741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to [ reports](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/32891cd7-2025-4599-8e69-469353d34009?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), DeSantis claims he is willing to consider Iowa governor Kim Reynolds as his running mate. One thing is for sure, Ron DeSantis and Never Back Down appear to be willing to spend whatever cash or political capital is required in order to be competitive in Iowa. And it is also clear that they are trying to purchase endorsements and support via financial bribes that are disguised as donations.
Vander Plaats has a clear history of opposition to Donald Trump. Ron DeSantis has a track record of spending money where needed to gain political favor, so perhaps these two merely developed an organic relationship. But, knowing DeSantis's record and his inability to connect with people on an interpersonal level, as he has demonstrated throughout his campaign, it is more likely that his support is bought and paid for, just like he is. The donation of $50,000 to Vander Plaats' organization in return for his support and praise isn't the only financial transaction associated with DeSantis's presidential campaign that is raising eyebrows.
As I exclusively reported, days after Paul Renner, the Florida Speaker of the House passed the amendment to Florida's Resign to Run law, an amendment which allowed for DeSantis to run for President and keep his job as Governor, $1 million was transferred from Ron DeSantis's PAC to a newly created PAC overseen by Renner called "Empower Parents Florida PAC". Given the timing of the transfer, and the fact that DeSantis's PAC was shuttered shortly after the transfer, the $1 million payout to Renner looks like a bribe paid out by DeSantis's PAC in exchange for Renner overseeing the change of the Florida law that otherwise would have prevented DeSantis from running for President.
## [How Ron DeSantis Deceptively Raised and Weaponized Millions Of Dollars From Trump Supporters To Change FL Election Laws, Pay Off FL's Speaker of The House, & Attack Donald Trump](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ac03a445-8e99-48b4-a9c8-4920b31e3c7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Laura Loomer](https://substack.com/profile/105171081-laura-loomer)| | *
---|---|---
| Jul 10
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ac03a445-8e99-48b4-a9c8-4920b31e3c7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political c...](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ac03a445-8e99-48b4-a9c8-4920b31e3c7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ac03a445-8e99-48b4-a9c8-4920b31e3c7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While it is impossible to say with certainty whether or not the $50,000 payment to Vander Plaats' organization was a bribe for an endorsement, it certainly looks that way, and it is most definitely a bad look for Never Back Down and the Ron DeSantis for President campaign, both of which have previously been accused of violating Federal election and campaign finance laws.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8a844b36-3f45-4963-9208-ea77f81a32dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
DeSantis and his PAC appear to believe that flushing Iowa with millions of dollars of cash is going to be enough to make DeSantis win the highly anticipated Iowa Caucus. However, all of the money in the world will never be enough to buy DeSantis what he is lacking and is in desperate need of: a personality.
Despite DeSantis's multi-million dollar TV ad buy and door knocking operation in Iowa, the most recent polling shows President Trump has a nearly 30 point lead over DeSantis in Iowa, proving that Donald Trump is the favored candidate for GOP primary voters in Iowa.
Perhaps Never Back Down would have been better off saving their $50,000 instead of using it to buy political favor through Vander Plaats, a triple failed candidate for Iowa Governor.
If the people of Iowa rejected him three times once before, why would they embrace his choice for the GOP nominee for President in 2024?
Then again, political strategy doesn't appear to be DeSantis's strong suit. If he had any political insight to begin with, he would have never committed political suicide by filing to run for President against Donald Trump in the GOP primary.

Did Ron DeSantis bribe an anti-Trump, Iowa conservative figure for his support in the 2024 GOP primary? | | | Jul 24 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NOTE: Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political commentary.
