If you don 't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today! Despite trailing in every poll reported by Five Thirty Eight, failing Presidential candidate Ron DeSantis appears to not be giving up on trying to win Iowa. He recently received the endorsement of Bob Vander Plaats, President and CEO of The Family Leader, a socially conservative organization in Iowa. Vander Plaats has a history of working against Donald Trump, having for President in 2015. In 2020, Vander Plaats, who has unsuccessfully run for Governor of Iowa three times (2002, 2006, 2010) to speak in front of his organization, but not Donald Trump. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- In a , Vander Plaats claimed that Ron DeSantis was the "clear alternative" to President Trump. Interestingly enough, Vander Plaats remarks were made just days after his organization, The Family Leader received a substantial donation from Never Back Down, a national Super PAC created for the purpose of getting Ron DeSantis elected as President. Federal Election Commission reports show a donation in the amount of $50,000 was completed on 7/3/2023. | | ---|---|--- Vander Plaats told CBS news that "if Trump wins Iowa, that's it" but "if he gets beat here, then I think whoever beats him here, it's 'game on' [for] the nomination." It appears that Vander Plaats is willing to do whatever is within his means to make sure that Donald Trump doesn't win Iowa. Unlike Governor Kim Reynolds, who said she will remain neutral in the primary, Vander Plaats told CBS that he plans to endorse a candidate in December, ahead of the mid-January Iowa caucuses, and he indicated that Trump was unlikely to receive his support. "My fear is too much of American has made up their mind on the former president. They want a new generational leader," Vander Plaats said. "For me, I do believe it is probably time that we turn the page." In addition to the five figure exchange of funds for Vander Plaats support, which increasingly looks like a financial bribe, Never Back Down in Iowa on other fronts. According to multiple reports, the Super PAC recently completed a 7 figure ad buy across Iowa to attack Donald Trump. However, their ad was not as well received as they had hoped it would be. One of their ads features a fake Trump's voice that was (AI). It uses a robotic Trump voice to read from Trump's previous Truth Social Posts. The ad focuses on a which President Trump criticizes Governor Reynolds for being "Neutral" in the primary. | | ---|---|--- According to , DeSantis claims he is willing to consider Iowa governor Kim Reynolds as his running mate. One thing is for sure, Ron DeSantis and Never Back Down appear to be willing to spend whatever cash or political capital is required in order to be competitive in Iowa. And it is also clear that they are trying to purchase endorsements and support via financial bribes that are disguised as donations. Vander Plaats has a clear history of opposition to Donald Trump. Ron DeSantis has a track record of spending money where needed to gain political favor, so perhaps these two merely developed an organic relationship. But, knowing DeSantis's record and his inability to connect with people on an interpersonal level, as he has demonstrated throughout his campaign, it is more likely that his support is bought and paid for, just like he is. The donation of $50,000 to Vander Plaats' organization in return for his support and praise isn't the only financial transaction associated with DeSantis's presidential campaign that is raising eyebrows. As I exclusively reported, days after Paul Renner, the Florida Speaker of the House passed the amendment to Florida's Resign to Run law, an amendment which allowed for DeSantis to run for President and keep his job as Governor, $1 million was transferred from Ron DeSantis's PAC to a newly created PAC overseen by Renner called "Empower Parents Florida PAC". Given the timing of the transfer, and the fact that DeSantis's PAC was shuttered shortly after the transfer, the $1 million payout to Renner looks like a bribe paid out by DeSantis's PAC in exchange for Renner overseeing the change of the Florida law that otherwise would have prevented DeSantis from running for President. | | | | * ---|---|--- | Jul 10 | While it is impossible to say with certainty whether or not the $50,000 payment to Vander Plaats' organization was a bribe for an endorsement, it certainly looks that way, and it is most definitely a bad look for Never Back Down and the Ron DeSantis for President campaign, both of which have previously been accused of violating Federal election and campaign finance laws. | | ---|---|--- DeSantis and his PAC appear to believe that flushing Iowa with millions of dollars of cash is going to be enough to make DeSantis win the highly anticipated Iowa Caucus. Perhaps Never Back Down would have been better off saving their $50,000 instead of using it to buy political favor through Vander Plaats, a triple failed candidate for Iowa Governor. name: Taking the Hill
subject: Vets Take the Hill
body:
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]
Help Vets Take the Hill
The 2024 election is 479 days away, and veteran candidates around the country have begun fundraising their campaigns.
At Taking the Hill, we believe in the power of service and the courage of those who have selflessly served our nation. Today, we are proud to highlight the importance of supporting veteran candidates running for office and invite you to see our endorsed 2024 candidates on our website [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/candidates] .
Veterans bring unique perspectives, strong leadership skills, and a deep commitment to our country’s values. Their experiences defending our freedom on the frontline make them highly capable in shaping policies that impact national security, veterans’ rights, and the well-being of our communities.
By electing veteran candidates, we ensure that voices informed by sacrifice and service are heard in the halls of Congress.
Your support can make a difference.
Consider making a donation to these veteran candidates’ campaigns; your contribution can help fund critical campaign affairs and get us closer to electing more talented and dedicated veterans into office.
Check out TTH PAC’s endorsed candidates [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/candidates] and consider making a lasting impact [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill] by donating to their campaigns.
Yours in the fight,
Taking the Hill
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takingthehill]

name: Ben Wikler
subject: We’ll think back to this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
This map shows Wisconsin could very well be the tipping point state.
#
[**I’m about to ask you to split a $5 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run today. Monthly donors give our organization the consistent resources we need to get ahead of fire drills and far-right extremism.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=1&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
**But let me explain the stakes with a hypothetical:** In 2024, the Republican presidential candidate has an early lead in Wisconsin but thousands of absentee ballots have yet to be counted. The rest of the nation watches, waiting for Wisconsin to determine the outcome of another presidential race.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=2&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
Then, for whatever reason, the nation is waiting on the electoral votes in Wisconsin to call the entire presidential election. There could be a scenario where GOP officials and far-right pundits alike push to call the election for the Republican candidate as extreme as Ron DeSantis or Donald Trump.
**Our entire team would be on high alert.**
Our organizing and analytics teams would be hard at work crunching the numbers and determining whose votes could be jeopardized.
Our political and voter protection teams would build the case to reject hasty rulings and make sure every single vote is counted before hastily calling an election.
Our communications team would spread the message far and wide, brief me on how to best message this moment, and help Democrats best advocate to count all votes.
Our digital team would amplify all of this important work and send messages directly to the Wisconsin voters affected.
**If we fail, folks nationwide would watch in despair.** _You and I would think back to 2023 where we had a chance to prepare for every obstacle the far-right would throw our way._
_We can’t risk a scenario like this playing out._ The bottom line is election-winning operations are not built in one single moment before an election. They’re enduring movements that need continued resources and investment. **To be honest, we’re short of our monthly donor goals and we’ll only hit them with the help of dedicated Democrats like you reading this scenario.**
[**You have an opportunity to make sure the worst case scenario doesn’t happen on election night in Wisconsin. Can you split a $5 donation between WisDems and The Long Run? Your support helps us keep the White House blue and elect Democrats up and down the ballot >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=3&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically evenly split between The Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run PAC_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.swMvtB&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=22&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.DT_zdK&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=23&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.zkrtZA&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=24&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.B1zxC_&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=25&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.jgEQ-M&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=26&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230724-1-t1&t=27&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)
Thank you.
Ben Wikler
Chair, WisDems

We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW). Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=4673%2E196590%2EoIGgKW)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: #RaiseTheWage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's been 14 years since the last federal minimum wage increase, and Americans deserve more.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66964654/418190019/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRjNWRmYzUtM2UyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZOmYqjY6h2ArOGvI6gnv67-Tk9GHJqtWBdmbsOOOkYo=&emci=f60efa85-2c2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=e4c5dfc5-3e2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=3595835)

Peter —

Today marks __14 years__ since the last federal minimum wage increase. In those 14 years, folks across the country have felt the squeeze of rising costs.

Here’s what we know. We know that **$7.25 per hour is not a living wage.** We know that when folks have better wages, they have more money in their pockets and can shop at their local businesses – and that benefits everyone in the economy. And we know that raising the minimum wage is a powerful way to grow the economy from the middle out.

**[If you agree with Derek that a minimum wage increase is long overdue, sign our petition on today's anniversary of the last federal minimum wage increase.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66964655/418190020/-2078491547?ms=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=MJpMOYWWnA/1aurDyks5yHahR+b0VUrqqF4ub5Hbb/UXlf9g51Rq+JUn8p63tLS84P+4aO8bvGTcX7AZylPqhUUYFt19jLcoQrMBizKkaM3fzHgyfXrtq/yLcCleyFCy+Ufdja+yirVXAW9iMBx3tVdDlyFa7KjVccHeZjhE3io=&refcode2=e4c5dfc5-3e2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRjNWRmYzUtM2UyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZOmYqjY6h2ArOGvI6gnv67-Tk9GHJqtWBdmbsOOOkYo=&emci=f60efa85-2c2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=e4c5dfc5-3e2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=3595835)**

Peter, the idea of raising the minimum wage is plain common sense.

That's why Derek is a proud original cosponsor of legislation that will raise the federal minimum wage for working Americans. Derek is fighting tirelessly for workers' rights and for an economy that works for everyone.

**[Sign on today if you agree it's time we #RaiseTheWage.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66964656/418190021/-2078491547?ms=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230724_MWP_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=MJpMOYWWnA/1aurDyks5yHahR+b0VUrqqF4ub5Hbb/UXlf9g51Rq+JUn8p63tLS84P+4aO8bvGTcX7AZylPqhUUYFt19jLcoQrMBizKkaM3fzHgyfXrtq/yLcCleyFCy+Ufdja+yirVXAW9iMBx3tVdDlyFa7KjVccHeZjhE3io=&refcode2=e4c5dfc5-3e2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRjNWRmYzUtM2UyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZOmYqjY6h2ArOGvI6gnv67-Tk9GHJqtWBdmbsOOOkYo=&emci=f60efa85-2c2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=e4c5dfc5-3e2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=3595835)**

Team Kilmer

subject: Do you think George Soros is an American patriot?

body:
You’ve got to see this video...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f7a0e040771e4edb8abcf899a679dc90&_e=3PgJMGDUpHNNwiRgyOH5BGX-lKJvJ068OSvq1udi9w2D7149CQC2B1NOjYruncb9r_eQe-iNPCQv92iJXkPfgQQNLIpMAGGjIomLgx8JFkL85RRijBgqjXUmuQTwrQwrizgP40V-BbnRZgz-FVOIBSCfPJCGITH4NSarEIGbnvwB3HgEC5YslGPlMTGcPpUVha8zEQ_iSp3xKCNlgqRfmjvbbBc31iNxem_qURqs7cGZgIYWK318D-mF__Hc-gmxgITO3CRt5wak8nANBjaJLXvbyUW7Db70pC7r9_9DkBX7vXvaXwWYZFo4WwrjdRLVw5XBdpgxQR4EI1S91tydNw5THYobGHLW37eOYdV0nJZMbgeM3TQHgKx05Y9Ika31)
---
Peter, _Do you think George Soros is an American patriot?_ Far-left congresswoman Sheila Jackson Lee does — and you’ve GOT to watch her absolute meltdown when someone dares to question the effects George Soros puppet prosecutors have had on America’s crime surge:
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f7a0e040771e4edb8abcf899a679dc90&_e=3PgJMGDUpHNNwiRgyOH5BGX-lKJvJ068OSvq1udi9w2D7149CQC2B1NOjYruncb9r_eQe-iNPCQv92iJXkPfgQQNLIpMAGGjIomLgx8JFkL85RRijBgqjXUmuQTwrQwrizgP40V-BbnRZgz-FVOIBSCfPJCGITH4NSarEIGbnvwB3HgEC5YslGPlMTGcPpUVha8zEQ_iSp3xKCNlgqRfmjvbbBc31iNxem_qURqs7cGZFNGkXYB7XECBdMxYmkZkdMGHY1IFjQvSSZCp7hcAQVZxX_KwwuymStLrtsTbboaFFVw3ufvd_SzzY6h9xftlCQ5RX0aJm0HStwCqycAn3SB0LfzDQNPrg9Aw68qx-BomaiRldrGQWSGW2Lj7KQ0v)
---
She claims that standing up to Soros’s strategic infiltration of our judicial system will create **“a dangerous situation.”** But that’s EXACTLY backward. It is Soros who is creating a “dangerous situation.” His puppet prosecutors’ refusal to prosecute crime has driven the surge of lawlessness & disorder in our cities. **Here’s the truth:****The far-Left is PANICKED that we’ve blown the lid off of their quiet campaign to fill America’s justice system with radical activists.** So when people like us stand up for the rule of law, they hit back — hard. But that won’t stop us, Peter. [Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f7a0e040771e4edb8abcf899a679dc90&_e=3PgJMGDUpHNNwiRgyOH5BGX-lKJvJ068OSvq1udi9w2D7149CQC2B1NOjYruncb9r_eQe-iNPCQv92iJXkPfgQQNLIpMAGGjIomLgx8JFkL85RRijBgqjXUmuQTwrQwrizgP40V-BbnRZgz-FVOIBSCfPJCGITH4NSarEIGbnvwB3HgEC5YslGPlMTGcPpUVha8zEQ_iSp3xKCNlgqRfmjvbbBc31iNxem_qURqs7cF-mZudU9ozA2rMo59HCnvNDwmGaLXDuH-7fYz9AczanJ5fPxP2_irnG3ovddZxCATfliI1sh0i3dabByScdQpnsUejyQ5VYlMLsZF333D-jfidhLtYvflAFWRfCoY2C6QsJrv3eYOOn2b_5wn4zruv) was founded to protect the freedom and fairness of our judicial system. **That’s why we’re fighting to****take down George Soros’s hand-picked prosecutors before he tears down America’s judiciary.** **Will you join our country’s top conservatives and help us in our fight to stop Soros prosecutors?**
---
[**COUNT ME IN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f7a0e040771e4edb8abcf899a679dc90&_e=3PgJMGDUpHNNwiRgyOH5BGX-lKJvJ068OSvq1udi9w2D7149CQC2B1NOjYruncb9r_eQe-iNPCQv92iJXkPfgQQNLIpMAGGjIomLgx8JFkL85RRijBgqjXUmuQTwrQwrizgP40V-BbnRZgz-FVOIBSCfPJCGITH4NSarEIGbnvwB3HgEC5YslGPlMTGcPpUVha8zEQ_iSp3xKCNlgqRfmjvbbBc31iNxem_qURqs7cEu6Eo3hTkTdYUNmpU_D4v6lQ0Mq4k3t60ddAPq9esvdwQNOPfkg03Y_lhRFwR2lM4cbMV6QELTyh4Bx7PU7eHxG3ckonV1QoF7NV-QP6wAYgoh5WVVqb6umKH_ZGhxr9USViFGv2pZcltLy9lD8LFj)

Thank you,Fair Courts America

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: The information crisis is growing deeper
body:
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1279%2E120351%2EpKOGb7)
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
Peter, these are just a few of the media groups who have announced massive layoffs and programming cancellations over the past few months. As these cuts sweep the mainstream media, the US’ information crisis grows deeper — with even more people being left without reliable news sources.
**That means Courier Newsroom’s mission to provide trustworthy, factual local news is more important than ever.**
[**The only way we’re able to retain our talented reporters and keep up this critical work is because of grassroots donors like you, so will you chip in $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230724?refcode=em20230724&amount=5&refcode2=1279_120351_pKOGb7&akid=1279%2E120351%2EpKOGb7)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230724?refcode=em20230724&amount=5&refcode2=1279_120351_pKOGb7&akid=1279%2E120351%2EpKOGb7)**
Right now, we have local newsrooms in eight different battleground states. Our on-the-ground reporters focus their coverage on local and state news stories, but they also keep their readers informed on what’s happening at the federal level — and how it will impact their communities.

subject: Sorry to bother you

BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:

This could make or break my campaign. So I'm turning to the one
person I know I can count on.

I need to hit my Donor Goal before the end of week
deadline!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBb87_DN0

Hi Friend, it's Tim Scott!

I'm sorry, but I'm out of time and I'm out of options.

First: I announced my Presidential campaign to restore faith in
America and save the American Dream.

Then: We launched TV ads in Iowa and New Hampshire and I've
been traveling all over the country to earn the support of voters
like you.

Now: I need to hit my Donor Goal before the end of week
deadline! This could make or break my campaign.

I need every patriot on my email list to rush $20 by 11:59pm!

RUSH TO DONATE

Your immediate support can help me overcome a major obstacle
and spring this campaign forward.

If you're ready to restore hope in our country, create new
opportunities for everyone, and protect the America we know and
love, will you please rush a donation today?

THANK YOU for your generosity,

Tim Scott

RUSH TO DONATE

Friend, I
believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative
leadership.

It is
time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect
America. It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud
of our president.

That's
why I announced I am running for President of the United States.

SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE

The
Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness.
Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream
because I have lived it. My family went from cotton to congress
in a single lifetime.

This
isn't going to be easy. I'll need your help to win.

Can you
chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?

This
campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you.
Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so
even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you
for your support!

-Tim

29406

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: The July Minuteman Honoree, Protecting Parents' Rights, and More...
body:
This month, we are proud to honor Greg Peeler. | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the July edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
| The month of July brought a brief break from our work in Washington, DC, as we were on recess to celebrate our nation's independence. It was a great opportunity to both travel across the First District to meet with constituents and spend valuable time with my family.
---
|
---
| We are refreshed and ready to get back to work on behalf of East Texas values!
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our July Minuteman -
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=f11cf47035&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment’s notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today’s East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.

Each month, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.

This month’s Minuteman, Greg Peeler, didn't wait for someone to ask for help after severe weather decimated parts of East Texas. Instead, in the early morning hours following the storms, he reached out to local elected officials, asking what needed to be done. After hearing that resources would be delayed in reaching East Texas, Greg ordered and personally funded four pallets of water and two ice trailers to be delivered and distributed immediately. And when water was still needed a few days later, Greg has 20 more pallets of water delivered and distributed.
---
|
---
| But he didn't stop with providing supplies. On Father's Day, Greg learned that a major water system was on the verge of failure. He drove to the site, assessed the situation, and ordered two large generators that were needed to ensure the water system stayed online.

These actions and the fact that Greg just showed up, ready to help at a moment's notice, exemplify the spirit of the Minuteman. Thank you, Greg, for stepping up when your community needed you. We want to show our appreciation by naming Greg Peeler the July Minuteman.

Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=f5553d685f&e=bbce4dd6ad).**

Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=9413026314&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=59209b7161&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| Please join us on Thursday, August 10th, from 5:30 to 8:30 p.m. for a screening of Sound of Freedom at Times Square Grand Slam! Come hear from our local heroes, For the Silent, on how to advocate to help end human trafficking in our community. [Please fill out this form to RSVP.](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=9e0829909f&e=bbce4dd6ad) I hope to see you there!
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises

When I ran for Congress, I promised to stand up for parents and families across East Texas. There has never been a time in our history when parental rights have been as vulnerable as they are now. That is why I supported the Parents Bill of Rights, including co-sponsoring the Protect Kids Act, which was included in this important legislative package. Hear more about it in this KTBB segment.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=e9cf32e0b1&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| Faith, family, and freedom. Those are the lenses through which I approach all decisions. After our brief break, I am now back in the Capitol, working to further our shared conservative principles. Thank you for your continued support and prayers.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | VALUES
---
[ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=ad45765e3a&e=bbce4dd6ad)
| | EFFORTS
---
[ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=70eb8ab5d1&e=bbce4dd6ad)
| | EXPERIENCE
---
[ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=28186fd856&e=bbce4dd6ad)
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=2db066b9b1&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| | [](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=d063dd4dd5&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| | [](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=b741f32035&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| _Copyright ©2023 Nathaniel Moran for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Nathaniel Moran for CongressPO Box 7066Tyler, TX 75711-7066
[Add us to your address book](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=896c131997)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=896c131997&e=bbce4dd6ad&c=3ddf35ee60) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=896c131997&e=bbce4dd6ad&c=3ddf35ee60).

name: Goldco
subject: Biden’s New Taxes on retirement plans
body:
Have you heard the news? Biden's new tax plans are directly aimed at your savings, and your investments:

| | |
# **Only Weeks Remain To
Shield Your Retirement Savings
From Biden's Tax Plans **
---
|
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b862f8fb0dc94469ae2f0b5272162c05&_e=9YtPtinaJCYQHcAdMlJXbaJe-y3xxVCKNpk9aDkslimyXBdeGX1xOYBmMJ5_ciS6-_jkuGwVCsszfOxfjKHkPanWPI9883k5l05kxYkBjAGpmNAbXOwRunsRee8jA8DDHQcEWFQ-JnUfQgiQOclknrxAljxq4QqDXG9p1JIbAts_R1xUFM6w4j5-skBtL-epyN09jxq1LGaeg53JvQnK0wUaF6Fdiiw-Jbtl9Mqx4c1Tfhve0u0XVpa3MwqlKbAMSyumtzY8MoL0Ryewhd_B8sKDBP8I1aQL0IIHrLoOuakZ0mH9XTEmffeIsvAsMxTq2-UtPACMzFD0iPtsv2P8piJca1p6vmcwWlYDZSXSZFYjvA4F0pCV8t8tUhZkbbxi6vnXmfGYZPRjrmv8GWSkmvp_O8UWdGduTvCHsyg2ES0%3D)
---
Have you heard the news? Biden's new tax plans are directly aimed at your savings, and your investments:
---
* Seniors will be hit with $261 billion in new taxes on **retirement plans** ...
* $37 billion tax hikes on American energy producers, **which will drive up gas and energy prices for you** ...
* ...while leaving **ZERO for Social Security**.

---
It's obvious. Joe Biden doesn't care about your retirement. So that's why you should protect your money...
---
| | **BEFORE his new plan starts on October 1st.**

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Republicans add odious amendments to our National Defense Authorization Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**Republicans are loading up our defense budget with anti-LGBTQ hate and anti-choice culture wars.**

[**We need to stop MAGA Republicans from attacking our troops' freedoms in the NDAA. Will you chip in to help send Derek to Congress where he will defend freedom?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966450/418196666/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230721_02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk1MDlhMy00MzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gEFCCgMGGwqIMEpZpBzR_hvuuISRW6s4nSB4IBsvJk=)
Last week, what used to be a bipartisan defense spending bill has become a cruel right-wing wish list for the party of MAGA.

Rep. Jay Obernolte and other Republicans rammed through proposals to end coverage of transition surgeries and hormone treatments for transgender troops, gut diversity and inclusion programs, block reimbursement of travel costs for troops seeking abortions and ban pride flags at military installations.

**MAGA Republicans have hijacked the bipartisan National Defense Authorization Act to continue attacks on reproductive freedom and force their right-wing ideology on the American people.

[Derek Marshall believes that our troops and all Americans deserve reproductive freedom and the freedom to be their authentic selves. Will you donate to help us send him to Washington DC?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966451/418196667/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230721_02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk1MDlhMy00MzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gEFCCgMGGwqIMEpZpBzR_hvuuISRW6s4nSB4IBsvJk=)**

The must-pass NDAA typically earns wide bipartisan support and has passed Congress each year for decades. But now, Republicans have turned it into a culture war, even _**hailing the bill**_ as “the first Republican-only NDAA since Eisenhower.”

**The attacks on LGBTQ+ people, women, and people of color continue under the Republican majority in the House, and Derek’s opponent Rep. Jay Obernolte has been in lock step.

[Let’s stop the hate by flipping the House. Will you help Derek get to Congress where he will fight for the very essential American freedoms that our military fights to defend and deserves for themselves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966452/418196668/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230721_02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk1MDlhMy00MzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gEFCCgMGGwqIMEpZpBzR_hvuuISRW6s4nSB4IBsvJk=)**

What freedoms are we fighting for?
Derek Marshall for Congress

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: what I said to Jen Psaki
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966435/418196622/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1NmFhODctNDMyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1S45eTB_dnkMmTc-h42ZFr8fSaLvu7DsY9-ssW_VQE=)
---
| Peter,

I went on Jen Psaki’s show to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s disrespect of our military.

_**His performative and dangerous political stunt is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 250 military servicemembers.**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966436/418196625/-1246393733?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1NmFhODctNDMyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1S45eTB_dnkMmTc-h42ZFr8fSaLvu7DsY9-ssW_VQE=&emci=6effff26-2f2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1856aa87-432a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=8470899)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966437/418196632/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1NmFhODctNDMyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1S45eTB_dnkMmTc-h42ZFr8fSaLvu7DsY9-ssW_VQE=)
---
As a former CIA officer, I know that foreign adversary nations and their leadership are looking at the reality of these vacancies as a source of vulnerability for the U.S. military.

I represent Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers. _**I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness.**_ And I’ll keep calling out this disrespect to our servicemembers and this threat to our national security. [_**Thank you for supporting my campaign and my efforts to stand against Senator Tuberville’s dangerous and partisan stunt.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966438/418196640/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1NmFhODctNDMyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1S45eTB_dnkMmTc-h42ZFr8fSaLvu7DsY9-ssW_VQE=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66966439/418196647/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1NmFhODctNDMyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1S45eTB_dnkMmTc-h42ZFr8fSaLvu7DsY9-ssW_VQE=)
---
I appreciate your support,
Abigail

clean_body: I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness. | = | Peter, I went on Jen Psaki’s show to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s disrespect of our military. His performative and dangerous political stunt is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 250 military servicemembers. | = As a former CIA officer, I know that foreign adversary nations and their leadership are looking at the reality of these vacancies as a source of vulnerability for the U.S. military. I represent Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers. I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness. And I’ll keep calling out this disrespect to our servicemembers and this threat to our national security. = | = I appreciate your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. body:
| One of the toughest fighters working families could ever ask for.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2)
When I first ran for office, I was fighting my heart out in Massachusetts to defeat one of Wall Street’s favorite senators — but I was also keeping a close eye on Wisconsin. That’s where Tammy Baldwin — one of the toughest fighters working families could ever ask for — was running an uphill Senate campaign. She got out there, she talked about how we could put government on the side of working people, and she won. So of course, ever since then, powerful special interests and right-wing extremists have been trying to knock her out of the game. They spent millions to try to defeat her in 2018. They’re ramping up to try again as she runs for reelection next year. **Look: In Wisconsin, races go down to the wire.** Progressive champion Russ Feingold lost two heartbreaking Senate races there, Donald Trump eked out a win in 2016, and the terrific Mandela Barnes came up just a hair short in 2022. **We can’t take anything for granted. We’ve got to do everything we can to make sure Tammy Baldwin pulls out a victory, and early contributions make the biggest difference to help her plan her campaign.** **[If it makes sense for you right now, will you split $10 or any amount between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-warren.0Hh7zQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230724_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2)** I know that Tammy Baldwin can count on this team for support, and I know that we can always count on her to fight for our values. From lowering the cost of prescription drugs, to promoting Made in America manufacturing, to making marriage equality the law of the land no matter what the Supreme Court has to say about it, Tammy Baldwin takes on tough fights and gets results. She makes a difference, and she’s also made history as our nation’s first openly gay senator. Back when she was in college, she knew she wanted to dedicate her career to public service, but she was afraid she’d have to choose between that path and living her authentic life openly. After seeing the courage of other members of the LGBTQ+ community who were coming out, she realized she could run for office while being upfront about who she was. And that’s exactly what she did. We need to keep her voice in Washington, where she fights and wins for working families and works to protect our freedoms, including the right to an abortion. **But this is shaping up to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. And every single donation will go a long way to help get out the vote and get her over the finish line.** **[To help defend our Democratic majority and grow our grassroots movement for bold reform, please pitch in to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-warren.0Hh7zQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230724_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2)** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=678%2E35263%2E6pZQK2)

name: James Carville via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, big problem in Nevada
body:
I needed to reach out directly:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a362e63-6c26-4ac3-b0fb-2ff67508b092/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c6f15e7-e793-451a-a118-05f8a8514919/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control. The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $10,000 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close. [So I’ve got to ask you, Peter: Will you rush $10 or more right now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action – to make sure Jacky wins Nevada’s battleground race and defends our Demo](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb233dd3-6934-4b57-8ef6-d422c8552d73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8f465e8-e8bf-4549-a6a4-e0eed3f2c40a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point. Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With The Washington Post calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. [That’s why I’m urgently asking you to rush a split donation of $10 or more right now to make sure Jacky can keep both Nevada and the Senate blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3ea7662-bade-426a-b0fd-71464eff267f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1593aa59-2da9-4506-bf99-a73938c16d9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Maria
subject: Are you afraid?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | *****REP. SALAZAR: OFFICIALLY A TOP DCCC TARGET***** **07/24/2023**
---
| | Fellow conservative, the Democrats are already attacking me for being a conservative Latina, and we’re still **_15 months away_** from Election Day. I knew they would launch a full-scale offensive but I wasn’t planning for an early strike like this, Fellow conservative. This is Maria Elvira Salazar, I am a 1st Generation American who has lived out the American Dream, a dedicated mother with a long and successful career in journalism, and am a part of the next generation of unstoppable Republican women. **So why is the Democrat Establishment wasting time LINING UP TARGETS?** **Because they are terrified of me.** And they should be. I am a threat to the very narrative of the Democrat party - I’m Socialism’s worst nightmare. I’m going after the incompetence at the border. I’m advocating for parents’ rights in the classroom, and I’m keeping socialism OUT of our government. **They have me fighting on all fronts.** **[My resources are stretched thin, if I’m going to hold my ground for the next 15 months, I’ll need help from fellow Patriots like yourself. name: Josh Stein (personal)
subject: Let me introduce myself, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
My name is Josh Stein. I am a husband, a father, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina.

| Peter,

I’m writing today with updates from the campaign trail, important news coming out of North Carolina (like how recent polling shows our campaign in a DEAD HEAT!), and appeals for a contribution to our campaign. [_**And yes, this email will ask you to donate at the end. If you already know how important it is to hit our fundraising goal, you can click here to make a contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66967486/418200396/1635010129?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjMWJlMjU0LTQ1MmEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0VQy-bHPiitauLFYeU2GsbjqRvclo6kJ27Ei6jOibU=)

Today, I wanted to let you know who I am and why I am in this tough race in the first place.

**My name is Josh Stein. I am a father, a husband, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina.**

For the past six and a half years as your Attorney General, I’ve taken on big fights for the people of North Carolina and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done to our people, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend your reproductive and voting rights.

_I’ve stood up to the radical right who are trying to take away our freedoms._ Because the bottom line is this: North Carolina is a great place to live – and we must do everything we can to protect the state we love and the people who live here.

Now, I am running for Governor of North Carolina because we’re facing a real threat. My opponent Mark Robinson is a MAGA extremist who wants to tell you who you can love...and who you should hate.

_Despite how wrong Robinson is for our state, we’re in a statistical dead heat in the polls._

We always knew this race would be a close one — statewide races in North Carolina always are. My team set a $75,000 online goal for this month, and hitting this number is crucial to our efforts to fight back against extremism in our state and win this election.

[_**Today, I am asking for your help to hit my fundraising target and stay on track to hit my online goal. Please, click here or on a button below to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66967487/418200397/1635010129?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230724-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjMWJlMjU0LTQ1MmEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0VQy-bHPiitauLFYeU2GsbjqRvclo6kJ27Ei6jOibU=)

clean_body: My name is Josh Stein. I am a husband, a father, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina. | Peter, I’m writing today with updates from the campaign trail, important news coming out of North Carolina (like how recent polling shows our campaign in a DEAD HEAT!), and appeals for a contribution to our campaign. = Today, I wanted to let you know who I am and why I am in this tough race in the first place. My name is Josh Stein. I am a father, a husband, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina. For the past six and a half years as your Attorney General, I’ve taken on big fights for the people of North Carolina and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done to our people, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend your reproductive and voting rights. I’ve stood up to the radical right who are trying to take away our freedoms. Because the bottom line is this: North Carolina is a great place to live – and we must do everything we can to protect the state we love and the people who live here. Now, I am running for Governor of North Carolina because we’re facing a real threat. My opponent Mark Robinson is a MAGA extremist who wants to tell you who you can love...and who you should hate. Despite how wrong Robinson is for our state, we’re in a statistical dead heat in the polls. We always knew this race would be a close one — statewide races in North Carolina always are. My team set a $75,000 online goal for this month, and hitting this number is crucial to our efforts to fight back against extremism in our state and win this election. = | | = | = | = | = | = The future of our state is on the line, but with your help, we can continue to make progress for North Carolina and defeat extremism. Thank you, Josh Stein * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: $7 for 7 special elections →
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations with 3X the impact drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states ahead of next week's fundraising deadline. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Wisconsin, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – a 3X-matched gift of $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so a 3X-matched gift of $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 (3X-matched!) before the 31st at midnight to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtMZjpC-P5GvlZ6rXcOpAltQs-Lyzzpx9n61-LDpoxwmgtF2-MPI0N15eJjXbeQEczzKnPdZUFJ2NO2YG4IAlI2YnmqU2i4q6JG6GBJtkigYXtqgtJfWoBV2fm0QNnNbluk38cux4-5JbpDUstTgleCkJx66j3Al6Ca2H-P8wpZcIkgNWLmz053Ic0TX4CC2ElNt-Y_ugahdZ8cX85NL9-D3lqzhlKBGPJqTJmGm1lU9vg4zK6WfCZYxiVuZ_5PLbGHy2_usTruuRwfLu6blnY3fn7dUu6DFx8aqS8jNtsLcXQLQ2cCbQbeDkxeHUkQgxImceRtAc9JqPAzaVQo8yvs8zkM08lrvp3Kc5urWXTtBiSjjQ9uGG85ldXAmid2kVEY9qxsydalA9mTQPd4pKAz3_XjZXhlLF2hoeftHgZIz-xnCVzc8PVjoi8_dP9Mns-37eHyrMr68_vZ7uDE9TzYOVvQSc5NZan7oC1IbH4nWbK1DAaAE__hK4FwG91GpvV4V118cDAp__KXT6VwBUgNKDlBkfax8ucPxMORhgAeA74TEg2RFUSYZbrmJ57nYMa/3y5/SyAAF5pPR3mvjS1ZTPcRWg/h0/OJa--8ikPXlvLgREPjUG79IjZFdTUQ1zqNqQuiDsSPI) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: our first major deadline of this campaign is TONIGHT

body:
Friend, this race is simply too important for us to come up short. Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So please, split a donation of $25 before midnight between my campaign and Serve America to help us flip TX blue! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
FIRST , Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!
THEN , experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican seat to a BATTLEGROUND .
NOW , a brand-new poll shows Colin is just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, and 14% of voters are still undecided!
It's crystal clear: Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator, and we've got a real chance of flipping this seat – which would all but guarantee Democrats hold onto our critical Senate majority. But it's not going to be easy, and Colin's counting on YOUR grassroots support to give him the resources to fire Ted Cruz next November.
We cannot afford to fall short, so please, before midnight, rush $25 or more between our campaign and Serve America to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let’s do this.
– Team Allred

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed by my Republican opponent. Will Rollins is now running to unseat him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66967999/418201850/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYwZDMzMC00NzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2s9pLVXf4rdUSJ7cOZ1SxK0uuyjC1l2QlvwkfQkPZI=)

Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano.

I'm reaching out to ask you to chip in a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66968000/418201851/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYwZDMzMC00NzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2s9pLVXf4rdUSJ7cOZ1SxK0uuyjC1l2QlvwkfQkPZI=)** to Will Rollins’ campaign before his end-of-month deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience.

In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly.

Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- _and in such a hateful way._

**And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican Will Rollins is now running to unseat.**

Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

**After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.**

**[Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please send in $3 or more before Will’s end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66968001/418201852/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYwZDMzMC00NzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2s9pLVXf4rdUSJ7cOZ1SxK0uuyjC1l2QlvwkfQkPZI=)**

clean_body: | = Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to chip in a = to Will Rollins’ campaign before his end-of-month deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race. This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican Will Rollins is now running to unseat. Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military. After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Mark Takano Representative, California's 39th District | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress If you wish to donate by check, you can make it payable to Will Rollins for Congress and mail the check to: Will Rollins for Congress PO Box 6282 414 W Grand Blvd Corona, CA 92878 United States

subject: Tonight SBCRA July Meeting
body:
Monday July 24th We are excited to host Johnnie Morgan and others at the CRA meeting this month. Make sure to make this meeting as we will also have
| |
---
|
---
## Monday July 24th
---
---
|
---
We are excited to host Johnnie Morgan and others at the CRA meeting this month. Make sure to make this meeting as we will also have our election for our board secretary position.
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Johnnie Morgan, CRA Immediate Past President
---
|
---
A native Californian that attended Los Angeles Unified Schools.
Education includes an A.A. in Business Management from Los Angeles Southwest Community College, a B.S. in Accounting, and a M.P.A. in Public Administration from Pepperdine University.
Worked in several entrepreneurial enterprises over the years, most recently as a consultant in the earthquake preparedness industry.
Has been married 44 years and has two adult children, is a proud husband and father of a Republican household. His motto is: “God will always make a way.”
His active involvement in the Republican Party spans over 40+ years, which includes serving as a California Delegate at the last eight Republican National Conventions.
Served 2 terms as the California Republican Assembly (CRA) National Committeeman and 1 term as the National Federation of Republican Assembly (NFRA) Western Region Vice – President.
Currently, serving as Vice- President of the South Los Angeles-Inglewood Republican Assembly (SLAIRA) and just completed 2 terms as the President of the California Republican Assembly (CRA).
Candidate for the California Republican Party (CAGOP) Los Angeles County Region Vice-President.
---
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!

body:
It’s no longer just said behind closed doors. They’re PUBLICLY admitting it now...

| | Friend,

A memo was LEAKED revealing that RINO special-interest donors are legitimately HOPING that I get put in JAIL for 400 YEARS so that they can install a puppet nominee who will make amends with the Deep State.
But now, it’s no longer only being whispered about in private. Now, they’re PUBLICLY ADMITTING it.
On the day our nation learned that Biden’s Department of Injustice is plotting to INDICT me yet again and possibly even **_ARREST_** me - **one of our primary opponents tried to MAKE EXCUSES for the Biden DOJ’s abuses of power.**
Let me get this straight...
...The deeply unpopular sitting president is trying to jail his leading opponent like a communist dictator. Our freedom, our justice, and our rights are being ripped right out of our hands...
...But some disloyal Republicans are not rushing to my defense to unequivocally CONDEMN this abuse of power - **instead, they’re like VULTURES circling the skies, waiting and hoping to use our injustice and misfortune for their own personal gain, and even going so far as to _DEFEND_ the Deep State.**
These are not patriots. These are cowards, who would willingly sell out their country to the Deep State in exchange for even just a taste of power.
If they’d stab someone in the back who helped get them elected - all while our nation is on the brink of tyranny - then how could you _ever_ trust them to defend YOU?
Right now, RINOs are concocting a $370 MILLION scheme to try and defeat me so that they can install their own nominee who has now **PUBLICLY** decided to align with the Deep State.
**But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION _courageous_ patriots who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny.**

It’s so depressing that the exact reason I left Congress, nonconsensually shared nude images, were shown in a House committee meeting by Marjorie Taylor Greene. MTG shared explicit photos of Hunter Biden during an Oversight Committee hearing, an incredibly invasive and traumatic event that neither Hunter nor the women in the images agreed to. It’s disgusting and deplorable, and not what our politics should ever be about. But unfortunately, Republicans have now made it clear that they are the party of revenge porn. There’s so much work we have to do to protect survivors, like passing the _SHIELD Act_ , but one thing we can do right now is win back the House and kick MTG off her committees so she can’t inflict further harm. MTG shared explicit photos of Hunter Biden during an Oversight Committee hearing, an incredibly invasive and traumatic event that neither Hunter nor the women in the images agreed to. It’s disgusting and deplorable, and not what our politics should ever be about. But unfortunately, Republicans have now made it clear that they are the party of revenge porn. There’s so much work we have to do to protect survivors, like passing the SHIELD Act , but one thing we can do right now is win back the House and kick MTG off her committees so she can’t inflict further harm. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | Derek, Another good friend of mine, Senator Maria Cantwell, is up for re-election next fall. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66969028/418205262/-1761977239?refcode=mw_em_230724_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWJlMDM3Yi00YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHnsOBMdfA7Oqkw-fhmQiSgBGPWMy1We5pTnBx7ECW8=) Maria and I have accomplished a lot together in the Senate. Did you know that she was a key architect of our historic CHIPS Act? It’s thanks to her relentlessness that we were able to make enormous investments to ease the supply chain, lower costs, and bring manufacturing jobs to the United States. It’s been an absolute pleasure working alongside her to make progress for our country. But her work is far from over. She has plenty more planned for her time in the Senate, including protecting access to reproductive health care and taking action on the climate crisis – and I’d be honored to work with her on these issues. **_[Can you join me in supporting her re-election campaign by splitting a contribution of $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66969029/418205263/-1761977239?refcode=mw_em_230724_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWJlMDM3Yi00YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHnsOBMdfA7Oqkw-fhmQiSgBGPWMy1We5pTnBx7ECW8=)_** Unfortunately, the GOP is looking at her seat in Washington as an opportunity to take back Democrats’ razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why I’m asking you today if you can **_[chip in anything you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66969030/418205264/-1761977239?refcode=mw_em_230724_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWJlMDM3Yi00YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHnsOBMdfA7Oqkw-fhmQiSgBGPWMy1We5pTnBx7ECW8=)_ **to help Maria Cantwell hang on to her Senate seat so we can protect our majority and keep working together to get big things done for Americans throughout the country. Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66969031/418205265/-1761977239?refcode=mw_em_230724_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWJlMDM3Yi00YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VHnsOBMdfA7Oqkw-fhmQiSgBGPWMy1We5pTnBx7ECW8=)********

Colin Allred and his far-left pals are ALL-IN to defeat me and flip Texas next November. **I’m fighting back with all I’ve got against their hit job smears...__but I can’t do it alone!__** I need your help to **DEFEAT THE LEFT** and **KEEP TEXAS RED**. **[Rush an emergency contribution to stand behind me >>>](http://trk.tedcruz._to-8pFYLSTw)**

Ted Cruz

Last week, we hit the ground running with an inspiring show of unity and activism: = 💡FIRST, we must educate ourselves and others about the deceptive nature of Issue 1 and its potential consequences to our democratic process. 💡THEN, we need to spread the word and rally support from Ohioans who share our commitment to safeguarding our rights and making our voices heard. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a real difference and be used strategically to fight against voter suppression and protect our fundamental principles against anti-democratic actors. Remember, together, we have the power to bring about change, uphold fairness, and protect our constitutional rights. Peter, The Left-wing media reports the Virginia U.S. Senate race is a “sleeper race” with a guaranteed Democrat victory. _I’m here to tell you it’s not._ We have seen incredible momentum since we first launched our campaign, and that momentum hasn’t shown any signs of slowing down. The people of Virginia are sick of the same, swamp entrenched, Democrat establishment leadership. The voters told us this by electing Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin just two years ago. Now, I think Virginia is ready for a fresh new conservative face in the U.S. Senate who isn’t afraid to put in the work and make tough decisions. I’m ready to be that leader, but I need your help. **If you haven’t already, will you pitch in now with the link below and become a founding donor for our U.S. Senate campaign?** [**https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=4bdaa9de01a24707a54d053871c2c533&_e=5XRZ2PBzTrthPBP-091y_QG8PF6s53Ol4v_gpEiKTCJ2Atm5r73oKn2V0M-ifaQd-v8U5qS4J6MIzz-t72MqcFCuuU83nlzWHk7fS-xBgxXU10e-ItQOXp4cJc1s8zstfZDMKC5wkSCpvfrnc5adJvHxkCcu6Cbpad5nd98ogjXWECSzTWGoEG6ahhys_Pd8EK_BChlbUX4SQ4qWTqBaWSoqJH3-qMGFPC_4Ny37yaFtOLHWuNHlpa5VMVrPjbjYVHGPqAZ8VJGh3gMXVCVjonnBOAAanU_W3VD-UKWr_E_FDEMcT0Wo1pNo-Qem9b1aAjNZE8_ttrQte6NOE3kYlQorO9muvyo3rq-7JL890Oc%3D) **With your help, I know we can SHOCK the D.C. establishment and carry this race to victory. ** In Liberty,

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: on the frontlines for justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
It’s an honor to serve on the House Judiciary Committee alongside many hardworking public servants in our Democratic Caucus. **** It’s an honor to serve on the House Judiciary Committee alongside many hardworking public servants in our Democratic Caucus.

In the 116th and 117th Congresses, we passed serious, consequential legislation through the Committee. In the 118th Congress? Not so much. **[In a minute, I’m going to ask you to consider a contribution to help us flip the House next year and get back to this serious work – but first, some background.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66970974/418212218/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean&refcode2=9f367619-502a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM2NzYxOS01MDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z1DhDPuaz8ntb5S0j5FMWc_dy4h7XJmGAe2sU1jr80=)**

You see, Peter, in this current Congress, my Democratic colleagues and I on the Judiciary Committee have become the last line of defense as Chairman Jim Jordan lurches the Committee toward an agenda of obstruction, disinformation, and far-right, partisan investigations.

**In fact, as Chairman, Jim Jordan used his power to create and fund a partisan Subcommittee on the Weaponization of Government – demanding over $18 million in funding with no accountability.**

The Judiciary Committee plays a unique role in defending the Constitution and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. It should never be used as a political tool for obstruction and partisan grandstanding.

Nevertheless, this is what we see on a daily basis from Jim Jordan and far-right GOP members – and it underscores just how much is on the line in 2024. It is critical that my Democratic Judiciary colleagues and I have the resources we’ll need to retake the majority next year, make Jim Jordan a one-term Chairman, and get back to the serious work of the Judiciary Committee.

**[Help us do just that by splitting a donation between Democratic Members of the Judiciary Committee right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66970975/418212234/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean&refcode2=9f367619-502a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM2NzYxOS01MDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z1DhDPuaz8ntb5S0j5FMWc_dy4h7XJmGAe2sU1jr80=)** | | [ **SPLIT $20** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66970976/418212241/1259395924?amount=20&refcode=jud_split_dean&refcode2=9f367619-502a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM2NzYxOS01MDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z1DhDPuaz8ntb5S0j5FMWc_dy4h7XJmGAe2sU1jr80=)

clean_body: It’s an honor to serve on the House Judiciary Committee alongside many hardworking public servants in our Democratic Caucus. ** It’s an honor to serve on the House Judiciary Committee alongside many hardworking public servants in our Democratic Caucus. In the 116th and 117th Congresses, we passed serious, consequential legislation through the Committee. In the 118th Congress? Not so much. = You see, Peter, in this current Congress, my Democratic colleagues and I on the Judiciary Committee have become the last line of defense as Chairman Jim Jordan lurches the Committee toward an agenda of obstruction, disinformation, and far-right, partisan investigations. In fact, as Chairman, Jim Jordan used his power to create and fund a partisan Subcommittee on the Weaponization of Government – demanding over $18 million in funding with no accountability. The Judiciary Committee plays a unique role in defending the Constitution and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. It should never be used as a political tool for obstruction and partisan grandstanding. Nevertheless, this is what we see on a daily basis from Jim Jordan and far-right GOP members – and it underscores just how much is on the line in 2024. It is critical that my Democratic Judiciary colleagues and I have the resources we’ll need to retake the majority next year, make Jim Jordan a one-term Chairman, and get back to the serious work of the Judiciary Committee. = | | = | = | = Thank you sincerely, Peter, for standing with us in these most important fights. – Madeleine = Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7gq41er0qm2se37kudiv7ih1l1ef7jatmko5g10_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cdh2bs)
---
Friend, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, Friend_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z32bc21k2tqkhup2m0smrt7l2v3pllo3pnu2apsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cdh2bs "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

_The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now._ 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We **will** fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Ron DeSantis
