---
|
**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhvsfe6kvfjsej0ab22pb044u3pc5dema7nliu3g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cdh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. | | **"Arizona Democratic Party Files Complaint to Ensure Voters are Protected from Shadowy Dark Money Interests Breaking Campaign Finance Rules"**
* * *
_“No Labels is not following the rules required of a political party, despite claiming to the Secretary of State and Arizonans that they are a functioning political party,” said Morgan Dick, Executive Director for the Arizona Democratic Party. “That is why the Arizona Democratic Party is filing this complaint – nobody should be exempt from the law, especially not an out-of-state dark money group. body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpf190sb65lh1jol4jv4o4b96ek9f4qpcst8ife0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh3ghtlltuhrme0doc6f2bjdvh1ova9ags1vljso_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt6gnacrrf3g8auqadu06e5fjb8aikj1e10iglm8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrdut5vfilpk282qdtk0hb3keanpom8ajm0en4f8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt8h3mlnjqcklqi40b65fg3hqt981s7ttla02lc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfngko0f3sqf8bti0h2qhq1d84191h935762ta9o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6v53i5jtmuev0hq3123hg9l0s6j32r41h8484o0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9j6eo72cth2bs)

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Hey there, Derek.

There are a ton of reasons we could give you. Here are a few:
We’re on the frontline in the fight to get hundreds of senior Military promotions moving, and we’re going toe to toe with Tommy Tuberville and his blockade of those promotions on a daily basis.
We’re searching for emerging leaders around the country, all Veterans and national security leaders, to defend our democracy and bring decency and honor back to Congress.
And we’re building up our warchest to be ready to beat whoever ends up running against President Biden — whether that’s Trump, DeSantis, or anyone else.
But the fact of the matter is, all of that requires significant resources. That’s why we need your help.
So, one more time: **[Can we count on you to make a donation? $3 would be great, but anything you can afford helps. body:

_**[Excellence over Victimhood](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663575%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hGoeACGLLewqwSClyTYcEA&sysid=1)

Hi there, In case you missed it, we wanted to share this new profile of Gretchen from [_The New Yorker_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66971935/418216082/-419101562?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzMxMzk4NGItNTQyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xtpv0PCZ-17APILhZwwEK-M-T5c5z6GB8tap1TPH_Z0=&emci=46d739a6-3827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=7313984b-542a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1028753) _._ Check out the headline: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66971936/418216083/490338806?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzMxMzk4NGItNTQyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xtpv0PCZ-17APILhZwwEK-M-T5c5z6GB8tap1TPH_Z0=) And they’re exactly right, folks. While others are engaged in the business of bigotry, Michigan is doing things differently. Together, we’ve repealed our 1931 abortion ban, expanded LGBTQ+ rights, signed gun safety laws, boosted the Working Families Tax Credit, and made historic investments to support students and boost teacher retention. We have a lot of work ahead of us to keep our state moving forward and continue building the Michigan we all believe in because what happens in Michigan is important to the rest of the country. **Just hear it from Gretchen herself** : _“You know, what happens in these next few years is going to determine not just what the Michigan economy looks like but what American democracy looks like, what the average person in this country’s rights are, what our confidence is in our institutions.”_ **But Gretchen can’t make progress without your help. Your grassroots support will help ensure we can continue tackling the critical issues facing Michiganders and Americans across the country. ** **[Can you chip in right now to help Gretchen prepare for the fights ahead and keep working to move our country forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66971946/418216084/2140481003?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzMxMzk4NGItNTQyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xtpv0PCZ-17APILhZwwEK-M-T5c5z6GB8tap1TPH_Z0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66971947/418216098/2140481003?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzMxMzk4NGItNTQyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xtpv0PCZ-17APILhZwwEK-M-T5c5z6GB8tap1TPH_Z0=)**

Peter,

Did you know that it’s been exactly 14 years since the federal minimum wage was last increased, Peter?

While many states, like Washington, have chosen to raise the minimum wage to help hardworking families, 20 states are still only using the federal minimum of $7.25 an hour. **That isn't fair, and it isn't right.**

That's why Kim's fighting in Congress to change that and raise the minimum wage for the hardworking families of America. In 2019, she worked to pass the Raise the Wage Act, which Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell blocked. But that hasn’t stopped her from fighting for America’s hardworking families.

Kim knows the minimum wage needs to be raised and that working families can't wait any longer. But we still want to hear from you.

**[Do you support raising the federal minimum wage? name: Bob Casey
subject: Here’s the truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=350%2E552475%2EZtdS9Z)
Peter, I’m a lifelong Pennsylvanian.
From growing up in Scranton, to coaching eighth-grade basketball in Philadelphia, to my wife, Terese, and I raising our four daughters in the same town where I grew up — Pennsylvania is my home.
That’s why I’m a tireless advocate for Pennsylvania’s hardworking families in the U.S. Senate. Because I know how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for their kids, save for their families’ futures, and give back to their communities. They deserve a Senator who works just as hard to represent their voices in Washington.
But here’s the reality: national Republicans are coming for this seat in hopes of regaining Senate control. These are the same folks who want to make cuts to Social Security, which nearly 3 million Pennsylvanians rely on to get by.
_The people of our state can’t afford a Republican Senate majority._
**[Peter, I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the U.S. Senate, but I won’t be able to win without your support. Will you donate $5 or any amount now to help defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230724-1?refcode=em20230724-1&refcode2=350_552475_ZtdS9Z&akid=350%2E552475%2EZtdS9Z)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230724-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230724-1&refcode2=350_552475_ZtdS9Z&akid=350%2E552475%2EZtdS9Z)**
I’m no stranger to a hard fight, and I’m grateful for your support as we build this campaign.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=350%2E552475%2EZtdS9Z)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=350%2E552475%2EZtdS9Z)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

California, one of the bluest states in the nation, deserves a Working Families Party champion in the U.S. Senate. | | | Hi Peter, I'm Jane Kim, State Director of the California Working Families Party,**** and I’m excited to announce our first statewide endorsement for 2024:**Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate.** Barbara needs no introduction. As the _only_ member of Congress to have voted against the 2001 resolution that gave George W. Bush a blank check for war —**Barbara is a progressive legend.** ****California, one of the bluest states in the nation, deserves a Working Families Party champion in the U.S. Senate.[**Join me in Barbara has a long history of making history. As a high school student, she fought to integrate her cheerleading squad, ultimately becoming the first Black cheerleader in her high school. She was the first Black woman elected to the State Assembly and Senate from Northern California. And in 1998, she became the first woman elected to Congress from her district where she spearheaded nearly every single major piece of HIV/AIDS legislation and worked with then-President Bush to secure $15 billion in funding to address the epidemic. From supporting Medicare for All and investments in housing and education, Barbara has proven her unwavering commitment to a policy agenda that uplifts working people in this country. **She has never been afraid to take on big fights, and that’s why we’re so proud to stand with her in this one — as she runs for a historic seat in the U.S. Senate. Between now and March 5, 2024, we’re committed to mobilizing our members and voters across California in support of her run.** **** A groundswell of early grassroots support is absolutely critical to ensuring we elect a Working Families champion in the U.S Senate. clean_body: California, one of the bluest states in the nation, deserves a Working Families Party champion in the U.S. Senate. | | | Hi Peter, I'm Jane Kim, State Director of the California Working Families Party,** and I’m excited to announce our first statewide endorsement for 2024:Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate. Barbara needs no introduction. As the only member of Congress to have voted against the 2001 resolution that gave George W. Bush a blank check for war —Barbara is a progressive legend. California, one of the bluest states in the nation, deserves a Working Families Party champion in the U.S. Senate. Barbara has a long history of making history. As a high school student, she fought to integrate her cheerleading squad, ultimately becoming the first Black cheerleader in her high school. She was the first Black woman elected to the State Assembly and Senate from Northern California. And in 1998, she became the first woman elected to Congress from her district where she spearheaded nearly every single major piece of HIV/AIDS legislation and worked with then-President Bush to secure $15 billion in funding to address the epidemic. From supporting Medicare for All and investments in housing and education, Barbara has proven her unwavering commitment to a policy agenda that uplifts working people in this country. She has never been afraid to take on big fights, and that’s why we’re so proud to stand with her in this one — as she runs for a historic seat in the U.S. Senate. Between now and March 5, 2024, we’re committed to mobilizing our members and voters across California in support of her run. A groundswell of early grassroots support is absolutely critical to ensuring we elect a Working Families champion in the U.S Senate. In solidarity, Jane Kim California State Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Jamaal is not only an inspiring Congressman, but he’s also a former principal and the only male member of “the Squad.” He knows we need to inspire progressive change if we want to make real progress in the country, and we are proud to support him. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Jamaal grew up in Manhattan. He played college football, and then decided to become an educator and opened a new public middle school in the Bronx. He has spent his life working to inspire change and make life better for people in our communities. = We appreciate your support! \- Future Forum PAC Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

---
It’s not hard to tell when the country you’ve known and loved your entire life is slipping away right before your very eyes.

---
When Crooked Joe and his cronies act more and more like the **_MOB_** than an administration, then you know YOUR government is gone.

---

---
_...they’re about trying to intimidate _YOU_ out of voting for the only candidate who puts you FIRST.

---
**It’s the single greatest SHAKEDOWN in the history of America!**

| | Friend,

---
When I took the podium at Mar-a-Lago last November and announced my candidacy for president, alarm bells went off in the minds of every Deep State thug, Swamp crook, and left-wing radical in Washington.

---
You see, I could have walked away from it all...

---
I could have chosen not to run, enjoyed time with my incredible family, the sunshine at Mar-a-Lago, and golfed, and never once had to think about these sick and twisted tyrants ever again.

---
_But Friend, walking away would have meant condemning our Free Republic and YOU to a lifetime of tyranny._

---
And that is why I will ALWAYS stand right where I belong – between _**YOU**_ and them.

---
I knew that by running for president once more to FIRE the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House, every last arrow in the Left’s arsenal would be shot my way.

---
Crooked Joe and the Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts and attempting to **JAIL me for _LIFE_** that I’ll eventually throw up my hands and cave.

---
You would think you were watching an 80’s gangster movie, but the sad reality is that in America in 2023, Biden’s Department of _Injustice_ and the radicals running our country truly are gangsters.

---
This is quite literally a SHAKEDOWN the likes of which our country has never seen.

---
But even now, _even after being told that I’m likely staring down yet**ANOTHER INDICTMENT** despite being a completely innocent man_, I do not regret my decision to fight for this country — and YOU — for even a second.

---
**Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, will _EVER_ get me to shut down this campaign!**

---
**Because I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny.**

---
_And with freedom in America hanging on by a mere thread, I know that YOU will never surrender either._

---

clean_body: This is the greatest shakedown our country has ever seen!| | | Friend, It’s not hard to tell when the country you’ve known and loved your entire life is slipping away right before your very eyes. When Crooked Joe and his cronies act more and more like the MOB than an administration, then you know YOUR government is gone. And in its place now stands a Third World tin-pot dictatorship more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than our once Free Republic. Make no mistake, the Left’s witch hunts are about far more than Crooked Joe trying to JAIL his leading political opposition – me – for LIFE ... ...they’re about trying to intimidate YOU out of voting for the only candidate who puts you FIRST. It’s the single greatest SHAKEDOWN in the history of America! But Biden and his Deep State thugs NEVER expected that NOT A SINGLE ONE of the more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots in our movement would bend the knee. - | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sat, Jul 22, 2023 Subject: re: Letter to report to the Grand JuryTo: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | | Friend, When I took the podium at Mar-a-Lago last November and announced my candidacy for president, alarm bells went off in the minds of every Deep State thug, Swamp crook, and left-wing radical in Washington. You see, I could have walked away from it all... I could have chosen not to run, enjoyed time with my incredible family, the sunshine at Mar-a-Lago, and golfed, and never once had to think about these sick and twisted tyrants ever again. But Friend, walking away would have meant condemning our Free Republic and YOU to a lifetime of tyranny. And that is why I will ALWAYS stand right where I belong – between YOU and them. I knew that by running for president once more to FIRE the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House, every last arrow in the Left’s arsenal would be shot my way. Crooked Joe and the Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts and attempting to JAIL me for LIFE that I’ll eventually throw up my hands and cave. You would think you were watching an 80’s gangster movie, but the sad reality is that in America in 2023, Biden’s Department of Injustice and the radicals running our country truly are gangsters. This is quite literally a SHAKEDOWN the likes of which our country has never seen. But even now, even after being told that I’m likely staring down yetANOTHER INDICTMENT despite being a completely innocent man, I do not regret my decision to fight for this country — and YOU — for even a second. Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, will EVER get me to shut down this campaign! Because I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny. And with freedom in America hanging on by a mere thread, I know that YOU will never surrender either. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4o5fbm1hb95552oto77cbn48h0gjf0i3b7mf8j8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbov8tqr3i8pudg910onvrbo3ns8btvbks1f9hp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbdoivm6snlbphkh716mi19ol97me50aq9b637c8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7vb5kp0bpmuh8t6dmqdai4jftk339krp5ibq9g8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9r11613t1h93p8d0jc4olo4gknj4ojp21f1t5jo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8e2qr9mphq59ju2motbqm9vqfjroli4f7jks38_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9gv96nfkdrim56fmb1ktmak6fnjmgr1o0menm1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z39od8qeh2nmsjr0b8j9ari1j7qiofcp7tg38dvg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgggtc4gc0pegcqjbo9pkft4jjb09k0r044vrrto_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4olbhu2mumn8go1men6cobqfhai90sf098jn99g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z93vnr0nbut6stnvqkia7uhbeh1pcutclu0ll470_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zub1jfbbem3j1e14mdcjt2n0nkj77icf7pf1lddo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7q4s040l1jp3qnldctjc5qbarq81dr4v59hrij0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9gm0pb6clh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

body:

name: Katy Frisch
subject: I'll just say it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Adam might not say it, but I will.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66973451/418221372/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg4YjY2Ni01ODJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm6f32IW40mwoJxJBOr_TohzLCLQxwG3scsDsFy3xgE=&emci=847c1ab1-532a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=de88b666-582a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66973452/418221373/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg4YjY2Ni01ODJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm6f32IW40mwoJxJBOr_TohzLCLQxwG3scsDsFy3xgE=&emci=847c1ab1-532a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=de88b666-582a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – any amount you can afford will go a long way – and make sure we have the resources to finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66973453/418221374/1610638071?refcode=em20230724pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=de88b666-582a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg4YjY2Ni01ODJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lm6f32IW40mwoJxJBOr_TohzLCLQxwG3scsDsFy3xgE=)

clean_body: Adam might not say it, but I will. Hello, When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end. Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies. Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country. The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money. In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we knew we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions. Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book. It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024. Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From our entire family, thank you. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L2tHIOBiWIugYJXexs7ZwQ&sysid=1)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663583%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MEIvwUZfR5Z9O0C4j9cZ%2fw&sysid=1)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663584%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3eUBcaRBw5QT8r%2f0M9WIwg&sysid=1)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663595%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2fmkqfNyIU%2beb8lGQ9yw7A&sysid=1)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L2tHIOBiWIugYJXexs7ZwQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663596%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IvltjsT%2fPRfvKGTl96HMFQ&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663597%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KJ961FLnA3fPBfifVSsf7A&sysid=1)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

American Update
---

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | ---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
But first, let me explain what happened...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7KCakxN0UC7AODpLtb-nRQ-BUU3Ytz4fMzhb0zI_LbZ-JEQf7fSw_ijLVce_rSHUfIrq7wLOT7YDYCtjSJxGJk42WWN9ngNpZ3yD6dM10h3gozx3pbN6oYuOSYbAyueNWSn7iOesiEw5i5mAodd0iPHmSx86F2PZx_bRC1bBW1WQ%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7Xfj9J48WUhhYqACu5tmqF-i5vgyxk_nc9NXRedHMa9uAezSZOg_4tQSUttuRaCCj4dK2cxwEtjjuWqvqVdAvitgRJARNuxhl7vy8dTUr8Ilq0yKjekCSEusEcx2A5ZMYxm6jSQKavBjYpEeIw-7Kh6s9b0QtkAOOdroD6MLlkNc%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7ZDEpaBcUwFooxLSyT-TuRccFSMI-2XFMTDVp6QzO3oxcTglxET1if1vc1xoLLv-pdFVS2phZGU6jQMARa4836ijq_d6_RpSl5jmaq70QAaIatVtpHw4JvUtsVlbXPjdrEHUOsq4j9fZYrrZJuYqLX0jQherZF6KUioZL2pXwV-U%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7E4lUdqKms7jBA1ZWvklcBlz4fyqhotyUaKqYfaD6DOvoS8cNwmoIENuUtuCOG4fiAYMj-ZYD9qfJHcEAYK2YevjQKSTxFSa2ISooud3RImaOez8anHAmsZzxwy85iwK8dw0Bp77vGm062V2_YUUB8MgPsCX1__JcOF7ZXHhG3xk%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7CNU0cgWUbvSBGphC3mNRD7UQUdj_FPF-7q0wKO5rl3SIqPSbtO6OAoi7z0N9shL2SKZ_fN0Y4M4L5v5VhwpCnHnWt2UD7DFeFCM83infu2XrD2ZBxoaB43Ydnl-WFnG5W-b_7jdULnkf9TbsnGdtgN0lVJ_jwkS_1KMIrD3b95g%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_e=SEkjy06IKkloAEtg_88V0nrlqvYcRYSDisW_YWd3f2vGlWcE5Eqb-C1IJ3An9obR6SxAcTOQR7fHmCnnTGLsHkePuc9fbVFjSBzr7T_i5mqSnu9DsIC69DpMhfkeTocbrxxZMYUp3od7P0TdcVyIGw3ZUldvRbwqJFcyUSBNzZMTb8lL0vfj5kKrlNgA-p_7EdbnTZHfjpaQa5gWC9spEzsHSjHsMJ3Sh2zQjknZUkZqNAnb8CKqU7f1joYy8WOwTbiTJ2eOyYoZz70v6ecnNpIkjclZrRvH0wwDPy_E8VKe7zCqTtteAoQQS7v34iqhlBHuRm6RUCz2JdwwWySOqG5yfs8XQP-A5l32aJsgYdw%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=c5e2bf27f14f453cbf7828fb2417bbd4&_t=iDwzCSUUxMiQ_7bCAHEG05O5_9Re2IciuUj1on4NuBqRDEStRrnDLq4Z7nKb-OrnBywuamrZ12c38jCKVO931DXgWtaHgdoRenSfqsYtpTM%3D)

Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out. With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up. Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward. Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle. Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat. Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark. Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster. And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison. Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD). We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) offering to help Mark. This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help. They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge! But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it. This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question: Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family. Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family. Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family. Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF. With deepest gratitude, Becky Wagner P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do. This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others. Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: **can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today?**

Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the **[13 new donors](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dcca5e07587d4efd9ddfc8cd03256b24&_e=RE3op_fV_WxAKUaYMQwsWGV0IoRjaaiKOFfbt84OqEOg5XG82gWoP3xgvJg1aHrvWur_cytKl4MODxGsdVvYZkj7ZGP66wxIDjNrDoyxX3BoZ_CbQCOfQ01Sv2QA3NE_5YhN7OKaMEYu7Gzl6C2zqwn0e23f1m7GBobIMv3dpnyWvvxrqd1CcFJMdeXKKnA3HbxmrdLa71xvd4ZifXL9g-jP68phaDn4HXU-DnXt-sIavGCgXM-6lCq_MeJstOjisxNdHlzlAJvMwSw8J47-CCew0GJ4e6zEbRqDXp2Khd-gnGWCp2_e0uhXuMbdSeZLXRk59xxj-fXjcyah4KI1X-6yg5ecynz3qEv7TW2I7Z78-ol3YyrrcaDbLxR5DAOwPfOE1x-20vtGO-cIeyRmwg%3D%3D)** I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today.
* **I’m new here:** I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message.

* **The 2024 Senate race in Montana** will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate.

* **It can take a long time** to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000.

* **My opponent just announced** that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand.

**In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history.**

Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you that**with every new donation that comes in the door,** the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate.

**[Will you be one of the 13 conservatives I’m looking for today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dcca5e07587d4efd9ddfc8cd03256b24&_e=RE3op_fV_WxAKUaYMQwsWGV0IoRjaaiKOFfbt84OqEOg5XG82gWoP3xgvJg1aHrvWur_cytKl4MODxGsdVvYZkj7ZGP66wxIDjNrDoyxX3BoZ_CbQCOfQ01Sv2QA3NE_5YhN7OKaMEYu7Gzl6C2zqwn0e23f1m7GBobIMv3dpnyWvvxrqd1CcFJMdeXKKnA3HbxmrdLa71xvd4ZifXL9g-jP68phaDn4HXU-DnXt-sIavGCgXM-6lCq_MeJstOjij5xG7y_keTJAmefvcX-SO_S027xees7A-GfASzKeY8LsDf4Fas3HbTvaEWfQJPTzLQytKQXOJXfdzayA4BQa75iYMwnF8B8PqSV_MRMxNH6kD4uNLjNkT_Md0YKc0G5KWXfehnkQfB61P4scqoFqMw%3D%3D)** Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today?

**To recap - **
1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June,
2. Has raised more than $10 million since January,
3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts

The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a **network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years**. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th.

name: Team Rashida
subject: Rashida’s not afraid to fight forwhat’s right:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Rashida Tlaib is leading a massive shift in Congress in support of all human rights. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv1JJrr462l4KHcRietYsWnWYkvOw39rOdAg2rNDD-hLaQfvD_zl-tsHUIC_veSuHANArjyMy3MSqImEyR_wx-vUFVDY_hILOWWv0R7vEZUUibc8MS2up1Vg6rBWXy0Xp1O2TY-Rl-DWuBmk1w4oyMYcCVl_qy0r_qwfBHpyZxf7BiDYcMOxqmfrhfBfuRdJ1E/3y5/1wiFt475RuCpiMtJzYO7Ow/h0/LYv98dPbvWM6v9cTKdgd1X9SMuTGJ28E6lLjRbG116Q)
---
Friend, Today is Rashida’s birthday, and we’re celebrating her dedication to public service and human rights. Rashida’s not afraid to fight for what’s right, even when it’s unpopular among fellow legislators. From taking on the fossil fuel industry to boycotting recent speeches from India’s Prime Minister and Israel’s President, Rashida doesn't back down in doing what is right. This passion for justice was instilled in Rashida from a young age by her grandmother, who friends called “Shamah” or candle. And, when they meet Rashida, they say, “oh boy, you have Shamah in you.” Here is Rashida as a child with her grandmother: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wemk25-BCrr7HLLGhZDRRZFP_ZEDbLuLmvdOWv4pjjmAet3QalTf3moFAHij_-k0wBwlwxUHsDUFgRs5nWLwclIN1SonKDzZK7nRH0n6fUcrT6n0B4tiTAT-NPjp_8ZWB6iFPtIgFKCqODrFwkln9egKVJsHk4jfNBi5T2b1q_sQyCR293PH4oaKxvNu-umQ_G5vrK0RotghDteNpV0eQIaLUXTzmmGG-a1zWU9ACfZHtbY_r_iyk0oNZ5HILQ1jbX6mGxedzwL02vpWRwjafFPfh821lGe4JHfkewUUoSFMBWkrNIR4WP4Eg8eVTvtIvsEjFmDN8NaO061R4Mm4AJ/3y5/1wiFt475RuCpiMtJzYO7Ow/h1/mrlWfOCBydvZqaXYSADh8b1dDG1_ba4V5YftrfEDm0c) **Rashida is holding human rights abusers**** _and_****corporate polluters accountable, fighting for our rights—including the right to drink clean water and breathe clean air—and making sure that all families can live safely and thrive.** Growing up in Southwest Detroit, Rashida thought it was normal that it smelled like rotten eggs from corporate pollution nearby, that her friends had asthma, that she couldn’t play outside on some days because it was too polluted. Rashida now knows that poverty and pollution are policy choices, and she’s introduced bold policies to make the urgent changes that our communities deserve. With an unhinged far-right taking away our rights, we need Rashida’s outspoken leadership in Congress more than ever. [**Please chip in $5 or more for Rashida’s birthday, so she can stay in Congress fighting for the bold changes we need and deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wemk25-BCrr7HLLGhZDRRZrxmuVUTbWy6mNrrXqEqapDgInG8eOdcn2t7sEqpKHqmhysX85pb7XjKOZsvoLZz0cqW6JenTBUeGFh2ocIfI9J2JYSxGjNDKSCt5M8AzYjggBmcGXldcvasCjwqYTrO944jssWiwL5akpCsgKTSV7ZPk_C74smtkRMN3qtTY6lh6AR5Hs6SFW2ro6MT5P-4Iy7j81m4Y57tK6mRqGftVVd1-Ej5H9kKWSbat5Fx9CPH9Ua9VFjMuYQZ-8L0kw9uJUnvJnqUDlTh19GgoeIdoOS2xp0_eXnNGmDBvQxyxHOURE5GpQlUSLuMyNmPB1ZAq/3y5/1wiFt475RuCpiMtJzYO7Ow/h2/nzu8ZD8BF5gGoSyUbub0S27d2jEFzez-VVQTh7SukM0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wemk25-BCrr7HLLGhZDRRZJwmUN8bCfB8dtJqMyBExXNYPoyQaQDcCxcNLFC9wG7A9uK9SmEDMXr8ixcUswmX3CRr5mkJAa_alktFX1kb3HTpRhy6Ycr_vYcOVSIZd4f58yTx1xthvSRHNWupmm4T8u2fMkME8CVEsdYgI63hBwl0wPHNXGW_jgivR-cRSl_GgrNnqtBvHhrojv1ZEU0rqfIqXvpFK9JR29MOHmYZAHOAVhvywtnr9ww-9ewATF0ZF9iGJCSez-DLsjEdBrtPPeQ7iRbavRdx_RwlWFx9Qnsok0kpFz5nPlQcs4qEzz-Er2t_NgOEeEqF5Cb9L_woNpk66d-JOKJZYF5J2XOMnlloD_nZRevex3pp521C0AMi1QkDoHyJLClPxH5cBouZG/3y5/1wiFt475RuCpiMtJzYO7Ow/h3/cOhHBSjk2ksoYNgIREYuLdn4WZnTysM_1rqcfGnaYl4)
