clean_body: Rashida Tlaib is leading a massive shift in Congress in support of all human rights. | | | Friend, Today is Rashida’s birthday, and we’re celebrating her dedication to public service and human rights. Rashida’s not afraid to fight for what’s right, even when it’s unpopular among fellow legislators. From taking on the fossil fuel industry to boycotting recent speeches from India’s Prime Minister and Israel’s President, Rashida doesn't back down in doing what is right. This passion for justice was instilled in Rashida from a young age by her grandmother, who friends called “Shamah” or candle. And, when they meet Rashida, they say, “oh boy, you have Shamah in you.” Here is Rashida as a child with her grandmother: Rashida is holding human rights abusers andcorporate polluters accountable, fighting for our rights—including the right to drink clean water and breathe clean air—and making sure that all families can live safely and thrive. Growing up in Southwest Detroit, Rashida thought it was normal that it smelled like rotten eggs from corporate pollution nearby, that her friends had asthma, that she couldn’t play outside on some days because it was too polluted. Rashida now knows that poverty and pollution are policy choices, and she’s introduced bold policies to make the urgent changes that our communities deserve. With an unhinged far-right taking away our rights, we need Rashida’s outspoken leadership in Congress more than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Here’s a photo from Rashida’s youth outside her childhood home in Southwest Detroit: A true public servant, Rashida is rooted in and dedicated to her community. She’s leading in Congress on providing transformative constituent services for her district’s residents, and has started training her fellow Members of Congress about how to set up effective constituent services in their districts. Her groundbreaking legislation often starts with local working groups of people on the ground who personally understand how urgent it is to change the unjust status quo. Many of our neighbors are rationing their medication, struggling to pay bills to stay in their homes, and going to bed hungry. In the wealthiest country in the history of the world, this is shameful. So Rashida’s leading the fight in Congress to end childhood poverty and medical debt, to replace all lead pipes in the U.S. and protect public health over corporate profits, and to ensure human rights around the world—including in Palestine. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship
body:
But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that.

| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true? _I know I don 't._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that. That's why we're suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we're asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government--collusion aimed to censor American citizens. But we need your help today. **[Which is why I'm asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O'Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a0dd3794e544746979b6b1bb591a455&_e=xOseMfUAkO4lGg_6MezRBObcGR1n87TiVXxuI0PCDGSgWCRXvc2yrO2Y2_wyILBtpW58w3GbfHfnvpBVxtQDWyGJMJmgJZBy57HJhYFqcAOhsWOiPnIz7YROQUS6vIrN8Ap3C4JGWP_FYdpYISvziNNs6lypPbT3fLCrcD98vbFuOvVzJbUlHEYx8oB5agt8XCIKH2bv2VLyP3KT3LgU3dJDe3lqGmVi0PeT1IP1vdt0ykOGYJ3CVaEecMuKlww9fD9JI8ypWkPL9iUocjY5jSLVzvsYlojzltMYsfDM4RfB2qc6yyBUAnRvwi7d889etVXzSOJb_eAeEHjBvw9tT8nQHN7qw4qbMKDt3p8x_O_-MJTPOL29nDHrcEDHgolZ)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left. And these people think it's up to them to decide what's true. They think it's up to them to decide what you are and aren't allowed to say, to believe, and to share. And if you dare challenge what they've decided is true, they'll label you an agent of "misinformation" and shut you up. _That 's what happened to our client._ If you're on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him. **His name is Rogan O 'Handley, but you might know him as "@DC_Draino."** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020--he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit. That's when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla's office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan's tweets. I'm writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter of support for Rogan O'Handley and his First Amendment rights?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a0dd3794e544746979b6b1bb591a455&_e=xOseMfUAkO4lGg_6MezRBObcGR1n87TiVXxuI0PCDGSgWCRXvc2yrO2Y2_wyILBtpW58w3GbfHfnvpBVxtQDWyGJMJmgJZBy57HJhYFqcAOhsWOiPnIz7YROQUS6vIrN8Ap3C4JGWP_FYdpYISvziNNs6lypPbT3fLCrcD98vbFuOvVzJbUlHEYx8oB5agt8XCIKH2bv2VLyP3KT3LgU3Xlt4YqlyVpwk04wqL3Jz3SCwVkBUrG1Zwp8MOE8ObQaUTTmqHYgJeSwgsW5Kz7tmAdTMLLclZ6Z1j8Tgii1AicCni5x_EmPPWlK43152Vy1GTHTUuATXntgGdOJZwqRrDa2nfbUj_t-0XmoDJZteZnSQM-KwlcnGILYH-zlXhyC)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it's bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform. If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it. **And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we've faced some devastating defeats. But we haven't given up because we know what this case means to the American people. And we're counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O'Handley and together let's put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a0dd3794e544746979b6b1bb591a455&_e=xOseMfUAkO4lGg_6MezRBObcGR1n87TiVXxuI0PCDGSgWCRXvc2yrO2Y2_wyILBtpW58w3GbfHfnvpBVxtQDWyGJMJmgJZBy57HJhYFqcAOhsWOiPnIz7YROQUS6vIrN8Ap3C4JGWP_FYdpYISvziNNs6lypPbT3fLCrcD98vbFuOvVzJbUlHEYx8oB5agt8XCIKH2bv2VLyP3KT3LgU3VYXUn6-bwwzNjkaFCRfB8bhZDdkc4yB8ToX1XfwLvc4IFBE5PlvtwKsDpqRDwTpt_ejjta8n2k2Q_dgwEHe1LpwkSZm2FSvni57OdDVbrKqU49SQSlSBuwCjAT02-3lC_Np2Kwjzlaw6MySXnylDuADRUeky7sT63EdQeSEQiZG)** It's really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what's allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country \- Without free speech, we can't have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---

subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7827cf31c528444581ed5a136a099f4e&_e=FYO9p7TOdfEX0VRlX6Yfrcp2SBUufABYpM6twbZ2VWYU2Z-8d2Z5fZvRaW7DbMUFkeFmLqfqgmfxSJcNe7Dvrni7esiXpzRmgTqtPiNa_nqITA8Q6RmndaFn75wAaTktuodyyVXjTPsLueAMUeUUDbz6qR1nNqdE-KD3nAqq8-tYhmqQ7mG0WD6wz-cC7B_HLmAoTdUOOuok_kkK_MddJJLr_vUyitJoLziRTG7BjQJz7PgSX0evAaCTK7y1g8JX3uVvx9UohWbpHFvGawy-oG82jhrEEn_gDy7i9xpG_Xs%3D)

We’ve officially endorsed Angela Alsobrooks in the Senate race for Maryland’s open seat! Maryland is NOT a secure blue state. Holding onto this seat could be the difference between losing and expanding our majority in the Senate. This is going to be a tough race, and we need to show up on Day 1. Angela Alsobrooks is the first Black woman to serve as Prince George's County Executive in Maryland's history, and if she wins in 2024, she would be the first Black woman to represent Maryland in the Senate.You know we love to power a history maker to victory! As our campaign puts together our strategy, we want to make sure your voice gets heard. | | |
---
Hi Peter -- Quentin here, Principal Deputy Campaign Manager for the Biden-Harris reelection campaign. You may have seen the announcement that Team Biden-Harris raised more than _$72 million_ last quarter. That’s amazing, Peter -- and your support helped make it possible. **Thank you.** That’s why I wanted to come to you directly with a different request _(no, I’m not going to ask you to make a contribution)_. [I’d love your input on our team’s strategy survey. I know firsthand that Joe and Kamala love nothing more than sitting down with supporters like you and getting a chance to hear your thoughts. And while they won’t get a chance to meet every single supporter over these next few months, surveys like these go a long way in ensuring your voice is heard as our campaign puts together our strategy.
**[So if you have a moment today, I hope you’ll share your input.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl6pemHGweo0nMkWOHiGToAdTYa3Ns0i00uCdNrbXVl2COtKd8Agfru25B02k8sNy3QNedxbvS8YAY_NZ1s1sjihV2AUH1NFv5sEbZfr5l9zjtfdSd-QY325102EEwDrXANfHV5QiDGDuUE2oGDgw4zFSIuqJHbbIWh5Yx9Mea3jk0hP9oLPN_CyzFjuAyROYuZUZN4xSefDmyusYTRhzt5TSBmBLC7ZclnOqMBdrjsFzgMNa0OFrnczSEVJlxUwwlpjioV92FpkMd-szSsw7p4WUyz-UB98fN912ee06EFZiWJ_wfC8Qcyx9qiv2mfdQXi3nxJOhyV-_ejFD9YG2GQz19_DmVXJle5MBLhNBQ_EM2wxvicxywEg2nyO_oddBE/3y5/4x8fr8vfSNWL0osTDps2XQ/h2/E7V80rh6-KWt-dNEedxZikEeVgtDAIcdqMsmU7nm1UE)**
Thanks for everything,
Quentin
Quentin Fulks
Principal Deputy Campaign Manager
Biden-Harris 2024

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Illinois Settles Voter Roll Lawsuit, Agrees to Make Voter Registration List Information Public
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it settled a federal election integrity lawsuit on behalf of the Illinois Conservative Union against the state of Illinois, the Illinois State Board of Elections, and its director, which grants access to the current centralized statewide list of registered voters for the state for the past 15 elections.

| | |

The administration has already used COVID-19 as an excuse to postpone the security measure’s implementation, asserting that more time—two years—is needed to address the lingering impacts of the pandemic on the ability to obtain a compliant license. It is important to note that states had many years to comply long before COVID-19. We frankly can’t imagine any good reason to deny security to this child,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | U.S. unemployment is low and stable, yet the Biden administration keeps giving states millions of dollars to boost the number of minorities—especially non-English speaking or limited-English proficient—that sign up for government jobless benefits. The goal is to address racial disparities and promote “equitable access” to the program. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration will again delay enforcing a law requiring driver’s license security standards designed to avert another terrorist attack because it could cause “undue burden and confusion” for those using licenses that fail to meet federal standards. The administration has already used COVID-19 as an excuse to postpone the security measure’s implementation, asserting that more time—two years—is needed to address the lingering impacts of the pandemic on the ability to obtain a compliant license. It is important to note that states had many years to comply long before COVID-19. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner While the administration has stepped up security around other key figures in the public eye recently, such as Trump special counsel Jack Smith, the U.S. Secret Service does not appear to be providing security for Navy Joan Roberts or Lunden Roberts despite at least one documented threat. name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I'll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c984a26731474626af99e0b011be5d0e&_e=sHZ_xwiTMiq_2R7BOWiQBb8JfrH2Vgf2wfwcxhL4w6KBfFjE8lb8f8_2rvJ7EW9OeUyicw8sSh2_dDPlhVy1a5dKA3IO1LnugLtgWOKs28ehNq0abWIvpjMo3t5XzJkYvCtPr1vBMSTJyaxmx_A-sLgPzLmXmluicXNbP_sQLk-LjQ2biMuzt5380BP7b49-tc2j3W0tKauHKIByIRGETdXirwJ1tP-0psJX6WZ93f2FMLZvorX6XoSGz8Bn1leU)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c984a26731474626af99e0b011be5d0e&_e=sHZ_xwiTMiq_2R7BOWiQBb8JfrH2Vgf2wfwcxhL4w6KBfFjE8lb8f8_2rvJ7EW9OeUyicw8sSh2_dDPlhVy1a5dKA3IO1LnugLtgWOKs28een1Gbvb1_JTi5LI-whEnV4diVbi8G8XUDQrADZIZU817OvsWxwowyf5_zsg1W44WLlMEz7J3adoNkhFfFD_UaqyojodD0D-q0WFX4mKfJNYpECGG-e6TpcCrFD6xFNNZlKAXOEVQAMXkvMnqtXqcr)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. Peter,

It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: **can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today?**

Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the **[13 new donors](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d6ced132b0e412ba134c75f819515f4&_e=oPbxjqyQMgfESiiTHy2Z2E9QL4ztCkrXpU2IX9JC_8JXlKHePke5BQMEGW4Hh_nDxyZuoSMQib-sGTUoW6pHjBjFrh1c3qQHzAo9BhmJ1t0W4R3u0jBbSlOvd-C2WZY0WxR8VDQs9nTpmmuEghft0ma95co0u6u-6WtHiV7tfp-lnP9hVR0e9ZG0FyS7pJtefekjI7Hi8alSufxcjxDiyA1Dn0aF1qSeuIocxeXs2pB3zWvHrYH4xGh_TXp0IH7nqG-oj4HsKaOSQLdhIAXLwLhJXSV50voNvdzx3TZAh2kqqImUVJolGznNl2im-XljRzLlzEI4iIE-au7luYOjE38VxPuv14ggAgY88DfeOTxuDcan3uIKg2oYjofPD98_MsCkEojDj7721RV87jNekA%3D%3D)** I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today.
* **I’m new here:** I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message.

* **The 2024 Senate race in Montana** will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate.

* **It can take a long time** to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000.

* **My opponent just announced** that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand.

**In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history.**

Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you that**with every new donation that comes in the door,** the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate.

**[Will you be one of the 13 conservatives I’m looking for today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d6ced132b0e412ba134c75f819515f4&_e=oPbxjqyQMgfESiiTHy2Z2E9QL4ztCkrXpU2IX9JC_8JXlKHePke5BQMEGW4Hh_nDxyZuoSMQib-sGTUoW6pHjBjFrh1c3qQHzAo9BhmJ1t0W4R3u0jBbSlOvd-C2WZY0WxR8VDQs9nTpmmuEghft0ma95co0u6u-6WtHiV7tfp-lnP9hVR0e9ZG0FyS7pJtefekjI7Hi8alSufxcjxDiyA1Dn0aF1qSeuIocxeXs2pB3zWvHrYH4xGh_TXp0IH7noqK60Y5yJwRp4a-huiRExSW0kzM7jySxP_9RSf6ZPUwJmIhGYVstNHPMX6rfBdH2qGuUC-dY8kKAoCUixybLHaMoIx2tF8aEu2GSMc9AMrovzl4NFOReLEW9pegi9kCSjibda4DAZusDci5i7-OkxQ%3D%3D)** Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today?
[**HELP ME GROW MY DONOR LIST
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d6ced132b0e412ba134c75f819515f4&_e=oPbxjqyQMgfESiiTHy2Z2E9QL4ztCkrXpU2IX9JC_8JXlKHePke5BQMEGW4Hh_nDxyZuoSMQib-sGTUoW6pHjBjFrh1c3qQHzAo9BhmJ1t0W4R3u0jBbSlOvd-C2WZY0WxR8VDQs9nTpmmuEghft0ma95co0u6u-6WtHiV7tfp-lnP9hVR0e9ZG0FyS7pJtefekjI7Hi8alSufxcjxDiyA1Dn0aF1qSeuIocxeXs2pB3zWvHrYH4xGh_TXp0IH7nRcXPz0pAdt8kelsVEIFTsYyhBjdeikj_tf0F4IzRUUgMHsMsD1WCb-Kv_q12is8DjXO6SFmpVsxd5t-be_enl_zNpTy6_kjtd3a4nB5DhL0cA2RyztXl6yUS_Km98tkZVxDgzEV01b8bkyXWKDyl-g%3D%3D)
**To recap - **
1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June,
2. Has raised more than $10 million since January,
3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts

The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a **network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years**. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th.

The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. **[I know the middle of summer isn’t the best time to be asking for help as this is likely a busy time for you but having the support of grassroots conservatives in Montana and around the country is too important to my campaign not to try](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d6ced132b0e412ba134c75f819515f4&_e=oPbxjqyQMgfESiiTHy2Z2E9QL4ztCkrXpU2IX9JC_8JXlKHePke5BQMEGW4Hh_nDxyZuoSMQib-sGTUoW6pHjBjFrh1c3qQHzAo9BhmJ1t0W4R3u0jBbSlOvd-C2WZY0WxR8VDQs9nTpmmuEghft0ma95co0u6u-6WtHiV7tfp-lnP9hVR0e9ZG0FyS7pJtefekjI7Hi8alSufxcjxDiyA1Dn0aF1qSeuIocxeXs2pB3zWvHrYH4xGh_TXp0IH7nACSS_gWzPzcSXwZKpvqY2466fxNBiPbZuhl47-Q4CgPr6zXFHVpZjjiwGqeMTYAKSyLB8tMwiBIXlkLrDimHUH6q_O1Ole07XLEJOmycH-qdE-Z55mRM4uF965XkDsTHznj901EaNN7lsR20xi2Ysw%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the 13 new donors I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today. | | Peter, It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today? Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today. I’m new here: I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message. The 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. It can take a long time to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000. My opponent just announced that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand. In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history. Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you thatwith every new donation that comes in the door, the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate. Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today? To recap - 1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June, 2. Has raised more than $10 million since January, 3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th. The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. . Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b81c27f8849e4e8eb9b9315c743d0a21&_e=5Gu-WaQhC_CuWL8nVlsCgvwFBidsLFjIsBV3QSYfe1fskbCpZzHwSzqUmdkBulZOE5_tTJPQMQvDqQUzFXTB80nrAt-q-4yHVdGh-Xb1TZ-n192rF0ZVtzdQQCD0H-40h7zIlZSeaSCBrbo9wCVkHdbnCBMQUoABxQ8z-IrFVzvAQN_Jm1jE34JZnOlDRKBhllHEBawMFthHZdPg8I8oprzp9an-Pthrty-Av8mDUI3Y99lHrwSTS32UWQclpf-_lqH93lmhkwdxaABhd97pEJNRH6InRm7VFsUZbBMqh0uVSqMRiGMkWTjdIJ-rCfjVfOvxJGKaA0qOhx0IFCT_6z-39M5WuA2VdmF9A6usPzTdQ_AcSKsfADbmYtEMSrBokzhm-t16KiyYA8qrpxpsWw%3D%3D)

Friend,

We’ve been hard at work doing everything we can to keep Ohio blue and Greg in Congress. _And thanks to the support of this grassroots team, things are heading in the right direction._

**Here’s the good news: _The Cook Political Report_ just changed our race rating from “Toss Up” to “Lean Democratic.”**

**But here’s the bad news:** Now that Greg is in a better position, extremist Republicans will be doubling down and coming at us with everything they’ve got. **More money. More resources. More misleading and dangerous attacks.**

clean_body: Friend, We’ve been hard at work doing everything we can to keep Ohio blue and Greg in Congress. | = Friend, We’ve been hard at work doing everything we can to keep Ohio blue and Greg in Congress. And thanks to the support of this grassroots team, things are heading in the right direction. Here’s the good news: The Cook Political Report just changed our race rating from “Toss Up” to “Lean Democratic.” But here’s the bad news: Now that Greg is in a better position, extremist Republicans will be doubling down and coming at us with everything they’ve got. More money. More resources. More misleading and dangerous attacks. They will do anything to unseat Greg and flip OH-01 back to red, so we can’t sit back and wait – we have to prepare for the challenges ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = We appreciate your support, Team Landsman | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. name: Sara, Team Mondaire
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi there!

You haven’t heard from me yet, so I thought I’d take a moment to introduce myself. I’m Sara, Mondaire’s deputy campaign manager. Let me tell you why I’m fired up to send Mondaire back to Congress.

I’ve been in politics a while, and I can tell you candidates like Mondaire Jones don’t come around too often. Not only did he beat the odds to win his first Congressional race in 2020 to become the first gay, Black person ever elected to Congress, he put in the work and was named the most **legislatively active freshman Congressman.**

He’s not in politics to line his pockets with lobbyist money, and he’s not running to make headlines — he’s running to make life easier for the community that raised him.

[**On July 31, we’ll be facing our first end-of-month fundraising deadline, but our fundraising numbers since launching this campaign have slipped a little. To make up the gap and get us back on track to hit our end-of-month goal, we need every supporter who reads this email to chip in **For Mondaire, policy is personal.** When you have representatives like him in your corner, your voice will be heard. Whether that’s lowering the cost of prescription drugs, protecting LGBTQ+ rights, expanding access to reproductive care, or investing in our kids’ education — Mondaire will fight like hell to get it done.

Big Oil and corporate PACs are spending millions to keep their puppet, Mike Lawler, in office. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Mondaire’s in this for the right reasons, which is why he’s running a grassroots campaign — but we need your continued support to flip NY-17 and elect Mondaire.

[**Will you pitch in $5, or whatever you can to get Mondaire in a strong position ahead of our FIRST end-of-month deadline to blow our fundraising goal out of the water and show Mike Lawler what he’s up against?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66975861/418231652/13284604?refcode=em23_230724_preEOM_fndd_gq_act___ST_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230724_preEOM_fndd_gq_act___ST_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4547aff2-622a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ3YWZmMi02MjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7fEZOkVRrpGZx1KyFC7Q5cXopcDduAu_JMjdfWmaaM=)

clean_body: Hi there! You haven’t heard from me yet, so I thought I’d take a moment to introduce myself. I’m Sara, Mondaire’s deputy campaign manager. Let me tell you why I’m fired up to send Mondaire back to Congress. I’ve been in politics a while, and I can tell you candidates like Mondaire Jones don’t come around too often. Not only did he beat the odds to win his first Congressional race in 2020 to become the first gay, Black person ever elected to Congress, he put in the work and was named the most legislatively active freshman Congressman. He’s not in politics to line his pockets with lobbyist money, and he’s not running to make headlines — he’s running to make life easier for the community that raised him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- For Mondaire, policy is personal. When you have representatives like him in your corner, your voice will be heard. Whether that’s lowering the cost of prescription drugs, protecting LGBTQ+ rights, expanding access to reproductive care, or investing in our kids’ education — Mondaire will fight like hell to get it done. Big Oil and corporate PACs are spending millions to keep their puppet, Mike Lawler, in office. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Mondaire’s in this for the right reasons, which is why he’s running a grassroots campaign — but we need your continued support to flip NY-17 and elect Mondaire. = I’m so grateful you’re on this team, Sara Deputy Campaign Manager Mondaire for Congress = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS

| | Peter, did you know that Virginia is the _last_ southern state without a post-_Roe v. Wade_ abortion ban?

That's all thanks to the _narrow_ Democratic majority in the state Senate — and the legislators in that chamber who refuse to pass anti-choice legislation. But, with state legislative elections coming up this November, you better believe Virginia Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip that Senate chamber and use the majority to attack abortion access. **EMILYs List is _in this fight_. We've endorsed Russet Perry — a Democratic pro-choice woman running in one of Virginia's _most competitive_ state Senate districts this year.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66976174/418232612/-522292402?refcode=julyemail&sourceid=1051532&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjJhZTc0Ni02NDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oz0qA6byBthrDPU2gBK4yp686enZ-j8k50_HyUtCO10=)** This seat — in Virginia's 31st Senate District — is a tipping point seat that **will likely decide the future of abortion in Virginia**. The stakes are _that_ high.

And Russet Perry is the very best candidate for this fight: She's a former prosecutor and former CIA officer, a mom to two public school students, and a longtime advocate in her community. Russet's Republican opponent, who just moved to the 31st District from Washington, D.C. last October, is the son of a billionaire — and he's already dropped _$1 million_ into this race.

**We can't let Russet Perry get outspent, Peter. Donate now to *directly support* her campaign and help protect abortion access for over _four million women_ across Virginia:**

| | This is your chance to be part of something different, my friend! [_**Add your name to Will's citizen endorsement list.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=9030ff5a2863495980b7772b1c39de82&_e=7xBD5x75AuPhmH7X9SBNuAPrq64BwrEdcnFVelQ3cY8cj225JYIC3kvwB8mx4EfATiU8RPjRAdy2z1l1JhsC4HyHozsMXGkLdGb7khsIGBLEhs1NxZdc-g50viNLRMPKTdjpFO_NomxfSE6OElJnVHl8R8G7PQQCZkGMk61N7vLL8mnjsFOrxKJXWJ1zh5J7OiMztYuBUDMyeN04NOBdClt2hH3OIyV1YqdJn3s5zAiAwzyOzC-8B0t5U4yP_SsAadhI20vuxI3VYTrXQxybAWvw2iLLBL5oSeWua_lbWs5NO3Q4-cKw5ZxB15Jbke03eHSZYHHxQYAN23HmFs_amqfqd6G5de5-Lb5O6_XgKmk%3D) We're better together and we need to show it! Will is starting a movement and is focused on issues other candidates are ignoring, including:
* **National Security:** Will is committed to safeguarding our country against all threats.
* **Advancing AI:** He knows we need to foster responsible AI innovation and development.
* **School Safety:** He's focused on bringing secure and inclusive learning environments for our children.
* **Countering Putin:** He is putting defending our democracy and protecting national interests first.

**[Become a part of Team Hurd by adding your name to his endorsements list today to help forge a better way.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=9030ff5a2863495980b7772b1c39de82&_e=7xBD5x75AuPhmH7X9SBNuAPrq64BwrEdcnFVelQ3cY8cj225JYIC3kvwB8mx4EfATiU8RPjRAdy2z1l1JhsC4HyHozsMXGkLdGb7khsIGBLEhs1NxZdc-g50viNLRMPKTdjpFO_NomxfSE6OElJnVHl8R8G7PQQCZkGMk61N7vLL8mnjsFOrxKJXWJ1zh5J7OiMztYuBUDMyeN04NOBdCsnlNotd5ixdItkk21eOga0nzVDOF0JbJNGmwqx-2WoMojfgBbb0GfwC8Iuo4nPETyNQJvRnL0sTh_lIe__Kizznp4B_-56AiCYTzDGNrxUVXTkV2H4aQYwhWQj5er_0vMjnf5P0izL5EPusODAbJLE%3D)** Thank you for your support!_**Hurd for America**_ _**P.S. Don't forget to follow Will on social media to keep up with his campaign!**_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: URGENT PLASTIC PETITION: Sign now to save sea turtles from plastic pollution
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893677?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED: Plastic is overwhelming our planet, destroying our oceans, and putting people at risk — but the U.S. government has NOT taken bold enough action!** [**Add your name to demand federal solutions to the plastic crisis NOW >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893678?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _**Wouldn’t it be wonderful to be a sea turtle swimming through the open ocean, Friend?**_ Just imagine flapping your flippers while gliding across the gentle current just below the waves... Sea turtles are easily one of the most beloved marine animals, and our oceans just wouldn’t be the same without these treasured reptiles. But sadly, nearly all species of this precious animal are classified as **vulnerable, endangered, or even critically endangered** — meaning sea turtles are at serious risk of __**EXTINCTION.**__ **Human impact is one of the single biggest causes of sea turtles deaths —** and that includes __**PLASTIC POLLUTION**__ , which is responsible for killing **OVER A MILLION marine species every year.** _Friend, sea turtles and other vulnerable marine animals need you to speak for them today in defense of our precious oceans:_[**Will you add your name right now to SAVE sea turtles and PROTECT our oceans from rampant plastic pollution?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893680?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Just one single piece of plastic can KILL a sea turtle.** Plastic poses a threat to sea turtles at _every stage of life_ — from crawling through plastic waste on the beach as hatchlings, to swimming through it, to mistaking it for food. These innocent sea turtles become _**entangled, suffocate, and often choke and die**_ from all the rampant plastic overtaking the ocean.
_**EVERY SINGLE MINUTE**_ , an entire garbage truck’s worth of plastic is dumped into our oceans, threatening to **WIPE OUT** precious marine life like dolphins, sea turtles, and coral reefs. Friend, if plastic pollution continues at this rate, it could literally _destroy our entire planet_ in what experts are calling the _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE.**_
Meanwhile, greedy plastic corporations and their friends in the fossil fuel industry continue to rake in profits without any regard for their environmental destruction. Industrial-size plastics factories spew alarming amounts of **toxic pollutants and global-warming emissions into our atmosphere** , disproportionately leaving the nearby BIPOC communities to bear the brunt of the **serious health risks.**
Friend, we can’t let Big Plastic and Big Oil continue putting our planet in danger. But time is running out to __**STOP THE PLASTIC APOCALYPSE**__ — and it’s going to take _**A LOT**_ of grassroots willpower to convince the Biden administration to stand up to these powerful industries. That’s why we need **5,103 more activist signatures** on our petition **by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT** if we’re going to have a strong enough impact. [**Can we count on you to sign our urgent plastic pollution petition right away?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893681?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1893680?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**

subject: Mississippi’s corruption scandal is just one example of our leadership’s waste

body:
If you think an Attorney General can’t make a big difference, think again

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66977382/418235925/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230724TD_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNhNTFiNmItNjYyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MRukcFDxYtNUVW_az7b4e2YQgIWIR26W4KnyTahL4hM=) Peter, by now, you’ve probably heard a lot about Mississippi’s runaway corruption that’s seen millions of taxpayer dollars given away to political insiders and celebrity athletes. But did you know that the waste doesn’t stop there?

Mississippi Attorney General Lynn Fitch continues to throw away state resources that could (and should!) go towards addressing our state’s poverty crisis. Instead, Fitch is again failing at her job by forcing Secretary of State Michael Watson to hire private attorneys to protect against unauthorized use of state tidal lands – a task that brings in millions of dollars to local governments, and should fall to the AG’s office and the many attorneys already on the state’s payroll.

Peter, this is simply the latest in a long line of waste and misuse of state funds from our Attorney General’s office. _We’re supporting Greta Kemp Martin in her campaign for AG because she’s spent her entire career fighting for Mississippi families and communities_. When elected, she’ll prioritize people over politics and money – unlike our current leadership.

**That’s why we need you standing with us, Peter.**

Our current AG is a dangerous, anti-choice GOP politician with deep pockets, and we’re only a few months away from Election Day. By kicking her out of office, we can create real change for Mississippians who need an advocate in our state government. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Tough guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley and I both took an oath to defend our democracy. I kept mine, he didn’t.
#
Peter,
As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh Hawley did when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. **But unlike him, I’ve kept my oath.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35263?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35263?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX)**
On January 6th, Josh Hawley tried to convince the world that he’s a tough guy by raising his fist outside the U.S. Capitol. But when he ran away from the same people he claimed to be fighting for just hours earlier, he proved to all of us exactly what he really is — just a fraud and a coward.
**It’s time Missourians had a real warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in Washington.** That’s why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley, and it’s why I need your help today.
**We can’t afford to let a fraud and coward like Josh Hawley spend six more years representing Missouri in the U.S. Senate.[So Peter, will you add your first donation of $10 or anything at all right now so we can defeat him, flip this seat, and save our democracy?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35263?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35264?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35263?refcode=em20230724-3446&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3446%2E614464%2Ex6S3fX)

body:
Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

|

Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3cf5bc254eb8414c9596e5f8c7753d80&_e=sRyeszHp4R8lfHRABHXbMkLcjLqvw8B6WotQ33D3LrfCQ088UvbmKarknnocTP84AvijYOTSMYLuBbkE_LYTF9wM7K-28iudr5JEn3Inrwp0qGaJSu3CUjSELRru2vGhtzwmnC4gfClrjGktB4vhQRU_HsxYSjNptScTJL_PpMkqa9ns-NJiF6kO8fGDOTBjhT5mU-a_ZAZKqVUVIwiQiNaCQcaiRqeGk5bnqZJgvfgrw6DK3Kj4hqO2cz0_SrTTjSZ3eazxBOs0QuyfPtYIEcLfrRu1U9ZExziRtyv65VEU8DeH-SEQRkklwOvVmTNnM-VFyQuHk7Dn7zmcVRYFuht806AbBMFXDl28W1vP6nEGedz8rDR40YQV0NiBkO61ZGeaDR9edGwyfCZblsNkiQ%3D%3D)**

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. | | Fellow American, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

subject: A Family Full of Crooks
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-afhtlk-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! Have you heard[ _my new favorite song_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-y/) from Jason Aldean? Join us tonight for the July [_CaucusRoom Council Meeting at 6 pm MT_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-j/).**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-t/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-i/) **A Family Full of Crooks** The DOJ attorney who has led the years-long investigation into Hunter Biden **[is the son of a crooked IRS agent](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-d/)**. Also, **[Hunter visited his sugar daddy](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-h/)** and there may have been some drug use involved. **See You in Court** The DOJ sent a letter to Texas Governor Abbott**[threatening legal action if the State does not remove the recently installed floating border barrier.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-k/)**_I love Gov Abbott's response!_ **Biden Targets Another Household Appliance** A **[new regulation mandating high-efficiency standards](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-u/)** for your water heater will be good for the environment (_allegedly_) but bad for consumer choice. **The Party of What?** California Representative Eric Swalwell is completely mixed up about the GOP. **[He also claims to have been raised by Republicans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-o/)**.

**Biden Living in a Fantasy World** Economic experts are**[calling out Biden for touting the success of Bidenomics](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-x/) **and taking credit for low unemployment and decreasing inflation. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Vrooooom!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-c/)**
* Oh**[Dear.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-q/)**
* Even**[Gary](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-a/).**
* Just a**[misunderstanding](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afhtlk-trhiujldw-f/).**

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: I'm humbled and honored, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
I have some exciting news, Peter.
Rep. Bob Freeman and Rep. Bo Mitchell have endorsed me for Nashville Mayor!
I want to tell you every detail, but I know you don't have a lot of time. While I've got you here, would you consider taking 30 seconds to join esteemed Representatives Freeman and Mitchell in supporting our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
SUPPORT HEIDI >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Here’s what Rep. Bob Freeman had to say:
“I’ve worked with Heidi for the last several years and find her to be extremely thoughtful and hardworking as a senator. Those same skills and qualities will translate very well as Mayor of Nashville. We need that type of person who will go out and fight for us, and she’s the one that will do it.”
I'm humbled and honored that our impressive list of endorsements continues to grow by the day. But with early voting already underway, we have to act as soon as possible to secure the resources to power us through Election Day.
Not only that, but today is the LAST day of the public financial disclosure period and we need to put up strong numbers to head into this final GOTV push on the right foot.
Peter, Rep. Bob Freeman and Rep. Bo Mitchellin know how important it is that we have strong fundraising numbers right now. Can you join them in supporting our movement to put Nashville first with a contribution of any amount? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
GIVE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230724_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: About my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I know change is possible in a single generation. I have my dad to thank for that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66980283/418239259/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNlZDk0MS02OTJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRuUIS7ybycy3DrKDe3C-nbET4J4v0ZPBZZUnRPNSEI=)
---
Hi friend, it’s Andrea. I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me lately about our critical fundraising deadlines or the latest developments in our re-election campaign.

And while those are certainly important, I’m reaching out about something a little different today: My dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66980285/418239261/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNlZDk0MS02OTJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRuUIS7ybycy3DrKDe3C-nbET4J4v0ZPBZZUnRPNSEI=) _My father, Roberto._
**I know change is possible in a single generation, because that’s the story of my dad.**

My dad immigrated from Mexico in 1950. He worked in the fields right alongside my grandparents whenever he wasn’t in school, picking tomatoes and cotton.

After a few years of high school, my dad marched down to the local recruiting office and signed up to join the U.S. Marine Corps. He served two tours in Vietnam and, in exchange for his service, received his U.S. citizenship.

Then in the decades that followed, my dad was able to turn the skills from his service into a good-paying union job that provided a middle-class upbringing for me and my sister.

He never had it easy.**But with hard-work and determination, my dad paved his way from the fields to the middle class. And now, I’m fighting to ensure that every family across Oregon and the nation has that same chance. **

[**In Congress, I’m fighting everyday to level the playing field for families like yours and mine. Whether it’s working to raise the minimum wage, create good-paying union jobs, or lower costs for working families, we have a lot of work to do, so I need you in this fight with me. So please, can I count on you to make a donation to my re-election campaign so I can continue to fight for better opportunities for families like ours?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66980287/418239263/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNlZDk0MS02OTJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRuUIS7ybycy3DrKDe3C-nbET4J4v0ZPBZZUnRPNSEI=)
| _[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66980289/418239265/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNlZDk0MS02OTJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRuUIS7ybycy3DrKDe3C-nbET4J4v0ZPBZZUnRPNSEI=)_
---

_Andrea_

clean_body: I know change is possible in a single generation. I have my dad to thank for that. = Hi friend, it’s Andrea. I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me lately about our critical fundraising deadlines or the latest developments in our re-election campaign. And while those are certainly important, I’m reaching out about something a little different today: My dad. = My father, Roberto. I know change is possible in a single generation, because that’s the story of my dad. My dad immigrated from Mexico in 1950. He worked in the fields right alongside my grandparents whenever he wasn’t in school, picking tomatoes and cotton. After a few years of high school, my dad marched down to the local recruiting office and signed up to join the U.S. Marine Corps. He served two tours in Vietnam and, in exchange for his service, received his U.S. citizenship. Then in the decades that followed, my dad was able to turn the skills from his service into a good-paying union job that provided a middle-class upbringing for me and my sister. He never had it easy.But with hard-work and determination, my dad paved his way from the fields to the middle class. And now, I’m fighting to ensure that every family across Oregon and the nation has that same chance. = | = Thank you, Andrea | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

Sorry for the long email, but this needs some explaining.
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz2PpDAMhn-N6UDB5rOguDvEVVfOtKeQGIg2IWwIGrG_fgUabfv4ee3X0m3WTGcH9W9AXIzeARHoFyAekZ7y8fgXzvTpP9O_5RPna4h_ADGeG_-Y7yUZO2nsRes-0V2BMp9Uwl1etQKpoLZJlq6qG8JyUk1DdcvMUztO-diMI6PIUdWJ6VAgiRoLzIlElVE1yqJUqpRUiqptoBD3oWwKzHEx6wcHLY09M-VdYrslxm2_iw2Aw87qCJzJlbWPlwE4zN7ql4wcUrPu0cQjMuDgXSpVNH5NVTi-gIYjuv-7P4JioH5VFrC6kGNtDgfUj-FNlHSbNPMK1EfWV_quL5DeQuRwBaaok9Dp7WWsNXtVQyHm-xPl3XcAAAD__6Cje9c)

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz2PpDAMhn-N6UDB5rOguDvEVVfOtKeQGIg2IWwIGrG_fgUabfv4ee3X0m3WTGcH9W9AXIzeARHoFyAekZ7y8fgXzvTpP9O_5RPna4h_ADGeG_-Y7yUZO2nsRes-0V2BMp9Uwl1etQKpoLZJlq6qG8JyUk1DdcvMUztO-diMI6PIUdWJ6VAgiRoLzIlElVE1yqJUqpRUiqptoBD3oWwKzHEx6wcHLY09M-VdYrslxm2_iw2Aw87qCJzJlbWPlwE4zN7ql4wcUrPu0cQjMuDgXSpVNH5NVTi-gIYjuv-7P4JioH5VFrC6kGNtDgfUj-FNlHSbNPMK1EfWV_quL5DeQuRwBaaok9Dp7WWsNXtVQyHm-xPl3XcAAAD__6Cje9c)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jz2PpDAMhn-N6UDB5rOguDvEVVfOtKeQGIg2IWwIGrG_fgUabfv4ee3X0m3WTGcH9W9AXIzeARHoFyAekZ7y8fgXzvTpP9O_5RPna4h_ADGeG_-Y7yUZO2nsRes-0V2BMp9Uwl1etQKpoLZJlq6qG8JyUk1DdcvMUztO-diMI6PIUdWJ6VAgiRoLzIlElVE1yqJUqpRUiqptoBD3oWwKzHEx6wcHLY09M-VdYrslxm2_iw2Aw87qCJzJlbWPlwE4zN7ql4wcUrPu0cQjMuDgXSpVNH5NVTi-gIYjuv-7P4JioH5VFrC6kGNtDgfUj-FNlHSbNPMK1EfWV_quL5DeQuRwBaaok9Dp7WWsNXtVQyHm-xPl3XcAAAD__6Cje9c)

School Choice
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

clean_body: Sorry for the long email, but this needs some explaining. Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

clean_body: It’s important that we work together right now to protect the freedom to vote, elect voting rights champions, and stop anti-voter Republicans. | | | Georgia’s 2023 municipal elections are 106 days away. Georgia’s 2024 presidential primary is 232 days away. The final day to vote in Georgia’s 2024 presidential election is 470 days away. We’re already counting down the days, because the results of the upcoming local elections will directly impact Georgians’ lives, and the upcoming presidential election cycle will have widespread implications in Georgia and across the country. That’s why it’s important that we work together right now to protect the freedom to vote, elect voting rights champions, and stop anti-voter Republicans from seizing power. Even a small donation to Fair Fight can make a big difference. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66982922/418240604/-1177593706?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230724_SV_1.1_0_6MO_vanity_NA_NA_SCOTUS.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWJhZjI3Yy02YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VE_9ZnveUjq_VJsKA02XxoKalqcGPXJbpfeQC5SlVoM=&emci=d4baf27c-6b2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=d9baf27c-6b2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5260669) The Supreme Court’s recent slew of terrible decisions have made waves across the nation. They’ve said it was okay to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans, rolled back student loan forgiveness and more.

These rulings are a reminder of just how conservative the Supreme Court has become and a couple of judges' recent actions have raised serious ethical questions.

ProPublica first reported that Justice Clarence Thomas has for years accepted trips from GOP mega donor and developer Harlan Crow, including on his private jet and superyacht, without disclosing them on financial disclosures as federal law requires.

And ProPublica also reported that Justice Samuel Alito failed to disclose that he had enjoyed an all-expenses-paid, high-end fishing trip to Alaska, complete with private jet travel, courtesy of hedge fund titan Paul Singer, a major Republican donor, who has been involved in 10 appeals to the Supreme Court.

These secret gifts could all too easily have a bearing on his decisions in the court, leading to major corruption in the highest court in the land, which is why we want to know:

**Should Justices on the Supreme Court be held to the same ethical requirements as members of Congress?**

**This poll was made for[dpwillis67@gmail.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66982923/418240605/-1177593706?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230724_SV_1.1_0_6MO_vanity_NA_NA_SCOTUS.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWJhZjI3Yy02YjJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VE_9ZnveUjq_VJsKA02XxoKalqcGPXJbpfeQC5SlVoM=&emci=d4baf27c-6b2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=d9baf27c-6b2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5260669) **

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My go-to summer recipe
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66983285/418240961/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NiMzkxYy02YzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtuPt_jz5RgX9VZS6t5yEJ5fo9_U8hIJ-tkeYGf95xg=)
Peter,

After a busy year meeting constituents across Central and Northwest Illinois, and getting things done in Washington, I’m truly grateful for any opportunity to make a home-cooked meal.

If I could, I’d be like every other Midwesterner in the summer and grill every night. And nothing quite says summer like bratwursts! So in that spirit, I wanted to take a minute and share my go-to recipe:

_**Summer Brats with Drunken Onions**_
* 2-3 Onions
* 2-3 Tbsp of Butter
* 4-6 Bratwursts Sausages
* 1 Can of Light Beer
* 2-3 Tbsp of Stone-Ground Mustard

**Directions:** **Step 1**
Start by putting two or three onions in a saucepan with 2-3 tablespoons of butter. Saute until translucent.

**Step 2**
Add uncooked bratwurst to the saucepan and cook, lightly browning the edges of the sausage.

**Step 3**
Add one can of light beer to the pan. Put a lid on the pan and simmer. The longer you simmer, the more flavor!

**Step 4**
Take brats out of the pan and onto a plate. This is a good time for the brats to be finished on a medium-hot grill. (Just to brown them.)

**Step 5**
In the pan with the drunken onions, simmer until most of the moisture is gone. Then, add a healthy two or three tablespoons of stone-ground mustard to the pan...stirring to incorporate.

**Step 6**
Serve brats on brioche buns with the onion-mustard sauce on top. Enjoy!

_(And any leftover brats should be refrigerated in the onions. They became friends in the saucepan... might as well let them hang out in the fridge.)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66983286/418240962/2043242937?refcode=em-7.24.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NiMzkxYy02YzJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtuPt_jz5RgX9VZS6t5yEJ5fo9_U8hIJ-tkeYGf95xg=)
I hope you enjoy it!!

Eric
