clean_body: | = Peter, After a busy year meeting constituents across Central and Northwest Illinois, and getting things done in Washington, I’m truly grateful for any opportunity to make a home-cooked meal. If I could, I’d be like every other Midwesterner in the summer and grill every night. And nothing quite says summer like bratwursts! So in that spirit, I wanted to take a minute and share my go-to recipe: Summer Brats with Drunken Onions 2-3 Onions 2-3 Tbsp of Butter 4-6 Bratwursts Sausages 1 Can of Light Beer 2-3 Tbsp of Stone-Ground Mustard Directions: Step 1 Start by putting two or three onions in a saucepan with 2-3 tablespoons of butter. Saute until translucent. Step 2 Add uncooked bratwurst to the saucepan and cook, lightly browning the edges of the sausage. Step 3 Add one can of light beer to the pan. Put a lid on the pan and simmer. The longer you simmer, the more flavor! Step 4 Take brats out of the pan and onto a plate. This is a good time for the brats to be finished on a medium-hot grill. (Just to brown them.) Step 5 In the pan with the drunken onions, simmer until most of the moisture is gone. Then, add a healthy two or three tablespoons of stone-ground mustard to the pan...stirring to incorporate. Step 6** Serve brats on brioche buns with the onion-mustard sauce on top. Enjoy! (And any leftover brats should be refrigerated in the onions. They became friends in the saucepan... might as well let them hang out in the fridge.) = I hope you enjoy it!! Eric | = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. help me keep up this incredible momentum We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, friend, I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66985240/418242405/351797697?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzYyMTU3Mi02ZDJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBw3MRw5ftzsxVmvNP4tVv-nFbBTwKoSvNdOUAob0-8=) Since we launched this campaign, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both **upgraded** our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' **best chance** to flip a red seat blue. And a new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. **This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, friend, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. Our democracy showed incredible resilience during the 2022 midterms, with voters rejecting election denial tactics at the polls. However, the fight is far from over, and we cannot afford to be complacent.
The Freedom to Vote Act, reintroduced by congressional Democrats, is an essential piece of legislation that will provide crucial protections against the ongoing attacks on American democracy. This landmark legislation encompasses vital provisions to safeguard the freedom to vote, counter election denial, end partisan gerrymandering, and curb the influence of big money in politics.
By ensuring equal access to the ballot box, promoting racial justice and equity, and blocking anti-voter efforts in the states, we can build a stronger, fairer, and more inclusive democracy for all. [**Now is the time to act, and we must not falter.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66985097/418242287/278552988?refcode=20230724_AOTL_F_FTVABiz_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNjIxNTcyLTZkMmEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWwQh8j88IukMys3yeDlc17371ILmUI1xg2osGJlAhU=)
[**How can you help? By supporting All On The Line's efforts, you will be at the forefront of the fight to protect voting rights and end partisan congressional gerrymandering. Your contribution will support our work advocating for this bill ensuring a fair and equitable future for our nation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66985099/418242288/278552988?refcode=20230724_AOTL_F_FTVABiz_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiNjIxNTcyLTZkMmEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWwQh8j88IukMys3yeDlc17371ILmUI1xg2osGJlAhU=)

clean_body: | Friend, The threats against our democracy from powerful forces continue to escalate, undermining the very foundation of our nation. That's why we are reaching out again to mobilize behind the historic Freedom to Vote Act, and we need your unwavering support to make it a reality. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our democracy showed incredible resilience during the 2022 midterms, with voters rejecting election denial tactics at the polls. However, the fight is far from over, and we cannot afford to be complacent. The Freedom to Vote Act, reintroduced by congressional Democrats, is an essential piece of legislation that will provide crucial protections against the ongoing attacks on American democracy. This landmark legislation encompasses vital provisions to safeguard the freedom to vote, counter election denial, end partisan gerrymandering, and curb the influence of big money in politics. By ensuring equal access to the ballot box, promoting racial justice and equity, and blocking anti-voter efforts in the states, we can build a stronger, fairer, and more inclusive democracy for all. = = = We cannot allow any further delays. We must rise to the occasion, unite as advocates for fairness, and take action for a brighter future. \-- Biz John Bisognano President All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. clean_body: Donate to save our country Friend Top Republican Senators and MVPs like Ted Cruz, Ron Johnson, Kellyanne Conway, and Mike Pompeo emailed you last week - we had to do a quick follow-up because it's essential. Multiple SWING-STATE and BATTLEGROUND Senate races are heating up, and Senators like Ted Cruz have the entire Democratic establishment gunning for his Texas Senate seat. Republicans were severely outraised by Democrats in 2022, and we failed to take back the Senate. Democrats are DOUBLING DOWN and have begun to outraise Republicans in MAJOR states we must win to take back the Majority. This trend can 't continue, or we won't succeed next year. We are calling on our top 15 patriots in your city to lend their support so Senators like Ted Cruz have the resources needed to PUSH BACK on the radical Left and AVOID repeating the failures of 2022. ****************************************************************************************************** It's an unfortunate reality in politics: you NEED money to win. The consequences of not keeping pace with the Democrats and being outraised came to fruition in 2022, and we failed to take back the Senate. That's why we set a significant goal to reach 12,000 donations from your state by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, and we're so close to hitting it. Can you make a donation and help Senate Republicans TAKE BACK the Majority? Onward to Victory, Sent From Senate Republican Headquarters **** P.S. ** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Message for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it’s Chuck Schumer. I’m reaching out because I just checked our July membership list, and **I didn't see your name.**

Look: We absolutely _cannot_ let MAGA Republicans roll back all of our progress. We’ve come _way_ too far, and there is _way_ too much at stake to let the Senate fall back into the hands of Mitch McConnell and the GOP.

But that’s exactly what could happen if we don’t have _every_ Democrat with us in this critical fight -- and that includes YOU. **So please, I’m personally asking:**

**[Will you take action now and join our _essential_ grassroots team by activating your July membership before midnight?](https://go.dscc.org/go/14402?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230724-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230724-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&akid=11466%2E9716520%2EAz98_y)**

| | [ACTIVATE my membership](https://go.dscc.org/go/14402?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230724-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230724-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongformMembership23-Pros-sl1&akid=11466%2E9716520%2EAz98_y)
---

Protecting the Senate in 2024 will be _historically_ difficult. We have to defend more than DOUBLE the number of seats as the GOP -- and with Mitch McConnell just two seats away from taking back power, **we have no room for error.**

Republican megadonors are already spending BIG to attack our candidates and take back power, so I’m counting on Democrats like you to be a part of this grassroots team and **fight back:**

Peter, today I am honored to have the endorsements of 59 sheriffs from across Florida. I proudly back our law enforcement officers as they keep Floridians safe. My priorities and vows to them are as follows:
* I will OPPOSE any efforts by the Democrats to defund the police.
* I will CRACK down on liberal prosecutors who refuse to do their jobs.
* And I will PUSH for mandatory strict minimum sentences for crimes AGAINST law enforcement officers.

Across the nation, we continue to see the harmful impact of what Democrat soft-on-crime policies of coddling criminal behavior does to communities in places like New York and California. While Democrats villainize our brave law enforcement officers, I will always stand alongside them and provide them with the resources they need to get the job done. Please, join Team Rick Scott TODAY if you stand with our police officers! **[Sign on today in support.>>>](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d4568abbb4fe4b39bd9db8c707380026&_e=FuVJ0eJ0C8h-1Rnqh0KH-qaxrFM54EBIuT62iqMmTdPmDZqy4RsBPh-yVjaY_tUrz0WaC0mEWJRGxywCjoHK0JK-5rxGsSb8dFTitkt3GmKuHtn6Xp5jMahiHxnQQDndBICU4z8LHgxeffJIEjljbl8soD6Oy1ihkagXvtvH_lm8L2uV7Y19p03SGBbMD5Bk44LorCdQaSW7mSEEBdxoQeB8mEoVikb0uyheIRhGRsehw71M1mY9w3ebIQ2EBHJNu1bX4-H-KfKOmMSTZEAwJuU5UFxAJeYVOzRBt0z2CUcZ17T-A3bbJhQwMVm2tijeuhenUpDyo56vnldxO3tWlneXu2yI-Mcz8XMCpOm30tNwTPCCkfmTdazzfVPR6FjK)**

subject: I need help to fill up my truck

body:
At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_t=dzeLEexAReD--620iKW-rsL1NTop8cHjD6KNC818R6bIY3m6M0LPGFiHbNuba5jfDm0lboyrogg-znzrRTpMhN8hLVBORdnwNFjRrAW86WY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_t=dzeLEexAReD--620iKW-rsL1NTop8cHjD6KNC818R6bIY3m6M0LPGFiHbNuba5jfDm0lboyrogg-znzrRTpMhN8hLVBORdnwNFjRrAW86WY%3D)

|

Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_e=oOeAfmP-OrWbgIwFz2WW0LPzQmJ9kjdWMlMo1u5dLgUT5UPE3gpGHpeqbJqVRZ5PYIxRkbVe02_Tvx-Qdkco9FlDXodTgaYA3hLdTRyP1Vm7U_apM2qoVDKl9xZ2yQ5c4Yq24tmaQjQmK1H0hETPRpThZWNIRvsoVWrpz2oDGbxyQh70h8frgFyjtmEyXL0UijVk7sULc5fjkJcpHLFkipRTiimpKJEDFwparhPAQhNkPH5ZJGH65C81T5Hhd2FWoIDA8ejLw71tpbLYhN3mToT-F_aRQhhf0-SjxjZCY26xz-LaDnlQFIWumAWNieRJUrRphSOUMCKA0P5UyY5KUK_iBIptHOEy_aKk13EKDa0IVWGsF_z-ce5et62XzL_oVf52CnhX9sdItT0_b44v4Q%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_e=oOeAfmP-OrWbgIwFz2WW0LPzQmJ9kjdWMlMo1u5dLgUT5UPE3gpGHpeqbJqVRZ5PYIxRkbVe02_Tvx-Qdkco9FlDXodTgaYA3hLdTRyP1Vm7U_apM2qoVDKl9xZ2yQ5c4Yq24tmaQjQmK1H0hETPRpThZWNIRvsoVWrpz2oDGbxyQh70h8frgFyjtmEyXL0UijVk7sULc5fjkJcpHLFkipRTiimpKJEDFwparhPAQhNkPH5ZJGH65C81T5Hhd2FWECqeBqK7x3tpgpdlaWwFyUWE0anb4RYVlkzYwd042WCWH43IhfiScXEWLMTx8FKID5sKd_rYN3cXMkG-i3joCpMcBmZupEjDcDhjgxCUHtMSxNtUqACyOIXRscA-jg16OI_Yg2mDtpAM9-W7R9RJsA%3D%3D)

Alternatively, a contribution of **[$7.50](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_e=oOeAfmP-OrWbgIwFz2WW0LPzQmJ9kjdWMlMo1u5dLgUT5UPE3gpGHpeqbJqVRZ5PYIxRkbVe02_Tvx-Qdkco9FlDXodTgaYA3hLdTRyP1Vm7U_apM2qoVDKl9xZ2yQ5c4Yq24tmaQjQmK1H0hETPRpThZWNIRvsoVWrpz2oDGbxyQh70h8frgFyjtmEyXL0UijVk7sULc5fjkJcpHLFkipRTiimpKJEDFwparhPAQhNkPH5ZJGH65C81T5Hhd2FWvtbtgHHN35o_D1NBMSKajV88mG6eh6bGzDD1NZMIimyCvpGsCFqFXONu-yavBEkWOB2bNqLx-eQ19sXJdB8HCNWS0tCnfbjagCW-K6OdfX0CphakD2kb1QCJU8To1vEkzaClqwCXj1xSxABcblxMKw%3D%3D)** would buy me two gallons, and a gift of **[$120](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b9fbdcaa84f64023849e6a91790f62f0&_e=oOeAfmP-OrWbgIwFz2WW0LPzQmJ9kjdWMlMo1u5dLgUT5UPE3gpGHpeqbJqVRZ5PYIxRkbVe02_Tvx-Qdkco9FlDXodTgaYA3hLdTRyP1Vm7U_apM2qoVDKl9xZ2yQ5c4Yq24tmaQjQmK1H0hETPRpThZWNIRvsoVWrpz2oDGbxyQh70h8frgFyjtmEyXL0UijVk7sULc5fjkJcpHLFkipRTiimpKJEDFwparhPAQhNkPH5ZJGH65C81T5Hhd2FWoCm9APesYSj5qQcdSCQDaBdbLK56xi0m_Wr6S97wh34PH4a5woq5L-Gs35WSdQAkbo5G1oNi9t4NXz0OkU4PunqnNiyIGF1PL4mptUksFSXSq_-O9mI8QE0bDWXwo6IsMU1bvA9KbhbEnpiHBEuE2g%3D%3D)** would cover the expenses of a full tank

Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance.

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can | | Fellow American, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: What is Democratic socialism?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
A lot of people across the political spectrum want to fear-monger about the idea of Democratic Socialism — do you know what it means?
It means we value democracy and society over the love of capital. That's what it means.
As opposed to loving capital more than we love the integrity of our democracy and society, which is what we have right now.
[People like to paint Alexandria as extreme, but the reality is that we’re fighting to protect what should be basic rights — things like healthcare and voting. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power Alexandria’s fight? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230724.H9Vdxt&refcode=em20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230724.H9Vdxt&refcode=em20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)**
Although Alexandria is a Democrat, she operates independently from either party’s establishment. She is willing to challenge her own party’s leadership and, when necessary, break from the party line.
She doesn’t believe in the extreme pursuit of profit at any and all human or environmental cost. She believes in guaranteed healthcare for all and tackling the climate crisis with a much more serious mobilization than what we’re doing now.
[Alexandria also accepts $0 in corporate money — our campaign is 100% funded by grassroots, small-dollar donations. Will you contribute $5 today to stand with our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230724.H9Vdxt&refcode=em20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230724.H9Vdxt&refcode=em20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)**
With resolve,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230724?refcode=em20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=4688_2526796_EsA6q8&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230724-4688-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&akid=4688%2E2526796%2EEsA6q8)**

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Can I give you a call/text?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=d4579c815ec64ad0bd561ee4217a3d9b&_t=-R0RNXXgA-SEc9EHs9eiMwj-CV6s_YtN3P7_MZaFAupaCMB_b0F1l-jHNgNc8uK7AqtSQqtdVyTZS6KHF1VIJqdal-RYFTLmdRREQAlUA3s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=d4579c815ec64ad0bd561ee4217a3d9b&_t=-R0RNXXgA-SEc9EHs9eiMwj-CV6s_YtN3P7_MZaFAupaCMB_b0F1l-jHNgNc8uK7AqtSQqtdVyTZS6KHF1VIJqdal-RYFTLmdRREQAlUA3s%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d4579c815ec64ad0bd561ee4217a3d9b&_e=lcoLKwWBej5GFAMy21oXE_MghEij3u5HUOHM0n5-qojCo-GvqMgKH8T5WClisQ2QGC0GWQMbCOTFf0dRXpzcIQKRvgoWpCV1OdL65FwueUGYG1cHazxZNhdSNCn_j4MGuLBI5QxuraUrC1eeoBpi-hG88e9-jOjmz4U4f0fosmTZbhU0RcbC_G0ieP1Pu9qV-F2bzjXwUW4VbpcgTX0_gf0zu_Mnuj8e8SpZ12GGakM8f0Fsj_aVeDEn3P6jaT6xUHiMavy5N4xh2paRdOT0d5ZnmRN2N3-LCDVNhibd79CIlD-0XLcahuGrwO3Njs9maFtQuZmc7TLHnbzJt5NF88rOyslpSMzVq0gO01V03Hi301jV1J5ljc1fIQLEHPG3WcvGNwEYlhpk1MHhY-SQE0pWdv-_v-MECdP5c8R5ptbdCWGfERYnCb5nxCo_6Vic)
|

* * *

Fellow American,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d4579c815ec64ad0bd561ee4217a3d9b&_e=lcoLKwWBej5GFAMy21oXE_MghEij3u5HUOHM0n5-qojCo-GvqMgKH8T5WClisQ2QGC0GWQMbCOTFf0dRXpzcIQKRvgoWpCV1OdL65FwueUGYG1cHazxZNhdSNCn_j4MGuLBI5QxuraUrC1eeoBpi-hG88e9-jOjmz4U4f0fosmTZbhU0RcbC_G0ieP1Pu9qV-F2bzjXwUW4VbpcgTX0_gf0zu_Mnuj8e8SpZ12GGakM8f0Fsj_aVeDEn3P6jaT6xUHiMavy5N4xh2paRdOT0d5ZnmRN2N3-LCDVNhibd79Bt6Wv89zUxZw5up3cP4fkmMmqY1hOfYsf4CO8nYUjGhWy3O2d0dC0jDHoHUseJkE24fJFgalgAn_IOZQ04WH0hft-pu3utKBsStQRJD4Dl-Lpr6qbjNW2DmimoB2m8pWX3oT0A9qGeHCihrb8nuMx2)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Investing in our workforce of tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The GOP budget would cut 225,000 teachers
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27043%2E3422442%2EXsMxga)
Earlier this month I was thrilled to see the Biden-Harris Administration cap child care co-pays at 7% of a family’s income for folks benefiting from federal child care assistance. **Affordable child care benefits not just kids and parents, but our whole economy**. It’s an investment in our country’s workforce and critical to building a strong, stable, globally competitive U.S. economy.
Congress needs to do _more_ so that all families have access to reliable, affordable, quality child care.**But Republicans just released their proposed budget bill for 2024** , and instead of supporting families, the bill would make deep cuts to every area of education—from preschool to college:
* 51,000 children would lose access to early childhood education through Head Start. Nearly 6,000 of those kids are in California.
* It would eliminate academic services for English language learners.
* It would eliminate need-based financial aid and work-study opportunities for college students.
* Nearly 225,000 teachers serving low-income communities could be kicked out of the classroom. Over 25,000 of those teachers are in California.

**Derek, as a mom of three kids attending California public schools, and someone who has navigated child care as a single working parent, I know how absurd these proposed cuts are**.They would be devastating to so many families and communities. I’ll keep fighting against these cuts, and pushing Congress to do more to support families.
—Katie
We need your help to send Katie back to Washington as California’s next Senator, where she’ll stand up to special interests and Republicans and deliver for families like yours. Our end of month fundraising deadline in a week from today. clean_body: The GOP budget would cut 225,000 teachers Earlier this month I was thrilled to see the Biden-Harris Administration cap child care co-pays at 7% of a family’s income for folks benefiting from federal child care assistance. Affordable child care benefits not just kids and parents, but our whole economy. It’s an investment in our country’s workforce and critical to building a strong, stable, globally competitive U.S. economy. Congress needs to do more so that all families have access to reliable, affordable, quality child care.But Republicans just released their proposed budget bill for 2024 , and instead of supporting families, the bill would make deep cuts to every area of education—from preschool to college: 51,000 children would lose access to early childhood education through Head Start. Nearly 6,000 of those kids are in California. It would eliminate academic services for English language learners. It would eliminate need-based financial aid and work-study opportunities for college students. Nearly 225,000 teachers serving low-income communities could be kicked out of the classroom. Over 25,000 of those teachers are in California. Derek, as a mom of three kids attending California public schools, and someone who has navigated child care as a single working parent, I know how absurd these proposed cuts are.They would be devastating to so many families and communities. I’ll keep fighting against these cuts, and pushing Congress to do more to support families. —Katie We need your help to send Katie back to Washington as California’s next Senator, where she’ll stand up to special interests and Republicans and deliver for families like yours. Our end of month fundraising deadline in a week from today. Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

With so many people leaving the state to go on vacation and flee the heat, it’s no surprise that our fundraising has been taking a hit. But it’s still important for us to stay on track ahead of next year’s toss-up election. Friend,
**A TRIAL DATE HAS BEEN SET FOR MAY 20, 2024.**
The Biden Department of Justice is trying to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as a warning to the American people not to defy the powers-that-be in Washington.
That's why I continue to say that the 2024 election will truly be the final battle for the heart and soul of our nation.
_Friend, I know in my heart that we will prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and emerge victorious on November 5, 2024 as We The People peacefully take back our country and Make America Great Again!_
If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people running our country right now, then don't even think about donating. _Though, I will request that you say a prayer for me and my family, and most importantly, for our nation._

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz [action needed!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18862?t=6&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to help reach my ambitious goal of $500,000?**[**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18863?t=8&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ron Be Gone and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18870?t=15&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18871?t=16&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18872?t=17&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**We need to raise $4,000 by MIDNIGHT to fund our crucial work. Will you chip in $1, $3, or anything you can afford today? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18863?t=19&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

_Colin Allred_
[DONATE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18863?t=21&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)
---
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF).**

[Click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Beat Ron DeSantis »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/120?t=4&akid=1919%2E564421%2E10P3oF)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Sorry for the long email, but this needs some explaining..
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7FugzAQhp_m2EDm7NhhYEiL6FCpnTtVxj4SVxgTYwulT1-Boq7fff_df9ovkxsfLagXQLw5uwIi8Asg3r82H_OPf38r4-elvMsPf9qH-AqI6bHQv_lcUpHXbtqp6grbaqlHsgW1tWwY8uasZHFrpTFIVllVy1EMIzHbCCGaUYpRkOVYuBYZcqZQIGeIdTUYxUei08AGi-psQLDjUKXrTccYgq9M8MXU3lJa1qNRD9ivZHKkSs9kQ9oNwP4aJrvpRLF085pcyokA--BLbZILc2li_gXe5-S_15CjIeDdbCZAuSNP1mUPvBvikxjtF-2uM_Aukd3TR2-G_Ckkintgi0Vs7bK5aXKrVCDY9fjABP8XAAD___vyegY)

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7FugzAQhp_m2EDm7NhhYEiL6FCpnTtVxj4SVxgTYwulT1-Boq7fff_df9ovkxsfLagXQLw5uwIi8Asg3r82H_OPf38r4-elvMsPf9qH-AqI6bHQv_lcUpHXbtqp6grbaqlHsgW1tWwY8uasZHFrpTFIVllVy1EMIzHbCCGaUYpRkOVYuBYZcqZQIGeIdTUYxUei08AGi-psQLDjUKXrTccYgq9M8MXU3lJa1qNRD9ivZHKkSs9kQ9oNwP4aJrvpRLF085pcyokA--BLbZILc2li_gXe5-S_15CjIeDdbCZAuSNP1mUPvBvikxjtF-2uM_Aukd3TR2-G_Ckkintgi0Vs7bK5aXKrVCDY9fjABP8XAAD___vyegY)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

School Choice
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

clean_body: Sorry for the long email, but this needs some explaining.. Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support. The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

It takes resources to run even a local school board race. From yard signs to canvassing supplies, these candidates – often moms and dads running their first campaign – need help to reach out to as many voters as possible. And the sad truth is, the right wing has mega-donors pouring dollars never before seen in these races. If we want to stand up to extremism and keep hateful culture wars out of our children’s schools, we have to show up, too.

[Will you make a donation right away to help us reach our $50k fundraising goal? With only a few days left until the filing deadline, we want to invest in our candidates right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66993519/418250189/1647078566?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230724_FR_EOM_0_Darcy_NA_NA_EOM.1&refcode2=34bde429-782a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJkZTQyOS03ODJhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tu9-PJGyiyNWIPaM_ey0Qo9K5elXyO__0V5K1a1i050=)

Darcy Draeger
Executive Director

| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

name: Abortion Alert @ HER Time
subject: Republicans want to track women who get legal abortions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66993536/418250262/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230724_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUwNTYzNzgtNzgyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=goNyUWZ3LAu-nt9dGPEWa0ItxMLgMBotucAznfXFsz4=)
---
Peter, Mississippi AG Lynn Fitch is coming after your private health care information. She, along with 18 other Republican Attorneys General, are working hard to make sure law enforcement can track women who travel out-of-state to receive abortion care if they live in a state where it’s illegal. That way, they can still be prosecuted when they return home. **For making a completely legal and private health care decision. ** It’s reprehensible, but it’s no surprise coming from Lynn Fitch. This is the woman that argued the _Dobbs_ case before the Supreme Court, and is proud to have played a role in overturning _Roe v. Wade_. **The good news?** Lynn Fitch is up for reelection THIS November, in less than four months. clean_body: | = Peter, Mississippi AG Lynn Fitch is coming after your private health care information. She, along with 18 other Republican Attorneys General, are working hard to make sure law enforcement can track women who travel out-of-state to receive abortion care if they live in a state where it’s illegal. That way, they can still be prosecuted when they return home. For making a completely legal and private health care decision. It’s reprehensible, but it’s no surprise coming from Lynn Fitch. This is the woman that argued the Dobbs case before the Supreme Court, and is proud to have played a role in overturning Roe v. Wade. The good news? Lynn Fitch is up for reelection THIS November, in less than four months. We want to vote her out of office, but we’ll need your help to do it.**= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! Conventional wisdom and Western policies long believed that an economically prosperous China would ultimately become more democratic. For better or worse, the opposite has happened. **China is today far more autocratic than at any point in modern history, something the West, in its misguided approach to embracing China, has** _**de facto**_**enabled.** Matt Pottinger, former Deputy National Security Advisor to President Trump, eloquently captures what happened: "[We saw a baby shark and thought that we could transform it into a dolphin....We kept feeding the shark and the shark got bigger and bigger. And now we're dealing with a formidable, great white.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/24862161-0818-4eb3-9041-5bd878a1d0b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4b7c0dff-2ed9-469d-a68c-bb7cd1e190c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The great white has now hijacked many of the multilateral institutions that define the rules-based international order, effectively killing hope of coordination on global challenges. Consider the functioning of the World Trade Organization, the UN Human Rights Council, and the World Health Organization and how they've dealt with unfair trade practices, an ongoing genocide, and the COVID pandemic.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WrnoStaypdQBvJkgPEdG6jj2sBZN3Ah1wlEC6Cq4GDM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134975909)
#### _**World Trade Organization**_
In 2001, the Western world was convinced it was nourishing a future dolphin and worked diligently to bring China into the global rules-based trading system; to do so, China made a set of commitments in order to enter into the World Trade Organization, summarized at the time by Nicholas Lardy (emphasis added):
> **[Summary of Commitments](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[
> China's commitments to further open its economy in order to gain membership in the World Trade Organization are sweeping. They include ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[significant reductions in tariffs](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[...the ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[gradual elimination of all quotas](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ and licenses that have restricted the flow of some imports; a ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[substantial reduction in the use of state trading](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[... and the ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[opening of critical service sectors](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ such as telecommunications, distribution, banking, insurance, asset management, and securities to foreign direct investment. In addition, the protocol governing its accession sets forth ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[China's commitment to abide by international standards in the protection of intellectual property](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[....](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d50cb33-26ed-4645-987f-9748a92a4335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**How has China done in fulfilling these commitments over the past 20+ years? In short, very poorly.** Many of the violations are obvious, and are well-known to the global business community. The state remains an enormous player in many sectors, intellectual property protections are weak at best, and many critical service sectors in China remain closed to foreign ownership. [Rather than become more market-oriented as they indicated, and the world expected, they would, China has become more socialist and centrally-controlled.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3924ae96-ef5f-4c7e-aaee-e37c2383eb12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Of course, they created new phrases to suggest compliance ("Capitalism with Chinese characteristics" was among my favorites) as they simply ignored or broke the rules. And the political reform that was expected simply didn't materialize.
The US-China Relations Act of 2000 requires the US Trade Representative to provide an annual summary of China's compliance with the terms of their ascension into the WTO. The most recent report, published in February 2023, captures the status of Chinese compliance (emphasis added):
> **[China also has a long record of violating, disregarding and evading WTO rules](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04c67129-fbc7-4532-9ea9-29f005999f21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ to achieve its industrial policy objectives. China continues to use numerous and constantly evolving unfair, non-market and distortive trade policies and practices in pursuit of harmful and anticompetitive industrial policy objectives. At the same time, ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04c67129-fbc7-4532-9ea9-29f005999f21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[China has sought to frustrate WTO oversight mechanisms](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04c67129-fbc7-4532-9ea9-29f005999f21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[, such as through its poor record of adhering to its WTO transparency obligations.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04c67129-fbc7-4532-9ea9-29f005999f21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Consider that last line, which gets to the heart of the matter, and reminds me of a _Politico_ headline on the twentieth-anniversary of China's entry into the WTO: ["](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3924ae96-ef5f-4c7e-aaee-e37c2383eb12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[China joined rules-based trading system-- then broke the rules."](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3924ae96-ef5f-4c7e-aaee-e37c2383eb12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **WTO [disputes are so numerous](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0e1a8b6e-482c-4a60-a278-9badeba328eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the rules so inconsistently enforced that it's really hard to think the institution is functioning as advertised. It's also impossible to believe we're still dealing with a dolphin.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WrnoStaypdQBvJkgPEdG6jj2sBZN3Ah1wlEC6Cq4GDM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134975909)
#### _**UN Human Rights Council**_
And it's not just in economic and trade matters that China has undermined multilateral institutions. The [United National Human Rights Council](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c1e3adbc-1a33-4d72-bd06-e72acb0d1c66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offers another case. The fact that [global institutions such as the United Nations Human Rights Council are unable (unwilling?) to recognize the ongoing genocide in Chinese-occupied East Turkestan (Xinjiang)](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b9aa6ba7-39f3-42b7-b0e5-170909b914d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a disgrace. (To learn more, you might enjoy watching [my conversation with Uyghur dissidents Rushan Abbas and her husband Hakeem Idris](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/125fd672-89ef-4760-acb1-4f548549a4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
After multiple delays and postponements, the [United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights Michelle Bachelet issued a report about the atrocities in Xinjiang](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/28eb10f3-4f1f-4da3-abf1-8bc568cad6cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2022. A _Foreign Policy_ article titled "The United Nations is Scared of Calling Out China's Genocide" summarized its findings: ["confirmation that those imprisoned were tortured by being beaten, that women suffered violations of reproductive rights through the coercive enforcement of family planning policies (including sterilizations), and that camp inmates were used for forced labor--effectively enslaved--by state-run work programs."](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f040c43f-e190-4a1f-b9f5-f1f5d89f4784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Ultimately, the report concluded that China **" may"** be committing crimes against humanity and that a legal process (such as one conducted by the International Criminal Court) would need to take place before any final determination could be made. Also noteworthy is that Commissioner Bachelet issued the report minutes before her term ended. Unsurprisingly, the [Chinese denounced the report](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9f4c9e16-dd64-4e71-a0d3-eb06cd2795db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as politically motivated and intended to smear and slander the regime by interfering in the country's internal affairs.
Meanwhile, groups including [Amnesty International](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e5baf3da-3a0e-4b30-a102-8541daf966f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the [Australian Strategic Policy Institute](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/48c1cd23-2405-4e8a-8f99-40225bb3c4d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the [New Lines Institute](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9c51fa05-7347-4ebf-a3a7-31579c734b04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have been crystal clear in describing the Chinese regime as conducting a systematic genocide and cultural erasure of muslims in Xinjiang, violating the 1948 Genocide Convention. The governments of the United States, Britain, Canada, and France, among others, have also called what's happening a genocide.
Sadly, the world is doing nothing, thanks in large part to China's sustained campaign to undermine global institutions. As noted by [Azeem Ibrahim](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4ae716cc-c2c7-44f6-bd65-17930a6ea8b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "[China's diplomats operate in force and with confidence in the halls of the United Nations--stymieing the work of the Security Council and the individual U.N. agencies..."](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3bd77c29-50bb-4c29-aa07-05619da429c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Again, impossible to assume we're dealing with a dolphin.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WrnoStaypdQBvJkgPEdG6jj2sBZN3Ah1wlEC6Cq4GDM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134975909)
#### _**World Health Organization**_
And of course, the COVID pandemic exposed the World Health Organization as a body no longer working towards its founding purpose: to coordinate country efforts to control and eradicate communicable diseases by supporting and developing healthcare capacities around the world to improve global health.
In a piece titled "[The WHO and China: Dereliction of Duty](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f08415bd-7e94-4b4a-83af-be5d2f6a531a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," Michael Collins of the Council on Foreign Relations highlights how the World Health Organization (and specifically its Director-General Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus) emerged as a defender and promoter of the Chinese government's COVID response - despite mounting evidence that the CCP was more concerned about covering up the outbreak than warning the world of potential risks. Collins notes how Tedros went further than just praising China; he criticized governments around the world for limiting travel to and from the People's Republic. In addition, the WHO (and specifically Tedros) delayed declaring COVID a "public health emergency of international concern" while the virus spread rapidly, slowing a coordinated response to contain the disease at a critical time.
Of course, the fog of uncertainty might help explain some of these actions. But surely a multilateral global health body would intensely focus on determining the origin of the virus so as to mitigate the risk of another pandemic, right? Unfortunately, that doesn't appear to be a WHO goal. After dragging its feet on multiple occasions, [WHO has stopped investigating the origins of the virus](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fe561cec-cec1-47f1-bd56-10e9b9b6a0ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "citing ongoing challenges over attempts to conduct crucial studies in China."
Would it surprise you to learn that China was instrumental in getting Dr. Tedros elected Director-General of WHO? Or that upon becoming Director-General, one of his first official statements was a reiteration of his belief in "One China" based in Beijing? To learn more about China's attempt to hijack the World Health Organization, I'd encourage you to read [a 2017 piece by Yanzhong Huang which he aptly titled "Tedros, Taiwan, and Trump: What They Tell Us About China's Growing Clout in Global Health.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4e15f3d-a422-4a45-8bb4-fbe52ff754ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
At the end of the day, as noted by Michael Collins, "the WHO's weak response to China's mishandling of the COVID-19 outbreak has laundered China's image at the expense of the WHO's credibility."
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c136f181-ccb2-458e-a838-9385c5395258?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Global Multilateralism is Dead**
It's time for the world to recognize that the great white shark has consumed many of our global institutions. China has undermined the credibility of most multilateral organizations (via [explicit efforts such as the Belt & Road Initiative](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/27eaac87-49a3-4d77-8815-28089c4a2c3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), and as this becomes increasingly obvious to nations around the world, more and more nations will disengage from the so-called "rules-based international order" as they pick sides in the US China war. [Cooperation on important global issues (such as climate change) will be increasingly difficult to achieve](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9d2b887b-a6fa-46d7-845c-25cae51185ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As a result, the world will continue to split into two global ecosystems - one led by China, and the other led by Western nations. Leaders need to plan and act accordingly.

Unfortunately, that doesn't appear to be a WHO goal. After dragging its feet on multiple occasions, , "citing ongoing challenges over attempts to conduct crucial studies in China." Would it surprise you to learn that China was instrumental in getting Dr. Tedros elected Director-General of WHO? Or that upon becoming Director-General, one of his first official statements was a reiteration of his belief in "One China" based in Beijing? To learn more about China's attempt to hijack the World Health Organization, I'd encourage you to read " At the end of the day, as noted by Michael Collins, "the WHO's weak response to China's mishandling of the COVID-19 outbreak has laundered China's image at the expense of the WHO's credibility." | | ---|---|--- Global Multilateralism is Dead It's time for the world to recognize that the great white shark has consumed many of our global institutions. China has undermined the credibility of most multilateral organizations (via ), and as this becomes increasingly obvious to nations around the world, more and more nations will disengage from the so-called "rules-based international order" as they pick sides in the US China war. . As a result, the world will continue to split into two global ecosystems - one led by China, and the other led by Western nations. Leaders need to plan and act accordingly. Navigating Uncertainty is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support Dr. Mansharamani 's work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. About Dr. Mansharamani is a global generalist who tries to look beyond the short term view that tends to dominate today's agenda. He spends his time speaking with leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism...and prides himself on voraciously consuming a wide variety of books, magazines, articles, TV shows, and podcasts. LinkedIn twice listed him as their #1 Top Voice for Global Economics and Worth profiled him on their list of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He has taught at Yale and Harvard and has a PhD and two masters degrees from MIT. He is also the author of as well as . Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9aacb9c827b448d822cd3e81b2bd039&_e=5r0E2luoHCxLIVVp7kskrnTe0LnI3nD8Kf21ZLohb8gasNNZLCBP1LW5nHnoHsRcqQ5KK_UJ60o4-4bQZflAQ4KlJQOefmhcqv3qha4VAw-CjkmFmckmjqu8o8b4kDV5c6WekRF6_MZ-s6KpDW2zIttWZL0KpxEavmkTkr2HXvgAyi2BuXiyo2vIiqqTndRoP4IHWDhKGfn44_X8Dn-IUCcEBBi2PTn-lkLBWeraRUw0PXIDZKKR8gGonwshzcvFb12F8QIKfaobfW30sOBYr_a4PiuvAnZMzqpjyIzBCIXuHyRmh8X7pvyyfxfhNq7IQTfiExi2rZSyeY3r59BhMSSxiBtxjPobziyovHVxhU8N4y8-DM3ATTkiF3RlI11mampjMuaUPHJnM62CXZr-eQ%3D%3D)**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Making sure your voice is heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

When deciding to run for Congress, the experiences and stories of my patients motivated me. From the hospital frontlines, I’ve seen the impact of our nation’s epidemic of gun violence, the crisis of healthcare affordability, and attacks on reproductive freedom. Time and time again, my career in medicine has been defined by systems that fail my patients, so now **I am answering the call to serve.**

I have seen firsthand what is at stake, and as a political appointee in Dallas, and as a policy advisor in Washington, D.C. I've been inspired by what is possible. To create real change, we need a bold leader to fight for you and your family – for affordable healthcare, for your reproductive rights, and to protect our communities from the danger of gun violence.

These are the issues that drove me to run for office. But at this point in the campaign, I now want to hear about the issues that matter most to you most. **Because I value service before self–an ethos I internalized from my earliest days as a cadet at the United States Air Force Academy.** I am running to make sure **_your_** voices are heard in Congress, and I look forward to reading all of your responses.

[I want to know what’s on your mind, Peter, because your voice is front and center in our campaign. Let me know the issues you care about by filling out this brief survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66993799/418251279/-1721731258?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230724_SV_IssuesSurvey_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Issues01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVjODg3MjItN2EyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-P9x80FluNHcqK_6VToN2vSOXZHZVu6aZJ2z8LQztWc=&emci=99c88722-7a2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=a5c88722-7a2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13153572) | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66993800/418251280/-1721731258?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230724_SV_IssuesSurvey_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Issues01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVjODg3MjItN2EyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-P9x80FluNHcqK_6VToN2vSOXZHZVu6aZJ2z8LQztWc=&emci=99c88722-7a2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=a5c88722-7a2a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13153572)
---
Thank you so much for your time, Peter. Together, we can create life-saving change for our community and our country.

– Brian

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: Fighting MTA’s Outrageous Congestion Tax
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | **As your Congressman, Josh is constantly fighting for the families of North Jersey to make life more affordable.**

The New York MTA’s proposed outrageous Congestion Tax of $23/day is nothing but disastrous for hardworking Jersey families and drivers. NONE of the revenue from this tax goes back to support NJ Transit or the PATH Train. **This tax does not benefit New Jersey in any way – rather it hurts them, as it will cause truck traffic and an increase in cancer-causing pollution in North Jersey!**

* * *

Fellow American,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=de8edfebe3fa4abd95776eced18c0ed8&_e=hayDCVqvwEiw2oNSJRrspH1eIIHwW8z-U_fNK0j9FzT21Icl-ACFg1I7ksHI-pWcXFL1yC_6Tn2aPoNe_OgnuM1ET9TY__GMIKrWt2CChSx4H2dGv6ZYrzYHIBalx3kHoVcaouURTA1-yfZ7DHhV_cxvrngGSTPliQrRNngmWFEft8meaJ7O9FNUthg-QAx-Q71vkwGr_fwmf4Os5BK8aETvmecEwRJsrNYWF4EAzsnpJ65WBgIkzykcbZyEwF7QAr4s4q6SMeV4_y7X3cwJ1UAZGM2MQdZKDozvEeR-6ekhlRi36wp-SxP40FSk3xbQaOVaZiC7lEn_h7UM_s3IB4BX1Hdn8Biln5qV0KlY1Y1BKYbtmDN1Mf9aOY93z_zda4uPyAE3z7s5SvqJNdVJt_D68UBBvFuquvJcINgk_U6avCHM2JWSPTvTGhNWRyJj)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

[**ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=de8edfebe3fa4abd95776eced18c0ed8&_e=hayDCVqvwEiw2oNSJRrspH1eIIHwW8z-U_fNK0j9FzT21Icl-ACFg1I7ksHI-pWcXFL1yC_6Tn2aPoNe_OgnuM1ET9TY__GMIKrWt2CChSx4H2dGv6ZYrzYHIBalx3kHoVcaouURTA1-yfZ7DHhV_cxvrngGSTPliQrRNngmWFEft8meaJ7O9FNUthg-QAx-Q71vkwGr_fwmf4Os5BK8aETvmecEwRJsrNYWF4EAzsnpJ65WBgIkzykcbZyEwF7QAr4s4q6SMeV4_y7X3cwJ1UAZGM2MQdZKDozvEeR-6en83HCM9Lv9_DZ0FU6SJ1kHkGDDILDVWXr5Q6DLVcIEMRAudzNOlZAH3pTFTifSzdBpCCHTZ_7SPVaGWcqwg1hr7f0WkBZa-6rWqWvveCmcm-TKa-80tJheW8N66ouU260xNbZlfOqclp_wQGpQLksy)

One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat **the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies.** No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you.

As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. **My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat**.

Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! | | Fellow American, I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few. I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff. From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now. Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another. One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies. No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you. As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat. Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success. So please, before you go, . I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.
